description: Operational narrative signal layer for the Hyperliquid PM (live strategy on/off gates) and backtester (regime gates + move-probability priors). Each archetype: computed P(up/down/flat) + magnitude priors, live detection conditions, 14-basket regime mapping, per-strategy-class PM gate actions, and a point-in-time backtester gate expression. Regenerate: generate_narrative_signals.py -> narrative-signals workflow -> build_narrative_signals.py.

signals.name: Flagship AI-Agent Token Launch Pump (reflexive parabola)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours; parabola plays out over days to ~2 weeks
signals.typical_duration: 1-3 weeks of run-up, then weeks-to-months of decay
signals.recurrence: Clustered Oct 2024 - Jan 2025; recurs whenever a new flagship narrative coin appears
leading_signals: viral X/Twitter mentions of an AI agent
association/endorsement by a known VC/founder (a16z, Andreessen)
pump.fun coin crossing $100M then higher mcap
Virtuals bonding curve nearing 42,000 VIRTUAL graduation
rapid holder-count growth
exchange listing announcements (Binance/Coinbase)

active_when: twitter_mention_velocity_zscore > 2 over 24h on a specific AI-agent ticker
days_since_token_launch <= 21 AND mcap_24h_pct_change > 30%
is_launchpad_graduation_event == true (pump.fun cross >$100M mcap OR Virtuals bonding curve >= 42,000 VIRTUAL)
holder_count_growth_rate > 50% over 48h
first_cex_listing_flag == true (Binance/Coinbase listing announcement)
circulating_float_pct < 30% (thin tradeable float amplifying reflexivity)
data_sources: X/Twitter firehose or LunarCrush/Santiment social velocity

move_probability.expected_abs_move: launch token +500% (single measured instance; web-cited range +500% to +8000% over first 1-4 weeks); sector co-movement peers +20% to +100%
move_probability.lag: immediate to hours from viral detection; parabola plays out over days to ~2 weeks
move_probability.duration: 1-3 weeks of run-up, then weeks-to-months of decay
move_probability.half_life: edge decays fast — bullish skew strongest in first 3-7 days post-trigger; flips to crash regime once mcap stalls (see sector-rotation-crash archetype)
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by thin float, VC/a16z association, broad risk-on backdrop (rising total alt mcap), and CEX listing; flipped/muted when BTC dominance is rising and launchpad volume is falling

pm_gate.scope: named launch token + AI-agent sector basket
pm_gate.rationale: Reflexive parabola is pure momentum; rotate into the flagship and its highest-beta peers while mention velocity and mcap are accelerating.

pm_gate.scope: new pump.fun / Virtuals AI-agent launches and graduations
pm_gate.rationale: Launchpad graduation + viral velocity is the exact entry regime for sniping; thin float gives outsized payoff.
Computed p_up=1.0 over the measured launch window justifies a long tilt during the run-up phase.

pm_gate.scope: the launch token and hot AI-agent peers
pm_gate.rationale: Fading a reflexive parabola is a loss generator while it is still accelerating; mean-reversion only re-enables after the crash archetype fires.
Realized vol explodes; constant-notional sizing must shrink to keep risk budget constant.
Do not short a live reflexive parabola; wait for the rotation/crash regime.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_token_launch <= 21) AND (twitter_mention_velocity_zscore > 2) AND ((mcap_24h_pct_change > 30) OR is_launchpad_graduation_event OR first_cex_listing_flag) AND (circulating_float_pct < 30)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable momentum-rotation / memecoin-sniping / directional-long on the named token + AI-agent basket, and as a strong P(up) prior (P(up)~1.0 in-sample over the first 1-4 weeks, n=4 instances) for move-probability calcs. Disable mean-reversion/short strategies on the same names while active.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Severe survivorship/look-ahead hazard: the +500% magnitude is measured only on winners that survived to be catalogued. At decision time you only have realized social velocity and mcap-to-date, NOT the eventual peak. Use only data timestamped at-or-before the bar; cap position life to the half-life and never assume the full historical magnitude. mcap_24h_pct_change must be computed from prior closes, not the parabola peak.

signals.one_liner: Viral AI-agent launch + launchpad graduation + thin float = reflexive parabola: go momentum-long the flagship and snipe peers, disable mean-reversion, size down for vol — edge decays within 1-2 weeks.

signals.name: AI-Sector Rotation + Reflexive Crash (correlated cohort unwind)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours) on the shock; cascade over days
signals.typical_duration: Drawdown unwinds over weeks; sector spent months below peak
signals.recurrence: The full cohort crash was a single Q1-2025 regime change; smaller correlated drawdowns recur on any AI macro shock
leading_signals: smart-money / top-PnL wallets distributing
sector aggregate mcap stalling after parabola
negative AI macro headline (DeepSeek)
declining new launches / launchpad volume
funding rates flipping / OI unwind
BTC dominance rising vs alts

active_when: sector_aggregate_mcap_zscore stalling/rolling over after a parabola (z falling from >2 toward 0)
rolling_drawdown_from_60d_high > 15% on the AI-agent basket
top_wallet_netflow_to_exchanges > 0 and rising (smart-money distributing)
btc_dominance_change > 0 over 7d (rotation out of alts)
negative AI macro headline flag == true (e.g., DeepSeek-style efficiency shock, NVDA -5%+ day)
ai_token_cross_correlation_30d > 0.7 (cohort moving as one — cascade-prone)
funding rates flipping negative / OI unwind on AI-agent perps
new_agent_launch_count_trend declining
data_sources: AI macro news feed (NVDA / DeepSeek-type headlines)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: individual AI-agent tokens -60% median peak-to-trough (p25 -34%, p75 -83%, range -17% to -90%) over ~6 weeks; sector mcap roughly -65% to -70% (per-asset: AI16Z -71%, AIXBT/VIRTUAL ~-52%); equity reference NVDA -17% on shock day
move_probability.lag: immediate (hours) on the shock; cascade over days
move_probability.duration: drawdown unwinds over weeks; sector spent months below peak
move_probability.half_life: the sharp leg is front-loaded (first few days to 2 weeks); slow bleed persists for months — directional-short edge strongest in the first cascade window then decays
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by high cross-correlation (>0.7), thin liquidity, negative funding/OI unwind, rising BTC dominance, and an AI macro shock; muted if BTC dominance is falling and a fresh flagship launch re-injects dry powder

pm_gate.scope: AI-agent basket and highest-beta names (AI16Z, AIXBT, VIRTUAL)
pm_gate.rationale: Computed p_down=1.0; correlated cohort unwind is the cleanest short window in the sector.
Funding flips and OI unwind make carry collection a path into a liquidation cascade; flatten before the washout.
Buying dips into a reflexive deleveraging cohort crash is a classic value-trap; disable until correlation normalizes and drawdown stabilizes.

pm_gate.scope: AI-agent longs from the prior pump regime
pm_gate.rationale: Momentum has flipped negative; exit longs to avoid the cascade.

pm_gate.scope: AI-agent perps AFTER the washout (post-cascade, funding deeply negative, OI flushed)
pm_gate.rationale: Fade only once forced selling is exhausted — never into the live cascade.

pm_gate.scope: AI-agent / high-beta alt book and broad altcoin exposure
pm_gate.rationale: Cohort + AI-macro contagion (DeepSeek->NVDA->crypto) warrants tail protection on correlated alt exposure.
Downside vol expansion is the breakout; trade it short rather than fading.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (rolling_drawdown_from_60d_high > 15) AND (sector_aggregate_mcap_zscore_5d_change < 0) AND (ai_token_cross_correlation_30d > 0.7) AND ((top_wallet_netflow_to_exchanges > 0) OR (btc_dominance_change_7d > 0) OR ai_macro_negative_headline_flag)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable directional-short / vol-breakout-short / tail-hedge on the AI-agent basket and to FLATTEN funding-carry + momentum longs; supply a strong P(down) prior (P(down)~1.0 in-sample, n=4, measured_fraction=0.3) for move-probability calcs. Gate liquidation-fade to ON only with an added 'post-washout' condition (funding < -X bps AND OI down >Y% from peak).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Look-ahead hazard: rolling_drawdown_from_60d_high and the -60% median are computed with hindsight on the peak. At decision time use only realized drawdown-to-date and trailing correlation; do not condition on the eventual trough. The DeepSeek headline is point-in-time only at its publication timestamp — do not let macro-shock labels leak earlier. measured_fraction is just 0.3, so most magnitudes are web-cited not bar-measured; treat magnitude prior as soft.

signals.one_liner: AI-agent cohort moves as one basket: when mcap rolls over, correlation >0.7 and smart money distributes, short the basket / flatten carry / disable dip-buying / buy tail hedges — then fade only after the washout.

signals.name: Launchpad Graduation Pumps & AI-Infra Token Consolidation
signals.typical_lag: immediate on graduation; days-to-weeks on merger re-rating
signals.typical_duration: Graduation pumps fade within days; merger re-rating persists weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: Graduations were near-daily on Virtuals during the Nov 2024 - Jan 2025 boom; mergers are rare one-offs
leading_signals: Virtuals bonding curve approaching 42,000 VIRTUAL
pending Uniswap liquidity deployment
merger/consolidation announcement
token conversion-ratio disclosure
exchange support announcements for the new ticker

active_when: bonding_curve_pct_to_graduation >= 90% (Virtuals agent approaching 42,000 VIRTUAL)
graduation_event_flag == true (Uniswap liquidity deployment imminent/just executed)
virtual_required_base_demand rising (buyers must acquire VIRTUAL to participate)
merger_announcement_flag == true (AI-infra consolidation, e.g., FET/AGIX/OCEAN -> ASI)
days_to_conversion_deadline <= 14 on a disclosed merger/conversion
exchange support announcement for the new ticker == true
data_sources: project/exchange announcement feeds for mergers & ticker conversions

move_probability.expected_abs_move: graduating agent token +850% (single measured instance; web range +50% to +1000% on listing); VIRTUAL base-currency +10% to +30% on graduation waves; AI-infra merger re-rating +50% to +300% (FET ATH ~$3.47)
move_probability.lag: immediate on graduation; days-to-weeks on merger re-rating
move_probability.duration: graduation pumps fade within days; merger re-rating persists weeks-to-months
move_probability.half_life: graduation-pump edge half-life is hours-to-days (fades fast post-listing); merger re-rating half-life is weeks
move_probability.conditioning: amplified during active launchpad boom (high daily graduation count) and when VIRTUAL demand is structurally rising; merger leg amplified by exchange support + clean conversion ratios; muted once launchpad volume collapses (see crash archetype)

pm_gate.scope: graduating Virtuals agents + VIRTUAL base; announced AI-infra mergers (ASI-type)
pm_gate.rationale: Deterministic supply/liquidity mechanics (bonding-curve fill, Uniswap deploy, token conversion) are textbook event-driven entries.

pm_gate.scope: VIRTUAL on graduation waves; merging infra tokens pre-conversion
pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0 — front-run the deterministic base-currency demand and supply consolidation.

pm_gate.scope: agent tokens at/just-after graduation onto Uniswap
pm_gate.rationale: Graduation is the canonical snipe trigger; thin initial float gives the +50% to +1000% tail.
Re-rating momentum persists for weeks on mergers; rotate into the consolidating leader.

pm_gate.scope: the graduating token in the first hours post-listing
pm_gate.rationale: Do not fade the deterministic graduation pop; only consider reversion after the days-long fade begins.
Listing-day vol is extreme; shrink notional to hold risk budget constant.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (bonding_curve_pct_to_graduation >= 90 OR graduation_event_flag) OR (merger_announcement_flag AND days_to_conversion_deadline <= 14)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable event-driven / memecoin-sniping / directional-long on the graduating token + VIRTUAL (graduation leg) or the consolidating infra basket (merger leg); supply a P(up) prior (P(up)~1.0 in-sample, n=3) but split the two legs — short-horizon for graduation pumps, multi-week hold for merger re-rating.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Look-ahead hazard: the +850% magnitude is one estimate-grade outlier (measured_fraction=0.0, confidence mix includes a low) — treat the magnitude prior as very soft. Bonding-curve % and merger/conversion dates are observable point-in-time on-chain/in-announcement, which is good, but the eventual pump size is not knowable at entry. For the merger leg, only the announcement is point-in-time; the conversion ratio may be disclosed later. Do not assume exchange support before it is announced.

signals.one_liner: Deterministic supply events — Virtuals bonding-curve graduation (drives VIRTUAL demand) and AI-infra mergers (FET/AGIX/OCEAN->ASI) — are event-driven longs: snipe the graduation pop, hold the merger re-rating, but magnitude prior is thin (n=3, mostly unmeasured).

signals.name: Idiosyncratic Agent/Protocol Events (hacks, subnet launches, dTAO)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours) on hacks; launch-day spike then multi-day dip on subnet alphas
signals.typical_duration: Hack drops partly recover in days; subnet-launch dips persist until emissions re-equilibrate
signals.recurrence: Hacks are sporadic; dTAO subnet alpha launches recur continuously since Feb 2025
leading_signals: unusual agent wallet activity / dashboard access
deleted-account or anomalous agent posts
new Bittensor subnet registration
alpha-token liquidity-pool creation
TAO staking redistribution toward a new subnet

active_when: agent_wallet_anomalous_outflow_flag == true (unusual agent wallet activity / unauthorized dashboard access / drained funds) -> BEARISH single-name
deleted-account or anomalous agent posts detected -> BEARISH
subnet_registration_event == true on Bittensor (new subnet) -> launch-spike then dip
alpha_token_age_days <= 7 AND alpha_pool_liquidity_depth low -> dip-risk window
tao_emission_share_change_by_subnet large positive on a new subnet (emission rotation)
major subnet model-achievement / ETF-filing flag == true -> BULLISH TAO + subnet token (e.g., Covenant-72B, +66.5% TAO month)
days_since_dtao_launch tracked (regime live since 2025-02-13)
data_sources: Bittensor subnet registry & dTAO emission data (taostats / learnbittensor)
ETF-filing / model-benchmark news feed (Grayscale, MMLU results)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: UP cases (n=2): +130% median (p25 +98%, p75 +162%, range +66% to +194%) — driven by subnet model-achievement rallies (TAO +66.5% month, Templar subnet token +194%/7d). DOWN cases (n=4): -16% median (p25 -11%, p75 -27%, range -4.6% to -50%) — hacks -16% to -22% single-name 24h, subnet-launch dips -30% to -70%, TAO -13% in alt downtrends
move_probability.lag: immediate (hours) on hacks; launch-day spike then multi-day dip on subnet alphas; days-to-weeks on model-achievement re-rating
move_probability.duration: hack drops partly recover in days; subnet-launch dips persist until emissions re-equilibrate; achievement rallies high-beta and mean-reverting (TAO fell ~35% from its May-2026 high)
move_probability.half_life: hack edge half-life hours-to-days (partial recovery); subnet-launch-dip edge days; achievement-rally edge weeks but reverts fast given high beta
move_probability.conditioning: bearish skew dominates (p_down 0.75): hacks and fresh subnet-alpha launches are the modal events; flips bullish on genuine model/benchmark milestones + institutional catalysts (ETF filing); amplified by TAO's high beta and the dTAO emission-rotation mechanics

pm_gate.scope: single name on agent hack/compromise (e.g., AIXBT-type) and fresh subnet alpha tokens (age <= 7d)
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=0.75; hacks break the autonomy thesis (-16% to -22%) and new subnet alphas dump -30% to -70% post-launch-spike.

pm_gate.scope: all idiosyncratic catalysts — hacks (short), subnet launches (sell-the-launch), model-achievement/ETF news (long TAO + subnet token)
pm_gate.rationale: This archetype is a grab-bag of single-name catalysts; event-driven is the natural home, with direction set by event type.

pm_gate.scope: TAO + the achieving subnet token on a genuine model-benchmark milestone or ETF filing
pm_gate.rationale: UP cases (+66% TAO, +194% subnet token) cluster on real decentralized-AI achievements and institutional catalysts.

pm_gate.scope: concentrated single-agent positions exposed to hack risk
pm_gate.rationale: Agent-compromise is a Security/Black-Swan event; hedge idiosyncratic blow-up risk on names where the thesis depends on agent autonomy.
dTAO emission rotation makes realized vol high (TAO -33% intra-window drawdowns); size down to hold risk budget.

pm_gate.scope: single-name post-hack bounce only (after the initial 24h flush)
pm_gate.rationale: Hack drops partly recover in days when fundamentals are unchanged — a tactical reversion window, NOT applicable to subnet-launch dips.

pm_gate.scope: TAO during a confirmed achievement-driven re-rating
pm_gate.rationale: Achievement rallies trend for weeks before mean-reverting; ride momentum with a trailing stop given high beta.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: down_active = agent_wallet_anomalous_outflow_flag OR (subnet_registration_event AND alpha_token_age_days <= 7); up_active = (model_benchmark_milestone_flag OR etf_filing_flag) AND asset in {TAO, achieving_subnet_token}
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a directional-splitting gate: when down_active, enable directional-short / sell-the-subnet-launch / tail-hedge with a P(down)~0.75 prior; when up_active, enable directional-long / momentum-rotation on TAO+subnet token with a P(up) prior reflecting the +130% median up-move. Feed event-type as the conditioning variable for the move-probability calc rather than a single blended prior.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Look-ahead hazard: do not blend the bullish (achievement) and bearish (hack/launch) cases into one prior — they are opposite-signed and event-type must be classified point-in-time. Hack flags must fire only at on-chain detection time, not at later news coverage. Achievement/ETF flags are point-in-time at announcement; the subsequent ~35% mean-reversion is hindsight — cap hold to the half-life. measured_fraction=0.43, so ~half the magnitudes are web-cited; treat magnitude priors as soft and the subnet-launch -30% to -70% range as especially wide.

signals.one_liner: Single-name AI catalysts split by type: short hacks (-16/-22%) and fade fresh subnet-alpha launches (-30/-70%), but go long TAO + the achieving subnet token on real model-benchmark/ETF milestones (+66%/+194%) — classify the event before sizing, edge is bearish-skewed (p_down 0.75).

signals.name: BTC dominance regime (risk-on/off rotation within crypto)
signals.typical_lag: regime-scale (weeks-to-months); not an intraday signal
signals.typical_duration: months per regime leg
signals.recurrence: every cycle: BTC-led accumulation -> mid-cycle ETH/large-cap rotation -> late-cycle alt/meme blow-off -> risk-off flight back to BTC
leading_signals: BTC.D level and 30-day slope
Altcoin Season Index (>75 alt-season / <25 BTC season)
ETH/BTC ratio and its 50/200-day MA crosses
TOTAL2 / TOTAL ratio (alt share of market cap)
BTC spot-ETF net flows vs alt-ETF/alt-fund flows
days since last confirmed alt-season

active_when: BTC season (concentrate in BTC): altcoin_season_index < 25 OR (btc_dominance_level rising AND btc_dominance_30d_change_pp > +1.5pp)
Alt-season (rotate down risk curve): altcoin_season_index > 75 OR (btc_dominance_30d_change_pp < -2pp AND eth_btc_ratio_50dma_cross == golden_cross)
ETH/BTC regime flip: eth_btc_ratio crosses its 200dma (up = alt-favorable, down = BTC-favorable)
ETF-amplified BTC regime: btc_etf_net_flow_30d > 0 AND alt_fund_flow_30d <= 0 AND btc_dominance_level >= 55%
Neutral/no-rotation (current 2026 state): 25 <= altcoin_season_index <= 75 AND |btc_dominance_30d_change_pp| < 1.5pp (treat as BTC-tilt while days_since_last_altseason is large)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: This is a regime gauge, not a direction bet on total cap. BTC.D itself swings ~15-35pp over a full cycle (median measured abs move ~57.6% on the ratio across legs); BTC realizes ~13.6% over a regime leg; alt baskets out/under-perform BTC by 50-200%+ over a rotation. Down-leg measured median ~35% (p25 24.3 / p75 45.8), flat/mixed leg ~58.7%.
move_probability.lag: regime-scale: weeks-to-months. Not an intraday or even daily signal — confirm on 30-day dominance slope.
move_probability.duration: months per regime leg.
move_probability.half_life: slow — a confirmed dominance regime persists for months; edge decays only when the 30d slope flattens and ASI re-crosses 25/75.
move_probability.conditioning: ETF era structurally lifts dominance (BTC-only flows) — bias toward BTC-concentration regimes persisting longer than pre-2024. Alt-season requires BTC.D below ~55 to even trigger rotation. Leverage/funding extremes accelerate the late-cycle alt leg and its reversal.

pm_gate.rationale: In a BTC-season/rising-dominance regime, concentrate long beta in BTC and large-caps; in a confirmed alt-season (ASI>75), tilt long beta toward large-cap alts/ETH.
pm_gate.scope: BTC and ETH in BTC-season; large-cap alts (TOTAL2 leaders) in alt-season

pm_gate.rationale: This narrative IS the rotation map — enable cross-sectional momentum keyed to the dominance regime (own BTC when dominance rising, rotate into alts when ASI>75 and ETH/BTC crosses up).
Regime is a clean macro-trend gate; run trend models on BTC.D, ETH/BTC and the alt basket aligned with the prevailing dominance slope.
During a strong directional dominance trend, fade-the-ratio mean-reversion (e.g. shorting a rising BTC.D / buying bleeding alts) is fighting the regime — size down until the 30d slope flattens.
In a BTC-dominant tape, structurally underweight/short low-beta alts that bleed vs BTC; in alt-season, avoid shorting alts.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: btc_season = (altcoin_season_index < 25) OR (btc_dominance_30d_change_pp > 1.5); alt_season = (altcoin_season_index > 75) OR (btc_dominance_30d_change_pp < -2.0 AND eth_btc_ratio > eth_btc_ratio_50dma); neutral = NOT btc_season AND NOT alt_season
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a regime ON/OFF gate that selects the asset universe and direction of momentum/trend strategies (BTC-basket long in btc_season, alt-basket long in alt_season), and as a Bayesian prior on relative performance P(alts outperform BTC | alt_season). Do NOT use as a directional prior on total market cap — p_up/p_down/p_flat are ~0.33 each. Disable alt mean-reversion longs while btc_season is true.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: ASI and BTC.D must be computed from data available at the close of the decision bar — the 90-day Altcoin Season Index and 30/50/200-day MAs are backward-looking windows, so do not peek at the forward leg. Beware survivorship in the alt basket (delisted/dead alts) which inflates historical alt-season returns. The 2024+ ETF-amplification structurally changed dominance behavior — segment backtests pre/post 2024.

signals.one_liner: BTC dominance is the master in-crypto rotation gauge: rising/ASI<25 = concentrate in BTC; ASI>75 + ETH/BTC up = rotate into alts; today it's neutral-to-BTC-season (BTC.D ~58.7%, ASI ~49) so keep beta in BTC.

signals.name: Alt-season extreme as a late-cycle top signal
signals.typical_lag: the top signal is coincident-to-leading by days/weeks; confirmation on the dominance reversal
signals.typical_duration: the unwind runs the length of the ensuing bear (months-to-a-year)
signals.recurrence: once per cycle at the euphoria peak
leading_signals: Altcoin Season Index spiking >75
BTC.D making a multi-month low
memecoin/low-cap volume share at extremes (see [[memecoin-mania]])
ETH/BTC and alt/BTC ratios parabolic then rolling over
funding/leverage extremes across alts

active_when: Euphoria peak forming: altcoin_season_index_peak > 75 AND btc_dominance_local_min (BTC.D at multi-month low) AND eth_btc_ratio_rate_of_change rolling over (parabolic then negative)
Leverage extreme: alt_funding_rate_zscore > 2 across the alt complex AND memecoin_volume_share at multi-month high
CONFIRMED reversal (the tradable trigger): btc_dominance_30d_change_pp turns positive off the local min AND ETH/BTC + alt/BTC break below their short-term MAs (alts falling faster than BTC)
Risk-off flight-to-BTC-quality underway: alt_basket_beta_to_btc realized > 1 while alts draw down and BTC.D spikes
data_sources: Perp funding-rate feeds across alts (exchange APIs, Coinalyze, Velo)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Bearish for alts. Measured down-leg abs moves median ~46.5% (p25 39.8 / p75 53.2; range 33-60%); alt baskets routinely draw down 70-90%+ over the full ensuing bear. BTC.D rebounds ~15-30pp off the dominance bottom (the one measured up move ~40%, BTC.D per-asset median ~36.5%). Altcoins per-asset down median ~60%.
move_probability.lag: the top signal is coincident-to-leading by days/weeks; act on the dominance-reversal confirmation, not on the ASI>75 print alone (alt-season can extend).
move_probability.duration: the unwind runs the length of the ensuing bear — months-to-a-year.
move_probability.half_life: the initial cascade resolves in days-to-weeks; the broader alt bleak-down has a long half-life (months). Best risk-adjusted edge is in the first weeks post-confirmation.
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by alt funding/leverage extremes and high memecoin volume share — the more crowded and levered the alt euphoria, the sharper the flight-to-BTC. A genuine reversal needs the dominance local-min to break upward; ASI>75 without a dominance turn is a warning, not a trigger (avoid catching the top early).

pm_gate.rationale: At ASI>75 + BTC.D multi-month low + funding z>2, enable downside hedges on the alt complex ahead of the late-cycle unwind.
On confirmed dominance reversal, short the highest-beta lagging alts/memecoins that fall faster than BTC; favor BTC long-vs-alt-short relative-value.
Memecoin euphoria at volume-share extremes is the exhaustion tell — flatten/disable long meme exposure into the reversal.
Crowded positive alt funding collapses violently on the unwind; flatten short-perp/long-spot carry on alts to avoid the basis blowout during the cascade.
Buying-the-dip in cratering alts during a confirmed regime flip is the losing side — disable alt long mean-reversion until BTC.D slope and funding normalize.
After the leverage washout cascade completes, enable fading capitulation flushes selectively on BTC/large-caps (not the doomed low-caps).
Realized vol on alts spikes through the unwind; vol-targeting should mechanically cut gross alt exposure.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (altcoin_season_index_peak > 75) AND (btc_dominance_at_or_near_local_min == TRUE) AND (alt_funding_rate_zscore > 1.5 OR memecoin_volume_share_zscore > 1.5); trigger_confirmed = active AND (btc_dominance_30d_change_pp > 0 turning up from the local min) AND (eth_btc_ratio_rate_of_change < 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Two-stage gate: 'active' = elevated top-risk → enable tail-hedge and reduce alt gross; 'trigger_confirmed' = enable alt shorts / BTC-vs-alt relative-value and disable alt mean-reversion. As a prior, P(alts down | trigger_confirmed) is high with expected alt drawdown 40-90%; do NOT use it as a BTC-direction prior (BTC may hold while alts crater — the signal is relative, BTC.D up).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Severe look-ahead hazard: a 'local minimum' in BTC.D is only knowable in hindsight — require a confirmed upturn (positive 30d slope off the min) before going short, otherwise the backtest will magically short the exact alt-season top. ASI and funding z-scores use trailing windows; compute strictly on closed bars. Only 2 historical instances (2018, 2021) — small sample, high regime-specificity; alt-basket survivorship inflates measured drawdowns (dead coins exit the index).

signals.one_liner: Alt-season blow-off (ASI>75 + BTC.D multi-month low + funding z>2) is the cycle-top tell — hedge alts; on the confirmed dominance upturn, short high-beta alts/memes and flatten alt carry as capital flees to BTC quality (n=2, confirm before acting).

signals.name: Post-Halving Bull Cycle (the 12-18 month parabolic run)
signals.typical_lag: weeks to months — the parabolic phase typically begins 3-6 months after the halving
signals.typical_duration: 12-18 months from halving to cycle top
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year halving cycle; 4 occurrences 2012-2024
leading_signals: halving event occurs (block height multiple of 210,000)
stock-to-flow ratio doubles
miner reserves declining
BTC reclaims prior cycle ATH
rising spot ETF net inflows (2024+ cycle)
funding rates turning persistently positive

active_when: 0 < days_since_last_halving <= 550 (within the 3-18 month post-halving parabolic window)
btc_below_200d_ma_flag == false AND btc_price >= prior_cycle_ath (BTC has reclaimed the prior cycle high)
issuance_pct_of_circulating_supply_annualized has just stepped down at the latest 210,000-block boundary (block_reward halved)
halving_to_date_return_pct > 0 AND rising over trailing 90d
funding_rate persistently positive (>0 on a 7d EMA) AND etf_net_inflow_zscore > 0 (2024+ cycle confirmation)
CYCLE-BREAKER override: if BTC 90d correlation to SPX/NDX > 0.6 AND etf_net_flow turning negative, demote confidence to low and treat as macro-trend, not supply-shock
data_sources: on-chain block height / mempool.space / Glassnode (issuance, miner reserves)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC halving-to-peak: median ~+700%, p25 ~+290%, p75 ~+2900% (full historical range +95% to +9000%); BUT magnitude is in steep secular decay — 9000%(2012) -> 2900%(2016) -> 700%(2020) -> 95%(2024). Forward base case: BTC roughly +50-150%, large-cap alts higher beta but muted vs prior cycles.
move_probability.lag: weeks to months — parabolic phase typically begins 3-6 months after the halving, not on the day
move_probability.duration: 12-18 months from halving to cycle top
move_probability.half_life: long — the trend persists for quarters, but the per-cycle edge magnitude halves+ each cycle; treat the historical p_up=1.0 as small-sample (n=4) and decaying
move_probability.conditioning: AMPLIFIED by positive ETF net inflows, persistently positive funding, reclaim of prior ATH, falling miner reserves. FLIPPED/NEUTRALIZED by high BTC-equity correlation regime (macro dominates), ETF outflows, and the structural diminishing-returns trend — the 2024 cycle nearly broke the pattern (first red post-halving year).

pm_gate.rationale: Historical p_up=1.0 over n=4 cycles; structural supply cut plus reflexive demand. Size for decayed magnitude, not 2012-era multiples.
Post-halving run is a multi-quarter uptrend; trend/MA-crossover/Donchian capture the parabolic phase.
Alt season historically rotates beta after BTC leads; momentum rotation rides the dispersion.
Declining miner reserves and ETF inflows are confirming on-chain signals; trade with the supply-side flow.
Persistently positive funding in a confirmed uptrend pays shorts-collectors; collect carry but watch for over-leverage near the top.
In a confirmed uptrend tail hedges bleed; trim but do not flatten given blowoff-top risk late in the window.
Fading a confirmed post-halving uptrend is the losing side historically.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_last_halving > 90) AND (days_since_last_halving <= 550) AND (btc_below_200d_ma_flag == false) AND (btc_price >= prior_cycle_ath_lag) AND (funding_rate_7d_ema > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable trend-following / momentum-rotation / directional-long on BTC+large-caps and as a strong P(up) prior (historical 1.0 over n=4, shrink toward ~0.6-0.7 for forward use given n=4 and decay). Disable directional-short and mean-reversion-short while active. Layer a SECONDARY gate that demotes the prior when btc_spx_corr_90d>0.6 AND etf_net_flow<0.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Block height and halving date are known point-in-time, but prior_cycle_ath and 'parabolic phase' labels are only confirmed in hindsight — use a lagged trailing ATH, not the realized cycle peak. The magnitude stats (median +700%) are survivorship/look-ahead biased upward by 2012-2016; do NOT use full-history median as a forward magnitude prior — use the most-recent-cycle-weighted (decaying) estimate.

signals.one_liner: Post-halving 12-18mo uptrend: historically 4/4 green (p_up=1.0) but magnitude decaying hard (9000%->95%); enable trend/momentum/long on BTC+large-caps, but the ETF/macro era is structurally eroding the supply-shock edge.

signals.name: Pre-Halving Rally / Buy-the-Rumor
signals.typical_lag: builds over 6-12 months before the halving date
signals.typical_duration: 6-12 months pre-event
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year cycle, ahead of each halving
leading_signals: halving date within 12 months
rising Google search interest in 'bitcoin halving'
accelerating spot ETF inflows (2024+)
BTC trending above 200-day moving average
improving funding/open-interest

active_when: 0 < days_to_next_halving <= 365 (halving date / block-distance within ~12 months)
halving_countdown_block_distance below the ~52,560-block (~1yr) threshold and falling
btc_return_trailing_6m_into_halving > 0 AND BTC trading above 200d MA
search_trend_halving_zscore > 1 (rising retail attention to 'bitcoin halving')
etf_net_inflow_zscore > 0 AND realized_cap_growth_rate positive (accumulation confirming)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC into-halving run: median ~+135% (p25 ~+125%, p75 ~+145%, range +115% to +155%) over the ~6-12 month pre-event window; large-cap alts higher beta. Note n=2 only.
move_probability.lag: builds gradually over 6-12 months before the halving date (not an event spike)
move_probability.duration: 6-12 months pre-event, resolving at/around the halving date
move_probability.half_life: edge is front-loaded into the event; 'buy the rumor' decays as the halving day approaches and easy gains are priced — risk of 'sell the news' post-event chop
move_probability.conditioning: AMPLIFIED by ETF inflows (2024 cycle front-ran so hard BTC set a new ATH BEFORE the halving — first ever), rising search interest, BTC above 200d MA. WEAKENED if BTC already extended / over-owned into the date (sell-the-news), or in a macro risk-off regime.

pm_gate.rationale: n=2 p_up=1.0 accumulation regime; front-run the telegraphed supply cut. Small sample — size modestly.
Pre-halving accumulation is a sustained uptrend above the 200d MA; trend strategies participate.
Calendar-certain catalyst with a known date; position into the event and plan to de-risk around the halving day to avoid sell-the-news.
Beta rotation accompanies the pre-halving bid once BTC trends.
Fading a confirmed pre-halving accumulation rally is the losing side in both observed instances.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_to_next_halving > 0) AND (days_to_next_halving <= 365) AND (btc_above_200d_ma_flag == true) AND (btc_return_trailing_6m_into_halving > 0) AND (search_trend_halving_zscore > 1)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable directional-long / event-driven / trend-following on BTC ahead of the halving date, and as a P(up) prior (historical 1.0 but n=2 — shrink heavily toward base rate, ~0.55-0.65). Pair with a 'de-risk near event' rule: reduce the long tilt as days_to_next_halving -> 0 to capture front-running without holding into sell-the-news.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: days_to_next_halving and block distance are perfectly known point-in-time (deterministic from block schedule) — no look-ahead. The hazard is sample size (only 2 clean instances, confidence mix 1 medium / 1 low) and that the 2024 ATH-before-halving was an ETF-driven structural break, so the historical magnitude may not generalize. Do not over-weight.

signals.one_liner: Pre-halving buy-the-rumor: BTC ran ~+135% into the last 2 halvings (n=2, p_up=1.0 but low confidence); tilt long/event-driven on BTC within 12mo of the date, then de-risk into the day to dodge sell-the-news.

signals.name: Post-Cycle Bear Market (the deflationary back half of the 4-year cycle)
signals.typical_lag: begins immediately after the cycle top (~18mo post-halving)
signals.typical_duration: ~12 months of decline into the cycle low, roughly the second half of the 4-year cycle
signals.recurrence: once per ~4-year cycle, following each bull-market top
leading_signals: BTC loses 200-day moving average after a parabolic run
funding rates flip persistently negative
exchange net-inflows spike (holders moving to sell)
failure to make new highs for >8 weeks after a blowoff top
long-term-holder distribution rising

active_when: btc_below_200d_ma_flag == true after a parabolic run (lost the 200d MA following a confirmed post-halving top)
months_since_cycle_top > 0 AND drawdown_from_ath_pct deepening (price failing to make new highs for >8 weeks after a blowoff top)
funding_rate_negative_streak rising (funding flips persistently negative)
exchange net-inflow zscore spiking AND long_term_holder_supply_distribution rising (holders moving coins to sell)
realized_loss_zscore elevated (capitulation / forced selling underway)
ETF net OUTFLOWS persistent (2024+ era — the dominant supply signal replacing miner selling)
data_sources: Glassnode/CryptoQuant (LTH distribution, exchange netflows, realized loss)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Peak-to-trough drawdowns: BTC median ~-63.5% (per-asset rollup; aggregate down stats median -61.9%, p25 -49.6%, p75 -77%, range -39.3% to -85%). Per-asset: BTC ~-77% to -85% in pure-crypto cycles but only ~-50% in the ETF-era 2024 cycle; ETH ~-61.9%; SOL ~-71%; total-market-cap ~-45%. Alts draw down deeper than BTC.
move_probability.lag: begins immediately after the cycle top (~18mo post-halving), often kicked off by a liquidation cascade
move_probability.duration: ~12 months of decline into the cycle low (the deflationary second half of the 4-year cycle)
move_probability.half_life: multi-month bear; sharp cascades resolve in days but the structural downtrend persists for ~a year — re-arm shorts/hedges on each failed bounce below the 200d MA
move_probability.conditioning: AMPLIFIED by crypto-credit blowups (Mt.Gox 2014, LUNA/Celsius/3AC/FTX 2022) and macro tightening / hawkish Fed and risk-off (2025-26: tariff shock, Warsh nomination, ETF outflows). The 2024-cycle bear was macro/ETF-driven and correlated with equities rather than a pure crypto blowup — so cross-asset risk-off is now a primary trigger.

pm_gate.scope: BTC, large-cap alts (ETH, SOL deeper beta)
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0 over n=4 cycles; the post-top downtrend is the bearish mirror that completes the cycle. Short alts harder than BTC (deeper drawdowns).
Below-200d-MA downtrend; trend/CTA goes short. Same engine, flipped direction.
Cascade/contagion risk is elevated in the bear (FTX-style and depeg-fear events); carry downside hedges.

pm_gate.scope: BTC, large-cap alts — AFTER washout only
pm_gate.rationale: Forced-liquidation cascades (e.g. Oct-10-2025 ~$19B) overshoot; fade the capitulation spike for the bounce, not before.
Funding flips persistently negative in the bear; long-carry inverts and over-levered longs get liquidated — flatten the carry book.
Mean-reversion longs get run over by trending capitulation; disable dip-buying on alts until a confirmed base.
Cut beta into the downtrend; reserve dry powder for the capitulation low (DCA/accumulation only at extreme drawdown).
Realized vol spikes in cascades; vol-target de-grosses automatically — enforce it.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (btc_below_200d_ma_flag == true) AND (months_since_cycle_top > 0) AND (drawdown_from_ath_pct >= 0.15) AND (funding_rate_negative_streak_days >= 5 OR exchange_netflow_zscore > 2)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to enable directional-short / trend-short / tail-hedge on BTC+large-caps and as a strong P(down) prior (historical 1.0 over n=4). Use it to DISABLE funding-carry-long and alt mean-reversion. Gate liquidation-fade to fire only on realized_loss_zscore spikes (post-washout), not as a standing long.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: btc_below_200d_ma_flag, drawdown, funding streak, and exchange netflows are all computable point-in-time. The hazard: 'cycle top' is only known in hindsight — use a trailing rolling max (lagged ATH) for drawdown_from_ath_pct, not the realized peak. measured_fraction is only 0.44 (much of the magnitude is web-sourced not price-measured), and the 2024-cycle bear was far shallower (~-50% vs -77/-85% prior) and macro-driven — so use a regime-conditioned magnitude prior (deeper in crypto-credit-blowup regimes, shallower in pure-macro ETF-era selloffs).

signals.one_liner: Post-cycle bear: 4/4 cycles drew down (p_down=1.0), BTC median ~-63%, alts deeper (ETH -62%, SOL -71%); flip trend-short, enable tail-hedge, flatten funding-carry, disable alt mean-reversion, and fade liquidation cascades only after the washout.

signals.name: Treasury-Adoption Announcement (company pivots to crypto reserve)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (same session, often pre-market)
signals.typical_duration: stock pop intraday-to-days; narrative read-across can persist weeks; coin effect <24h
signals.recurrence: very frequent in 2024-2025 — dozens of copycats; cluster events around each new high-profile entrant
affected_scope: other treasury-stock peers (MSTR, SMLR, MARA, SBET)
leading_signals: 8-K / press release announcing treasury policy adoption
board approval of crypto-as-reserve
convertible-note or ATM equity raise filed days before
small beaten-down small-cap with a crypto-aligned chairman
sudden short-interest spike then squeeze

active_when: is_treasury_adoption_announcement == true (8-K / press release announcing crypto-as-reserve policy) within last 24-48h
announcing_mktcap_usd < $2B (small/mid-cap re-rate is where the violent stock pop lives; large-caps like TSLA pop only ~2%)
first_purchase_usd / announcing_mktcap > 0.10 (purchase large relative to the company => bigger re-rate)
pre_announcement_ytd_return < 0 (beaten-down small-cap screen; SMLR/Metaplanet were down >30% YTD pre-pivot)
stock_short_interest_pct > 15% (squeeze fuel) OR crypto-aligned chairman flagged
COIN-side gate: first_purchase_usd / coin_mktcap > 0.005 AND issuer is mega-cap/halo (Tesla-type) — only THEN expect a real coin move (>10%); otherwise coin effect is mild (<3%)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Announcing small/mid-cap STOCK: median ~37%, but heavily right-skewed (p75 ~590%, max +6,425% Metaplanet, SBET ~+2,200%) — magnitude scales inversely with mktcap and with short interest. COIN side is the actual tradable for a crypto PM and is MILD: BTC ~2% (median 2.1%, often slightly DOWN same day), ETH the exception at ~46% only via cohort flywheel read-across (not the single-day event). Mega-cap halo issuer (Tesla) is the rare case BTC moved ~14.5%.
move_probability.lag: immediate (same session, often pre-market on the 8-K)
move_probability.duration: stock pop intraday-to-days; narrative read-across to peers/coin can persist weeks; direct coin effect <24h
move_probability.half_life: stock: hours-to-1-day for the impulse; coin sentiment edge decays within 24h; copycat read-across edge decays over ~1-2 weeks as the cluster saturates
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: low announcing mktcap, high short interest, bull-phase risk-on backdrop, novel asset (first ETH/SOL treasury > nth BTC copycat). Flips/fails when: market already skeptical of the vehicle (GME -3% to -11% despite the buy), dilution/convert overhang, or bear backdrop. Coin move only material when first_purchase_usd/coin_mktcap is non-trivial AND issuer carries a halo.

pm_gate.rationale: Fire long the announcing STOCK on the 8-K when mktcap small + short interest high + beaten-down; this is the highest-expectancy leg (right-skewed pops). Crypto PM proxy: tilt the treasury-stock cohort basket.
pm_gate.scope: announcing small/mid-cap stock + treasury-stock peers (MSTR, SMLR, MARA, SBET, BMNR)

pm_gate.rationale: Narrative read-across rotates the treasury-stock cohort and the relevant coin (BTC/ETH/SOL) for days-to-weeks; tilt into the cohort and the announced coin.
Do NOT chase the coin on a routine small-cap adoption — median coin move ~2% and often negative same day. Only take a small coin long if issuer is mega-cap/halo with material coin-flow ratio.
Single-stock realized vol explodes on the announcement; enable breakout/straddle on the announcing ticker, not on the coin.
pm_gate.scope: announcing stock (and listed options where available)

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = is_treasury_adoption_announcement AND (announcing_mktcap_usd < 2e9) AND (first_purchase_usd/announcing_mktcap >= 0.10) AND (pre_announcement_ytd_return < 0); coin_move_gate = active AND (first_purchase_usd/coin_mktcap >= 0.005) AND issuer_is_megacap
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate for event-driven long-the-stock and cohort momentum-rotation; supply P(direction) prior P(up)=0.62 on the STOCK. For COIN-level strategies, keep the gate OFF unless coin_move_gate is true (otherwise the coin prior is near-flat / mildly negative — do not let the bullish stock prior leak into coin sizing).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Use only the timestamp of the 8-K/press release, NOT subsequent peak prices — the median/p75 stock stats are peak-run figures and will overstate realizable edge if entered late. announcing_mktcap and short_interest must be the pre-announcement snapshot. first_purchase_usd is often a stock-amount already bought before disclosure, so the coin flow is not 'new' demand at the disclosure instant — avoid attributing a forward coin move to the event.

signals.one_liner: Crypto-treasury adoption 8-K: long the small beaten-down high-short-interest STOCK (median +37%, fat right tail); the coin barely moves (~2%, often red) unless a mega-cap halo name like Tesla is the buyer.

signals.name: Sustained Accumulation / mNAV-Premium Flywheel (ongoing buys funded at a premium)
signals.typical_lag: diffuse — builds over weeks/quarters rather than per-event
signals.typical_duration: persists as long as mNAV > ~1 and capital markets stay open (multi-quarter)
signals.recurrence: continuous through 2024-2025 bull phase; weekly purchase 8-Ks from MSTR and peers
leading_signals: mNAV premium > 1 (especially > 2)
fresh ATM/convertible/preferred raise filings
weekly Monday MSTR purchase 8-Ks
rising 'BTC Yield'/coin-per-share metric
growing count of new treasury entrants (crowding)
exchange outflows to corporate custody addresses

active_when: issuer_mNAV_premium > 1 (regime ON; strongly ON when > 2)
aggregate_DATCo_net_purchases_usd_30d > 0 and rising (cohort is a net buyer; 2025 ran ~$22.6B in Q3 alone)
new_treasury_raise_usd > 0 in trailing 30d (fresh ATM/convertible/preferred filings = fuel for more buying)
coin_per_share_growth_rate > 0 (accretive buys validating the premium)
count_active_treasury_vehicles increasing (cohort breadth expanding)
exchange outflows to known corporate-custody addresses positive over trailing 30d
data_sources: SEC EDGAR (8-K weekly purchase filings, S-3/ATM/convert/preferred prospectuses)
company mNAV trackers (e.g. Strategy mNAV dashboards)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Diffuse, trend-scale: when the flywheel regime is ON the coin trends up — measured up-moves median ~67% (BTC ~67.5%, ETH ~53.3%) over multi-week/multi-quarter windows. Per individual buy the coin move is negligible (<1-2%); the edge is a sustained structural bid, not an event. (n=5 instances, p_up=1.0 is small-sample — treat as a strong but regime-conditional tailwind, not a same-day signal.)
move_probability.lag: diffuse — builds over weeks/quarters rather than per-event
move_probability.duration: persists as long as mNAV > ~1 and capital markets stay open (multi-quarter)
move_probability.half_life: regime-length: edge persists while mNAV premium holds; decays sharply the moment premium compresses toward 1.0 (hand-off to the distribution archetype)
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: high cohort mNAV (>2), open capital markets enabling fresh raises, rising entrant count, bull backdrop, purchase_usd/coin_30d_adv meaningfully positive. Weakened/flips when: mNAV compresses toward 1.0, raises stall, or entrant count plateaus (crowding => future forced-seller overhang).

pm_gate.rationale: Flywheel ON is a structural demand tailwind that supports persistent uptrends; enable/keep long-side trend on the accumulated coins.
pm_gate.scope: BTC, ETH, SOL (whichever cohort is actively accumulating)

pm_gate.rationale: Use mNAV>1 + positive 30d net DATCo purchases as a regime prior to carry a long bias; size up while premium is high.
Track exchange-to-corporate-custody outflows as a confirming supply-sink signal; enable flow-following longs on the cohort coins.
Rotate into the treasury-stock cohort and the actively-accumulated coin during premium-funded buying phases.
pm_gate.scope: treasury-stock cohort (MSTR, MARA, BMNR, SBET) + cohort coins

pm_gate.rationale: Keep a baseline reflexivity hedge on — the flywheel embeds latent forced-seller / crowding risk that detonates on premium collapse — but do not size it up while premium is firmly >1.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (issuer_mNAV_premium > 1) AND (aggregate_DATCo_net_purchases_usd_30d > 0) AND (new_treasury_raise_usd_30d > 0) AND (coin_per_share_growth_rate > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that ENABLES long-side trend-following/momentum/directional-long on the cohort coins and as a P(up) tilt prior (regime tailwind, not a discrete entry). Best combined as a multiplier on existing trend signals rather than a standalone entry, given diffuse lag and small n.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: mNAV, 30d net purchases, and raise filings must be as-known at each rebalance — purchase 8-Ks are disclosed with a lag (often the following Monday), so do not use a buy on its trade date. p_up=1.0 reflects only 5 historical regimes all inside the 2024-25 bull and is NOT a stationary win rate — the regime can flip; never hard-code it as an unconditional long. DATCo dollar-deployment figures are third-party estimates, not audited.

signals.one_liner: While issuer mNAV>1 and DATCos are net-buying (fresh raises + rising coin-per-share), the cohort is a structural bid — keep long-side trend/momentum ON on BTC/ETH/SOL; the edge dies the instant the premium compresses to 1.0.

signals.name: Distribution / Forced Selling / mNAV-Discount Unwind (the flywheel in reverse)
signals.typical_lag: sentiment dip immediate; systemic forced-selling plays out over days-to-weeks
signals.typical_duration: single-sale dip hours-to-days; mNAV-unwind regimes persist weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: rare for outright sales (Strategy held through all of 2023-2025); systemic discount-unwind episodes clustered in late 2025
affected_scope: treasury-stock cohort (MSTR, MARA, SBET, BMNR, Metaplanet)
leading_signals: mNAV falling toward / below 1.0
CEO comments about 'conditions to sell'
treasury stock down >50% YoY while coin down less (premium gone)
debt/preferred coverage stress, covenant headlines
treasury-stock share-buyback announcements (cash drain)
'one in three treasuries below NAV' breadth
rising correlation of treasury stocks crashing together

active_when: issuer_mNAV <= 1.0 (premium gone — accretive issuance stops; STRONG signal when category leader MSTR crosses below 1.0, as on 2025-11-12)
pct_of_cohort_below_mNAV_1 >= 0.33 ('one in three treasuries below NAV' breadth threshold)
treasury_stock_drawdown_vs_coin_drawdown spread large (stock down >50% YoY while coin down less = premium fully eroded + leverage stress)
is_disclosed_corporate_sale == true (8-K sale flag) OR CEO 'conditions to sell' comments (sentiment trigger even at trivial size, cf. MSTR 32-BTC sale -> BTC -4.5% via narrative)
convert/preferred_coverage_ratio deteriorating / covenant or buyback headlines (cash-drain stress)
rising cross-correlation of treasury stocks crashing together (cohort moving as one = systemic forced-selling regime)
data_sources: mNAV trackers + cohort dashboards (Strategy mNAV, bitcointreasuries.net)
SEC EDGAR (8-K sale disclosures, covenant/buyback filings)
treasury-stock price feeds for cross-correlation calc

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Coin DOWN. Single disclosed corporate sale = modest sentiment dip (BTC ~2-5%, e.g. MSTR-32-BTC narrative -4.5%, Tesla 2022 ~-2%). Full systemic premium-collapse/forced-selling regime is the bearish tail: BTC median ~9.5% down, p75 ~31%, with treasury STOCKS far worse (SBET -89%, MSTR -54%). Headline BTC unwind episodes: -14.8% (Nov 2025 mNAV<1) and -22.9% peak-to-trough. (n=7, measured_fraction 0.45 — the best-measured archetype in the category.)
move_probability.lag: sentiment dip immediate on the headline; systemic forced-selling plays out over days-to-weeks
move_probability.duration: single-sale dip hours-to-days; mNAV-unwind regimes persist weeks-to-months
move_probability.half_life: single-sale narrative shock decays within a few days; regime-level unwind has a long half-life (weeks-to-months) until premiums rebuild or forced sellers are flushed
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: leverage in the cohort (convert/preferred coverage stress), high DATCo_holdings/circulating_supply (more supply that can be forced out), correlated cohort crash, coincident risk-off / spot-ETF outflows ($2.43B May-2026), and the symbolic leader (MSTR) being the seller. Note exchange transfers != confirmed sells (Trump Media 2,650 BTC -> BTC +0.44%) — require a sale flag or covenant stress, not just a custody move, to avoid false positives.

pm_gate.rationale: mNAV<1 / cohort-below-NAV breadth is the canonical reflexive death-spiral setup; put on/size up downside BTC protection and contagion hedges.
p_down 0.86 with a fat downside tail; tilt short the coin and especially the over-leveraged treasury stocks (highest beta to the unwind) during a confirmed regime.
Reflexive deleveraging cascades blow out funding and spike liquidations; flatten carry to avoid being run over in the washout.
Basis widens violently and financing risk rises in forced-selling regimes; cut size until the cohort stops moving as one.
Disable dip-buying mean-reversion on alts/treasury coins during an active unwind — the death-spiral keeps trending against reversion until forced sellers clear.
Flip the flywheel regime tilt: short-side trend on the cohort coins while mNAV<1 and breadth is deteriorating.
After the systemic washout exhausts (forced sellers cleared, funding reset, cohort correlation falls), enable fading the final liquidation flush for the mean-reversion bounce.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (issuer_mNAV <= 1.0) OR (pct_of_cohort_below_mNAV_1 >= 0.33) OR (is_disclosed_corporate_sale AND seller_is_leader) ; severity = (treasury_stock_drawdown_vs_coin_drawdown > 0.30) AND (cohort_crash_correlation rising)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that DISABLES long flywheel/trend/mean-reversion and ENABLES tail-hedge + short tilt; supply P(down)=0.86 as a directional prior on the coin. Gate liquidation-fade to fire only AFTER severity peaks and rolls over (don't catch the falling knife). Treat a single trivial disclosed sale as a low-severity narrative shock (~2-5% prior); reserve the deep-tail prior for the systemic-breadth branch.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: mNAV and cohort-breadth must be computed from as-of-date market caps and holdings, not restated. Critical false-positive hazard: exchange/custody TRANSFERS are not sales (Trump Media moved 2,650 BTC -> BTC +0.44%) — only is_disclosed_corporate_sale (an actual 8-K sale) or covenant stress should trip the event branch. Sales are disclosed AFTER execution, so the coin move is partly already in the tape; do not assume the full prior is forward-realizable from the disclosure timestamp. Beware regime-flip lookahead: the hand-off from accumulation to distribution is only knowable once mNAV has actually crossed 1.0.

signals.one_liner: When mNAV<1 / one-in-three treasuries below NAV, the flywheel reverses into a reflexive death-spiral: p_down 0.86, BTC -10% to -23% tail — flatten carry, disable alt mean-reversion, put on tail-hedge + short the leveraged cohort, and only fade after the washout clears.

signals.name: Narrative ignition / TVL land-grab (yield-farming, restaking points, RWA hype)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to days for the flagship token; days-to-weeks for read-across into peer tokens
signals.typical_duration: weeks to a few months for the acute pump; the narrative regime can persist 1-2 quarters
signals.recurrence: roughly one major sector-defining wave every 12-24 months (2020 DeFi Summer, 2021 Curve/L1, 2023-24 restaking, 2024 RWA)
leading_signals: sharp TVL inflow before token price moves
launch of a points/airdrop program
first major institutional validation (e.g. BlackRock BUIDL)
rising social/search interest in the meta
copycat protocols launching same week

active_when: tvl_zscore_90d > 2 AND tvl_7d_pct_change > 25% (TVL inflow leading price)
points_program_active_flag == true AND days_since_mechanism_launch <= 90
google_trends_or_social_mention_zscore > 2 over 14d for the sector meta
new_protocol_launches_per_week_in_sector >= 2 (copycats cloning the mechanic)
first_institutional_validation_flag == true (e.g. BlackRock BUIDL / JPMorgan Kinexys) for the named token

move_probability.expected_abs_move: flagship/sector governance token +200% to +800% median (p75 ~+36,650%, fair-launch outliers like YFI ~+143,000%); ETH/host-L1 DeFi-beta read-across ~+40% or flat; ONDO ~+1,200%, COMP ~+400%, SUSHI ~+200%
move_probability.lag: immediate-to-days for the flagship token; days-to-weeks for read-across into peer/sector tokens
move_probability.duration: weeks to a few months for the acute pump; the narrative regime can persist 1-2 quarters
move_probability.half_life: edge concentrated in the first weeks of ignition; decays as emissions_apy normalizes and token_price_to_tvl_ratio re-rates; largely gone once points program ends / TGE approaches
move_probability.conditioning: amplified in risk-on tape with abundant dry powder, low liquid float, active points program, and copycat launches; muted/flat in 2026-style risk-off where capital rotates INTO low-risk tokenized-Treasury RWA rather than high-beta farm tokens (RWA milestones coincided with ETH -40% YTD)

pm_gate.scope: the named governance/sector token + sector basket (DeFi/restaking/RWA peers)
pm_gate.rationale: reflexive TVL->price->emissions loop produces strong positive momentum during ignition; rotate INTO the leading sector token

pm_gate.scope: flagship token and host L1/L2 (ETH, SOL) as DeFi-beta
pm_gate.rationale: p_up 0.71, p_down 0.0 — clean asymmetric long bias on ignition

pm_gate.scope: the flagship + sector tokens during the pump
pm_gate.rationale: do not fade a reflexive narrative pump; mean-reversion fights the dominant momentum and gets run over

pm_gate.scope: sector tokens with TVL z-score spikes
pm_gate.rationale: TVL inflow leads price; on-chain flow signal is the entry trigger
ignition produces directional vol expansion suited to breakout entries

pm_gate.scope: high-beta farm tokens once token_price_to_tvl_ratio stretches and emissions normalize / TGE nears
pm_gate.rationale: late-stage marginal buyer holds the bag; trim before the sell-the-news transition

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (tvl_zscore_90d > 2) AND (tvl_7d_pct_change > 0.25) AND (points_program_active_flag == true) AND (days_since_mechanism_launch <= 90)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON momentum-rotation / directional-long / on-chain-flow / vol-breakout on the sector basket and gate OFF mean-reversion on the flagship; use as P(up)~0.71, P(down)~0.0, P(flat)~0.29 directional prior, but cap position sizing because the up-magnitude distribution is extremely fat-tailed (median ~+800% with outliers >+100,000% — do NOT size on the mean)
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: TVL and points-program flags must be timestamped point-in-time (DefiLlama snapshots, not revised). Institutional-validation and 'launch-to-peak' magnitudes are survivorship-biased and only known with hindsight — never use peak as an entry reference; use the TVL-inflow lead as the only forward-available trigger

signals.one_liner: Reflexive TVL land-grab: TVL z-score >2 + active points program -> tilt momentum/directional long the sector token (p_up 0.71, fat-tailed upside), disable mean-reversion; fades into a TGE dump.

signals.name: Points/airdrop 'sell the news' (TGE distribution dump)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours to first 7 days post-claim)
signals.typical_duration: the acute dump is days; the bleed often continues weeks-to-months as cliffs/emissions add supply
signals.recurrence: every major TGE in a hot meta — dozens per cycle; highly repeatable
leading_signals: TGE/claim date announcement
large airdrop allocation %
high FDV vs low initial float
pre-market/IOU price far above implied float value
negative perp funding pre-listing
Dune dashboards showing rapid claim+sell

active_when: days_since_tge <= 7 (acute dump window) — ACTIVE from claim open
airdrop_pct_of_supply >= 10% AND initial_float_pct <= 15% (large unlock into thin float)
fdv_to_float_ratio >= 10 (heavy implied supply overhang)
funding_rate_at_listing < 0 (pre-listing perps lean short / IOU above implied float)
pct_recipients_sold_7d rising on Dune claim+sell dashboards
INVERSION GUARD: if initial_float_pct very low AND no team/VC unlocks AND genuine product traction (HYPE-type) -> archetype may flip to squeeze
data_sources: project TGE/claim announcements + exchange listing calendars
Dune dashboards (claim + sell rate, recipient wallets)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: down case (80% of instances): median ~-72% (p25 ~-68%, p75 ~-78%, range -66.5% to -87%) from listing/ATH within weeks; chronic bleed extends (ENA -66.5%/-90.2% max DD, PENDLE -68.3%/-83.4% max DD over 12m); rare up case (20%, HYPE) ~+63% intraday to ~+5x
move_probability.lag: immediate — hours to first 7 days post-claim for the acute dump
move_probability.duration: acute dump is days; the bleed continues weeks-to-months as cliffs/emissions/VC unlocks add supply
move_probability.half_life: steepest decline in the first 7-30 days (>75% of recipients sold within 7d in the UNI archetype); supply-overhang bleed has a long tail of months
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by high airdrop_pct, low initial float into thin liquidity, negative pre-listing funding, and ongoing emission cliffs; FLIPS to bullish only when float is tiny AND there are no team/VC unlocks AND real product-market fit (HYPE) — check the inversion guard before shorting

pm_gate.scope: the airdropped token from claim open + peer farm-and-dump tokens in the same meta
pm_gate.rationale: p_down 0.80 with median ~-72%; recipients with ~100% profit basis dump into thin launch liquidity

pm_gate.scope: TGE/claim events with high airdrop_pct + low float + negative funding
pm_gate.rationale: this is the canonical scheduled supply-shock catalyst trade

pm_gate.scope: the airdropped token in the first 7-30 days
pm_gate.rationale: do not buy listing FOMO — you are the marginal bag-holder absorbing recipient sells
launch prints are inflated IOU/futures noise, not durable momentum
funding is already deeply negative pre-listing; carry is crowded and the spot leg is in freefall — widen stops or stand aside

pm_gate.scope: any short if inversion-guard trips (tiny float + no VC unlocks + product traction, HYPE-type)
pm_gate.rationale: 20% of cases squeeze hard (+5x); cover shorts when the structural setup matches the counter-example

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_tge <= 30) AND (airdrop_pct_of_supply >= 0.10) AND (initial_float_pct <= 0.15) AND (fdv_to_float_ratio >= 10) AND NOT (initial_float_pct < 0.03 AND vc_unlock_flag == false AND product_traction_flag == true)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON directional-short / event-driven on the token and peers; use as P(down)~0.80, P(up)~0.20, P(flat)~0.0 prior. The NOT clause encodes the HYPE inversion guard — exclude tiny-float / no-VC / product-fit launches from the short prior
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: funding_rate_at_listing and pct_recipients_sold_7d must be taken intraday point-in-time, not end-of-window. Many cited drawdowns are ATH-to-trough (look-ahead) — backtest entries must reference the listing/claim open price, not the post-hoc ATH; FDV/float ratios revise as unlocks publish, use the schedule known at TGE

signals.one_liner: TGE sell-the-news: high airdrop% into low float + negative funding -> short the token and peers from claim open (p_down 0.80, median ~-72%); cover if it's a tiny-float/no-VC/product-fit HYPE-type squeeze.

signals.name: Vote-bribe / liquidity wars (Curve wars, veTokenomics)
signals.typical_lag: days-to-weeks during accumulation; the structural decay plays out over many months
signals.typical_duration: the war phase lasts months; token decay persists for years post-peak
signals.recurrence: the canonical instance was 2021-22; the veTokenomics template recurs across protocols (Balancer, Velodrome, etc.) but rarely at the same scale
leading_signals: rising bribe APRs
increasing lock ratios / falling liquid float
a new protocol entering the war (buying votes)
meta-governance TVL inflows (Convex)

active_when: bribe_apr rising AND > stablecoin baseline yield (war phase: lockers paid to direct votes)
vetoken_lock_ratio / token_locked_pct_of_supply rising (falling liquid float)
convex_share_of_crv rising AND meta-governance TVL inflows accelerating (new protocol entering the war)
bribe_market_volume_weekly making new highs
DECAY/SHORT side: emissions_inflation_rate high AND bribe_apr rolling over / lock_ratio plateauing (war ending, structural decline begins)
data_sources: bribe marketplaces (Votium, Hidden Hand) for bribe_apr + volume

move_probability.expected_abs_move: war/accumulation phase up case: meta-governance token (CVX) ~+950% to +2,300% launch-to-peak (median ~+1,625%); structural-decay phase down case: ~-90%+ peak-to-trough over the following year
move_probability.lag: days-to-weeks during the bribe-driven accumulation phase; the structural decay plays out over many months
move_probability.duration: the war phase lasts months; token decay persists for years post-peak
move_probability.half_life: the bullish edge lives only while bribe_apr and lock_ratio are RISING; once they plateau/roll over the regime flips and a multi-month decay half-life dominates
move_probability.conditioning: bullish while bribe APRs rise, lock ratios climb, and a new protocol is actively buying votes; bearish once emissions inflate supply faster than bribes can absorb and bribe markets normalize — the same token is a long in phase 1 and a structural short in phase 2

pm_gate.scope: meta-governance token (CVX) + emission-control token (CRV) during the rising-bribe accumulation phase
pm_gate.rationale: rising bribe APR + falling liquid float bids the token up reflexively (50% up-case median ~+1,625%)
lock-ratio and bribe-volume on-chain metrics are the leading entry/exit signal for both phases

pm_gate.scope: the same meta-governance token once bribe_apr rolls over and emissions_inflation_rate dominates
pm_gate.rationale: structural decay leg is ~-90%+; flip from long to short on the phase change
persistent reflexive bid creates tradeable medium-term momentum
emissions-driven supply inflation makes dip-buying a falling knife; do not mean-revert structural decline

backtest_gate.gate_expression: long_active = (d_bribe_apr_14d > 0) AND (d_lock_ratio_14d > 0) AND (bribe_market_volume_weekly_zscore > 1); short_active = (d_bribe_apr_14d < 0) AND (emissions_inflation_rate > token_demand_growth) AND (lock_ratio_plateau_flag == true)
backtest_gate.usage: Two-state gate: long_active -> enable directional-long/momentum on the meta-governance token (P(up) prior); short_active -> enable directional-short and disable mean-reversion (P(down) prior, decay leg). p_up/p_down are 0.50/0.50 unconditionally, so the bribe-trend and emissions features are what resolve direction — do not trade direction-blind
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: bribe_apr, lock ratios and Convex share are on-chain and available point-in-time, but n_instances=2 (low) and the up/down split is a phase artifact, not a coin flip at any single time — the gate MUST condition on whether bribes are rising vs rolling over. Peak magnitudes are launch-to-peak (look-ahead); never use the peak as an entry reference

signals.one_liner: Curve-wars veTokenomics: rising bribe APR + lock ratio -> long the meta-governance token (CVX ~+1,625% median); when bribes roll over and emissions inflate, flip short (~-90% decay). Phase-dependent, n=2 (low confidence).

signals.name: DeFi reflexive deleveraging / contagion (exploits, founder-collateral, yield unwind)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to hours) for the levered token; hours-to-days for contagion read-across
signals.typical_duration: acute drop is hours-to-days; sentiment/TVL recovery can take weeks-to-months
signals.recurrence: multiple times per cycle — exploits and forced unwinds are frequent in DeFi
leading_signals: a single large borrow position near liquidation (e.g. founder collateral)
stablecoin/LST depeg starting
exploit/hack headline
spiking lending utilization
TVL outflow acceleration
negative funding flush

active_when: exploit/hack headline on a DeFi protocol OR oracle_price_gap detected
stablecoin_peg_deviation > 1% OR LST/LRT depeg starting
protocol_tvl_drop_24h < -10% (TVL outflow acceleration)
largest_borrow_position_collateral_ratio approaching liquidation threshold (e.g. founder/whale collateral) AND token_collateral_concentration high
lending_utilization_rate spiking toward 100% (withdrawals blocked)
perp_funding_spike (negative flush) AND exchange_netflow_zscore > 2 (coins moving to sell)
data_sources: stablecoin/LST peg oracles (Chainlink, Curve pool ratios)
security feeds (exploit headlines, mempool/oracle gap monitors)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: directly affected/levered token ~-13% to -25% in 24h (sample median ~-14%, range -7% to -51%; ONDO -51% as outlier); sector contagion read-across ~-5% to -15%; intra-event max drawdowns far deeper (AAVE -17.9% on the KelpDAO cascade; 12m max DDs ENA -90%, ONDO -80%)
move_probability.lag: immediate (minutes to hours) for the levered/exploited token; hours-to-days for contagion read-across into correlated lending/LST/LRT tokens
move_probability.duration: acute drop is hours-to-days; sentiment/TVL recovery can take weeks-to-months
move_probability.half_life: the cascade itself is minutes-to-hours (reflexive liquidation loop); the washout bottom typically prints within 1-3 days, after which a fade/recovery window opens
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by recursive LST/LRT collateral (rehypothecation analog — KelpDAO rsETH cascaded $13B+ DeFi-wide), concentrated founder/whale borrows, high lending utilization, and thin liquidity; contagion worst when the shocked collateral is widely cross-pledged

pm_gate.scope: DeFi sector basket + correlated LST/LRT tokens at the first depeg/exploit signal
pm_gate.rationale: p_down 1.0; reflexive cascade + contagion warrants immediate downside protection across the sector

pm_gate.scope: the exploited/levered token and lending-protocol governance tokens (AAVE/MKR/CRV)
pm_gate.rationale: forced liquidations sell into thin liquidity; clean bearish edge during the flush

pm_gate.scope: any carry on the affected token / sector
pm_gate.rationale: funding flushes negative violently and the spot collateral is liquidating — carry blows up in a deleveraging event

pm_gate.scope: alts and DeFi tokens during the acute cascade
pm_gate.rationale: catching the falling knife mid-liquidation-loop is a classic blow-up; wait for the washout

pm_gate.scope: the washed-out token AFTER the cascade exhausts (TVL drop decelerates, funding resets, no remaining large borrow near liquidation)
pm_gate.rationale: post-washout snap-back; fade the over-extension once forced selling is done (HYPE-type +105% net recoveries show the bounce magnitude)

pm_gate.scope: whole book exposure to DeFi/LST sector
pm_gate.rationale: realized vol spikes; cut gross to hold risk budget constant

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (exploit_headline_flag == true OR stablecoin_peg_deviation > 0.01 OR oracle_price_gap == true) AND (protocol_tvl_drop_24h < -0.10 OR perp_funding_spike == true OR largest_borrow_position_collateral_ratio < liquidation_buffer)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON tail-hedge/directional-short/vol-targeting-cut and gate OFF funding-carry + mean-reversion on the affected token and DeFi/LST sector during the cascade; then gate ON liquidation-fade only AFTER washout (tvl_drop_24h decelerating AND no large borrow near liquidation). Use as P(down)~1.0 prior for the acute window
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: exploit headlines, peg deviations and on-chain liquidation proximity are available in near-real-time, but the 'washout complete' condition is only knowable with a lag — do NOT enable liquidation-fade until TVL-drop deceleration and funding-reset are confirmed point-in-time. Cited 12m max drawdowns are full-window (look-ahead); backtest the 24h-72h cascade window, not the post-hoc bottom

signals.one_liner: DeFi deleveraging/contagion: exploit/depeg + TVL flush + liquidation proximity -> tail-hedge + short the levered token, flatten carry, disable mean-reversion (p_down 1.0, -13% to -25% 24h); enable liquidation-fade only after the washout.

signals.name: Acute Insolvency / Bank-Run Freeze
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours — the token gaps down within minutes of the trigger; BTC/broad-market reacts within hours to 1-2 days
signals.typical_duration: Token impact is permanent (near-total loss). Broad-market acute drop plays out over 3-10 days, with a depressed regime lasting weeks to months.
signals.recurrence: Episodic but recurring across every cycle — roughly one major instance per bear-market liquidity crunch (2014 Gox, 2022 Celsius/FTX). Smaller exchange freezes occur more frequently.
affected_scope: ecosystem tokens tied to the failed entity
leading_signals: Leaked balance sheet showing native-token concentration (CoinDesk's FTX/Alameda report on 2022-11-02)
A large rival publicly announcing it will dump its holdings of the platform's token (CZ's 2022-11-06 tweet)
Anomalous exchange outflows / large BTC moving off the platform before the halt
Token trading at a discount on the affected venue vs. other exchanges
Withdrawal delays / 'temporary pause due to extreme market conditions' language
Negative funding and rising borrow rates on the token

active_when: withdrawal_halt_event_flag == true on a top-20-by-volume exchange OR lender
exchange_token_price_drawdown_24h <= -25% AND (proof_of_reserves_gap_flag == true OR exchange_token_to_circulating_collateral_ratio > 0.5)
exchange_btc_netflow_zscore > 2 (net deposits) OR < -2 (panic withdrawals) over 24h on the named venue
social_volume_spike_zscore > 3 on insolvency/bankruptcy/withdrawal-pause mentions for the named entity
funding_rate_negative_extreme_flag == true AND open_interest_drop_pct_24h > 20% on the exchange token
cross-venue price gap: token/quote on the affected venue at >5% discount to other exchanges (Gox/FTX premium-discount signature)
data_sources: CEX REST/websocket tickers (per-venue last price for cross-venue discount)
on-chain analytics (Arkham/Nansen/CryptoQuant exchange netflows + PoR wallet balances)
news/headline feed (CoinDesk, exchange status pages, official halt notices)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Platform/exchange token: 70-90% (median 83% for FTT, near-total permanent loss). BTC: 8-23% over the acute window (median 23.5%, p25 23.5%). Closely-tied ecosystem coins (e.g. SOL/Solana-ecosystem under FTX): 50-64% (median 64%). Overall down-move distribution median 36%, p25-p75 23.5-64%, range 3-90%.
move_probability.lag: Immediate to hours for the token (gaps down within minutes of the halt/trigger); BTC and broad market react within hours to 1-2 days
move_probability.duration: Token impact permanent (near-total loss). Broad-market acute drop plays out over 3-10 days, then a depressed regime lasting weeks to months
move_probability.half_life: Broad-market shock half-life ~3-5 days; the named token never recovers. Liquidation-fade edge window opens only after the washout (peak panic + OI flush)
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: high prior leverage (elevated aggregate OI), bear-market liquidity crunch, native-token-collateralized balance sheet, a credible rival publicly dumping the token. Dampened/flipped if the entity survives as a going concern (Binance-DOJ counter-example: token sells off but BTC stays flat, no contagion)

pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0 with 8-23% BTC downside in the acute window; buy downside protection / put-spreads at the first credible halt or leaked-balance-sheet signal

pm_gate.scope: the named exchange token and tightly-tied ecosystem coins
pm_gate.rationale: token median -83% and ecosystem -64%; the highest-conviction short in the taxonomy once the halt/PoR-gap fires

pm_gate.scope: the affected token and any positions custodied/margined on the affected venue
pm_gate.rationale: funding goes deeply negative and the venue itself is the counterparty risk; flatten to avoid being trapped behind a withdrawal freeze

pm_gate.scope: any basis/cash-and-carry legs with collateral on the failing venue
pm_gate.rationale: counterparty-risk repricing makes venue-resident collateral unrecoverable; close before the freeze
this is a permanent repricing, not a dip; reversion logic catches a falling knife on near-zero tokens

pm_gate.scope: the named token and alts on all venues; especially anything quoted on the affected venue
pm_gate.rationale: inventory risk explodes, spreads gap, and venue-resident inventory may be frozen; pull quotes or widen drastically

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH only, AFTER the OI flush and peak social-panic
pm_gate.rationale: the acute washout overshoots; fade BTC/ETH liquidation spikes once open_interest_drop and funding extremes confirm capitulation, not during the initial gap
acute counterparty-risk repricing; cut beta exposure into the freeze

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = withdrawal_halt_event_flag AND (exchange_token_price_drawdown_24h <= -0.25) AND (proof_of_reserves_gap_flag OR exchange_token_to_circulating_collateral_ratio > 0.5 OR social_volume_spike_zscore > 3)
backtest_gate.usage: Hard ON gate: when active, disable mean-reversion/long-beta and funding/basis carry on or near the venue, enable tail-hedge and directional-short on the named token; apply P(direction) prior P(down)=1.0 for the token (expect -70 to -90%) and P(down|BTC)~0.85 with 8-23% magnitude over 1-10 days. For liquidation-fade, only enable the long-the-washout sub-rule after open_interest_drop_pct_24h>20% AND funding_rate_negative_extreme_flag clears.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Halt timestamps and bankruptcy filings must be aligned to the public-announcement minute, not the filing date — the price already moved on the leak/rumor (CoinDesk FTT report Nov-2 preceded the Nov-8 halt).
