Do not use proof_of_reserves or final creditor-shortfall figures that were only known weeks later. Cross-venue discount is observable in real time but survivorship-prone (delisted tokens vanish from feeds).

signals.one_liner: Exchange/lender freezes withdrawals: short the native token (near-total loss), hedge BTC tail (-8 to -23%), flatten any carry/collateral on the venue, and only fade the BTC washout after the OI flush.

signals.name: Contagion Cascade / Counterparty Domino
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks — the first default is acute, but the full cascade unfolds over 1-6 months as each linked entity fails in sequence.
signals.typical_duration: Months. The 2022 cascade ran from the May Luna shock through the November FTX failure and into the January 2023 Genesis bankruptcy — roughly 8 months of grinding decline / suppressed prices.
signals.recurrence: Once per major leverage build-up / bear cycle. The 2022 episode is the canonical full cascade; isolated defaults that don't chain (single fund blow-ups) are more frequent.
leading_signals: A large fund missing a margin call / a public notice of default issued to it (Voyager's default notice to 3AC, Jun 2022)
A widening stETH or GBTC discount (forced sellers exiting locked collateral)
A 'systemically important' token already collapsing (LUNA in May 2022 preceded the lender failures)
Lenders cutting yields / pausing new deposits / seeking emergency lines (Celsius, BlockFi raising rescue capital)
Falling aggregate open interest as leverage is purged
Rumors of insolvency clustering across multiple named firms within days

active_when: lender_default_event_count_trailing_30d >= 2 (clustered named defaults within days)
stETH_discount_to_eth_pct > 4% OR GBTC_discount_to_nav_pct widening past its trailing 90d max (forced sellers exiting locked collateral)
aggregate_perp_open_interest_drop_pct > 25% over the cascade window (leverage being purged)
a 'systemically important' token already collapsed in the prior 30d (e.g. LUNA-style) AND realized_volatility_30d_zscore > 2
cross_lender_exposure_graph_centrality flags a high-centrality node in distress (a fund/lender many others are exposed to)
stablecoin_market_cap_change negative (net redemptions) AND rolling_drawdown_from_cycle_high deepening week-over-week
data_sources: Grayscale/secondary GBTC quotes for NAV discount
news/default-notice feed + curated lender-exposure graph (manually maintained edge list)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Conditional on a measurable down leg: median 34% (p25 18%, p75 39.5%, range 2-45%). BTC single-event reactions are often muted/flat once priced in (median 2.5% on later dominoes), but full-cascade peak-to-trough BTC -50 to -65%, ETH/large alts -70 to -80%. ETH single-shock observed -45%. The depth comes from compounding multiple shocks, not any one event.
move_probability.lag: Days to weeks — first default is acute, full cascade unfolds over 1-6 months as each linked entity fails in sequence
move_probability.duration: Months. The 2022 cascade ran ~8 months (May Luna -> Nov FTX -> Jan 2023 Genesis) of grinding decline / suppressed prices
move_probability.half_life: Long and lumpy — no single half-life; each new domino re-shocks but later dominoes are increasingly priced-in (Voyager, BlockFi, Genesis were near-flat on the day). The regime persists until OI is fully purged and stETH/GBTC discounts normalize
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: opaque rehypothecation, a systemically-important token already down, widening collateral discounts, high cross-lender graph centrality. Note the 50/50 down/flat split: individual named defaults are often already discounted, so the edge is regime-positioning, not event-timing

pm_gate.scope: BTC + ETH + broad book, held on as a multi-month overlay
pm_gate.rationale: cascade regime with -50 to -65% BTC potential over months; maintain rolling downside hedges through the entire deleveraging window
persistent grinding multi-month downtrend favors short trend exposure; this is the regime trend-following is built to capture
tokens of exposed lenders and alts bleed faster (btc_dominance rises in contagion)
funding whipsaws and counterparty/venue solvency is in question; cut size, avoid concentration on any one lender/venue
collateral discounts (stETH, GBTC) blow out and forced unwinds make these basis legs the epicenter of the spiral
reflexive deleveraging means dips keep compounding; reversion repeatedly catches falling knives over the multi-month grind

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH only, on individual cascade-event washouts after OI flush
pm_gate.rationale: each domino creates an over-shoot; fade the BTC/ETH liquidation spike on confirmed capitulation, but size small given the regime is structurally bearish
realized_volatility_30d_zscore>2 forces de-grossing under vol-target rules; let the overlay cut exposure

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (lender_default_event_count_trailing_30d >= 2) AND ((stETH_discount_to_eth_pct > 0.04) OR (GBTC_discount_to_nav_pct > trailing_90d_max)) AND (aggregate_perp_open_interest_drop_pct > 0.25) AND (rolling_drawdown_from_cycle_high deepening)
backtest_gate.usage: Regime ON gate (multi-month), not an event-timer: when active, tilt trend-following short, disable alt mean-reversion, enable tail-hedge, reduce carry size. P(direction) prior: P(down)=0.5 / P(flat)=0.5 for any single named-default headline (DON'T bet directionally on the event itself — half are already priced in), but P(down) for the cumulative regime path is high with 34% conditional leg magnitude. Use as a gate first, prior second.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: The cascade is only obvious in hindsight — point-in-time you only know defaults that have already been publicly announced; cross_lender_exposure_graph_centrality must be built from contemporaneously-known exposures (3AC->Voyager was public via the default notice; many links were unknown until bankruptcy filings). Do NOT use the final cascade depth or the full list of failed firms as features. GBTC/stETH discounts are real-time and clean.

signals.one_liner: Counterparty-domino regime (clustered lender defaults + widening stETH/GBTC discounts + OI purge): hold a multi-month tail/short-trend tilt, disable alt mean-reversion, but don't bet on any single default headline (50/50 already priced in).

signals.name: Estate Distribution / Repayment Supply Overhang
signals.typical_lag: Anticipatory — dips occur on the announcement/on-chain-movement, often days to weeks BEFORE actual distribution; repayment dates are frequently delayed, resetting the overhang.
signals.typical_duration: A persistent multi-month overhang punctuated by sharp 1-3 day dips on each fresh trigger; individual dips fade within days as feared selling fails to fully materialize.
signals.recurrence: Specific to large defunct-exchange estates (Mt Gox is the dominant example, ~140,000 BTC). Recurs each time the estate moves coins or a deadline approaches; the Mt Gox repayment deadline has been repeatedly pushed (most recently to October 2026).
affected_scope: the named coin held by the estate
leading_signals: Trustee announces a repayment start date or deadline (Mt Gox notices)
On-chain trackers flag movement of dormant estate wallets (e.g., $739M / $1B Mt Gox BTC transfers)
Creditor-claim secondary prices rising (claim buyers front-running)
Coinciding overhang from other forced sellers (German government BTC sales in summer 2024)

active_when: estate_wallet_onchain_movement_flag == true (dormant estate wallet moves, e.g. Mt Gox $739M-$1B transfers)
days_to_scheduled_repayment_date <= 30 (approaching a trustee-announced repayment start/deadline)
repayment_announcement_event_flag == true (trustee announces a date/deadline)
btc_exchange_inflow_from_known_estate_addresses_zscore > 2 (estate coins actually arriving at exchanges)
estate_btc_as_pct_of_circulating_supply material (Mt Gox ~140k BTC) AND coinciding forced-seller overhang (e.g. government BTC sales)
creditor_claim_secondary_market_price rising (claim buyers front-running the distribution)
data_sources: on-chain trackers tagging known estate wallets (Arkham, Glassnode, CryptoQuant entity labels)
trustee/court repayment-schedule notices (Mt Gox rehabilitation announcements)
spot-ETF flow data (negative flows accompanied the July 2024 dip)
Coinglass liquidation/OI for the dip mechanics

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC: 6-9% per trigger (median 7%, p25 6.5%, p75 9%, range 6-11%); the canonical July 2024 move was ~-6% 24h. ETH co-moved ~-11%. Mostly a drag/resistance rather than a deep crash. Some triggers fade to ~flat (~1%) as feared selling fails to materialize.
move_probability.lag: Anticipatory — dips occur on the announcement / on-chain movement, often days to weeks BEFORE actual distribution; repayment dates are frequently delayed, resetting the overhang
move_probability.duration: Persistent multi-month overhang punctuated by sharp 1-3 day dips on each fresh trigger; individual dips fade within days as feared selling under-delivers
move_probability.half_life: Per-dip half-life ~1-3 days (sell-the-news, then recovery); the macro overhang persists for months but with diminishing impact as the market habituates
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: large estate as % of supply (Mt Gox), coinciding forced sellers (German government 2024), rising claim secondary prices. Dampened by: repeated deadline delays (overhang fatigue), staggered/partial distributions, creditors who hold. A non-collapse regulatory resolution that leaves the entity intact (Binance-DOJ) is NOT bearish for BTC — only the entity's own token dips

pm_gate.scope: BTC (and BCH for Mt Gox-specific events) — tactical, around the trigger only
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0 with a clean 6-9% BTC down move on the anticipatory dip; a defined-risk short into the on-chain-movement / repayment-date trigger

pm_gate.scope: BTC around scheduled repayment dates and tracked estate-wallet movements
pm_gate.rationale: this is a telegraphed, calendar-anchored sell-the-news event tailor-made for event-driven positioning
realized selling under-delivers vs fear; the dip reliably fades within days, so buy-the-dip reversion has positive expectancy post-trigger
known overhang caps upside; trim beta ahead of the dip, re-add after it fades
the move is bounded (6-9%) and mean-reverts; breakout-chasing into a sell-the-news dip is low-quality, fade rather than chase
this is a drag/resistance, not a systemic crash; a modest bounded dip does not warrant standing up tail protection

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (repayment_announcement_event_flag OR estate_wallet_onchain_movement_flag OR (days_to_scheduled_repayment_date <= 30)) AND (estate_btc_as_pct_of_circulating_supply > 0.005)
backtest_gate.usage: Tactical ON gate around the trigger: enable event-driven + tilt-short BTC for the 1-3 day window, trim directional-long. Then FLIP to enable mean-reversion / re-add long after the dip (the sell-the-news fades). P(direction) prior: P(down)=1.0 for the immediate trigger but bounded magnitude (6-9% BTC); pair with a short-horizon reversion prior for the recovery. Do not gate tail-hedge on this.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Repayment DATES are repeatedly delayed (Mt Gox deadline pushed to Oct 2026) — never assume a scheduled date is the realized distribution date; use the announcement/on-chain-movement timestamp, which is what actually moves price. estate_btc_as_pct_of_circulating_supply and wallet labels are point-in-time available; creditor_claim_secondary_market_price is sparsely observed. Beware conflating the bearish estate-overhang with the neutral-for-BTC non-collapse resolution (Binance-DOJ) — gate the latter out: it dips only the entity token, not BTC.

signals.one_liner: Defunct-exchange estate moves coins or a repayment date nears: a telegraphed, bounded BTC sell-the-news dip (6-9%) that reliably fades within days — short the trigger, then buy the dip; don't hedge tail.

signals.name: DeFi protocol exploit (governance/native token crash)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours (price reacts within minutes of the exploit tx being flagged)
signals.typical_duration: days to weeks; partial recovery if funds are returned/socialized, permanent impairment if protocol dies
signals.recurrence: very high — dozens per year across DeFi; the single most frequent crypto bearish catalyst
affected_scope: directly composable protocols (lenders/pools exposed to the victim)
leading_signals: large anomalous outflow from protocol contracts (on-chain netflow spike)
security-firm/whitehat alert tweets before price fully reacts
TVL collapse on DeFiLlama
spike in DEX sell volume of the governance token
founder over-collateralized loan at liquidation risk (e.g. Curve/Aave)
third-party security-risk ratings / 'tokens to avoid' lists flagging the protocol (e.g. Mudrex)

active_when: contract_outflow_usd_24h spikes anomalously (single-tx or clustered drain >$5M from protocol contracts) OR tvl_change_pct_24h <= -20% on DeFiLlama
governance_token_dex_sell_volume_zscore > 3 over rolling 24h
security_risk_rating_flag = true (whitehat/security-firm alert tweet or third-party 'tokens to avoid' list naming the protocol) within 24h
time_since_exploit_tx_minutes < 4320 (within 72h of the exploit tx) AND is_funds_returned_flag = false
contagion sub-trigger: founder_loan_health_ratio < 1.2 (e.g. Curve/Egorov Aave loan) OR an LRT/collateral asset used cross-protocol (e.g. rsETH on Aave) is the drained asset
data_sources: on-chain netflow / contract outflow (Etherscan/Solscan, Nansen, Arkham)
security-firm alert feeds (PeckShield, BlockSec, Cyvers, rekt.news)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: hacked protocol governance token: median ~28.8% down (p25 16%, p75 46%, max ~50%); contagion lender directly exposed (e.g. AAVE) ~17-18%; sympathy/sector DeFi tokens single digits to mid-teens; the L1 the protocol sits on is usually near-flat (SOL -0.5%, ETH +2.1%) unless the L1 itself is implicated
move_probability.lag: immediate to hours — price reacts within minutes of the exploit tx being flagged on-chain or by whitehats
move_probability.duration: days to weeks; partial recovery if funds returned/socialized (EUL bounced as hacker returned funds), permanent impairment if protocol dies (MULTI)
move_probability.half_life: sharp move largely complete in 24-72h; bottom-fish bounce/recovery edge lives ~1-2 weeks and is gated on is_funds_returned_flag
move_probability.conditioning: magnitude amplified by: higher protocol_tvl_pct_drained, governance token mcap still tethered to fee revenue, leveraged token longs liquidating, LRT/collateral contagion to lenders. Dampened by: token mcap already detached from pool TVL (BAL only -4.5%), rapid fund return, deep-pocket bailout ('DeFi United')

pm_gate.scope: the hacked protocol's own governance/native token, immediately on flag
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0, median ~29% drawdown within 72h; the most direct and reliable casualty

pm_gate.scope: hacked token and directly-exposed composable protocols (lenders/pools holding the drained asset)
pm_gate.rationale: repricing to 'damaged-goods' valuation is a regime break, not noise; reversion logic will knife-catch

pm_gate.scope: the hacked token AND same-sector sympathy names, only AFTER the forced-liquidation washout and once is_funds_returned_flag or a credible bailout is announced
pm_gate.rationale: forced-liquidation overshoot + socialized-loss/fund-return creates a mean-reverting bounce (EUL, Cetus recovery)
avoid catching a permanently impaired protocol
funding/basis unstable during the crash; carry edge swamped by directional gap risk
contract outflow / DEX sell-volume z-score is the live driver; on-chain flow models are the cleanest entry timer

pm_gate.scope: sector DeFi basket if contagion vector present (founder loan, LRT collateral)
pm_gate.rationale: reflexive deleveraging can cascade across composable protocols

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (contract_outflow_usd_24h >= 5e6 OR tvl_change_pct_24h <= -0.20) AND (governance_token_dex_sell_volume_zscore > 3) AND (time_since_exploit_tx_minutes < 4320) AND is_funds_returned_flag == false
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an on/off gate: SHORT/disable-reversion on the hacked token and disable mean-reversion on directly-composable protocols. Apply as a strong P(direction) prior P(down|defi-exploit) ~= 1.0 on the victim token over 0-72h. Flip to a long/liquidation-fade gate when is_funds_returned_flag turns true or backer_bailout_announced_flag fires. Scale short conviction by protocol_tvl_pct_drained and inverse to governance-token-mcap/pool-TVL ratio (skip if mcap already detached, cf. BAL).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Use only the exploit-tx timestamp and on-chain outflow/TVL that are observable at that block — do NOT use the final reported loss figure or recovery outcome, which are revealed days later. is_funds_returned_flag and any bailout flag must be timestamped at announcement, not backfilled to the exploit date. measured_fraction is only 0.29 (many instances pre-date the CoinGecko free-tier window), so magnitude stats lean on web-sourced points; treat magnitude as a noisier prior than direction.

signals.one_liner: DeFi exploit: short/avoid the hacked protocol's own token (p_down~1.0, median ~29% in 72h); fade the washout only after funds-returned or a bailout — L1 underneath stays ~flat.

signals.name: Cross-chain bridge exploit (ecosystem L1/token drag-down)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to a few hours
signals.typical_duration: days; bounce often once a backer recapitalizes, but ecosystem narrative damage can persist weeks
signals.recurrence: high in 2021-2022 (bridge era); structurally fewer as bridges hardened, but still recurs
leading_signals: anomalous bridge contract drain (large single mint/withdraw)
wrapped-asset depeg vs underlying
ecosystem TVL outflow
backer/foundation 'we will make users whole' statement (marks the bounce)
spike in L1 perp funding flipping negative

active_when: anomalous single-tx bridge mint/withdraw detected: bridge_tvl_pct_drained spikes OR a mint event far exceeds legitimate circulating supply (infinite-mint pattern, e.g. 1B fake DOT / 1Q MAPO)
wrapped_asset_depeg_bps > 200 vs underlying (wrapped/bridged asset trades below peg)
ecosystem_tvl_outflow_usd spikes on DeFiLlama for the chain the bridge serves
l1_perp_funding_zscore < -2 (funding flips sharply negative on the ecosystem L1 perp)
backer_bailout_announced_flag = true marks the bounce (Jump for Wormhole, Sky Mavis raise for Ronin)
data_sources: bridge contract monitors / on-chain mint-withdraw alerts (Arkham, Nansen, security-firm feeds)
DEX/CEX price of wrapped vs native asset for depeg

move_probability.expected_abs_move: ecosystem L1 / affected token: median ~15.2% down (p25 11.2%, p75 21.5%). Bimodal by what was hit: a real ecosystem-L1 drag (RON ~23%, AXS ~17%, SOL ~13.5%, DOT ~7.7%) vs an infinite-mint of a thin bridged/governance token where the token itself is wiped (MAPO ~96%) but the native L1 is barely touched (native DOT only -4.8%)
move_probability.lag: immediate to a few hours
move_probability.duration: days; bounce often once a backer recapitalizes (Jump/Wormhole within ~24h), but ecosystem narrative damage can persist weeks (AXS bled for a week)
move_probability.half_life: initial drop in 24-48h; the recover/bounce edge keys on backer_bailout_announced_flag and decays over days to a couple of weeks
move_probability.conditioning: magnitude scales with bridge_tvl_pct_drained and how core the bridge is to the ecosystem. CRITICAL discriminator: if only a thin BRIDGED/wrapped slice is minted (shallow liquidity) the price damage is contained to that wrapper and the NATIVE L1 barely moves — do not short the native L1 on an infinite-mint of its bridged wrapper. Deep-pocket backer bailout caps downside and seeds the bounce

pm_gate.scope: the ecosystem L1 token ONLY when the bridge is core ecosystem infra and native collateral is genuinely at risk (Ronin->RON/AXS, Wormhole->SOL)
pm_gate.rationale: ecosystem token is the tradable casualty, median ~15% drawdown on solvency/trust fear

pm_gate.scope: the thin bridged/governance token in an infinite-mint event (MAPO, bridged-DOT slice) — short the wrapper, NOT the native L1
pm_gate.rationale: infinite-mint wipes the wrapper (-96% MAPO) while native L1 stays near-flat; mis-scoping shorts the wrong asset

pm_gate.scope: affected ecosystem L1 token and in-ecosystem dApp tokens during the first 24-48h
pm_gate.rationale: sentiment-shock + capital flight is a regime break; reversion will catch the falling knife

pm_gate.scope: ecosystem L1 token AFTER backer_bailout_announced_flag fires
pm_gate.rationale: recapitalization marks the bounce; Wormhole/SOL and Ronin both recovered post-backstop
funding gaps deeply negative (l1_perp_funding_zscore<-2); carry overwhelmed by gap risk
bridge drain + depeg + TVL outflow are the live, computable entry signals
bridge exploits are ecosystem-local, not market-wide; broad tail hedge usually unwarranted unless the bridge is BTC/ETH-systemic

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (bridge_tvl_pct_drained >= 0.10 OR infinite_mint_detected == true) AND (wrapped_asset_depeg_bps > 200 OR ecosystem_tvl_outflow_usd >= 5e7); short_target = (native_collateral_at_risk ? ecosystem_l1_token : bridged_wrapper_token)
backtest_gate.usage: On/off gate to SHORT/disable-reversion on the correctly-scoped casualty. Apply P(down|bridge-exploit) ~= 1.0 over 0-48h. Branch the short target on whether native collateral is at risk vs a thin wrapper infinite-mint. Flip to a liquidation-fade/long gate when backer_bailout_announced_flag == true.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: At decision time you know the on-chain drain/mint and the wrapped-asset depeg, but NOT the final loss figure or whether a backer will make users whole — backer_bailout_announced_flag must be timestamped at the actual announcement (Jump's recap was ~24h later). Do not assume the bounce point in-sample. Only 6 instances and measured_fraction 0.25; the 96% MAPO outlier and contained-DOT cases mean magnitude is heavily regime-dependent — gate on scope before sizing.

signals.one_liner: Bridge exploit: short the correctly-scoped casualty (core-infra->ecosystem L1 ~15%; infinite-mint->the thin wrapper, can be -96%), not the native L1; fade only after a backer bailout.

signals.name: Centralized exchange hack (market-wide sentiment shock, mean-reverting)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes) for the headline; full sentiment effect over hours
signals.typical_duration: hours to a few days; rapid recovery once solvency is reassured
signals.recurrence: medium — a handful of major CEX hacks per cycle (Mt. Gox, KuCoin, Bybit), but each is large
leading_signals: abnormal large outflow from a known exchange cold wallet
exchange pauses withdrawals
spike in stablecoin inflows / flight to BTC dominance
stolen-asset (e.g. ETH) being moved to mixers/DEXs
exchange CEO 'all funds are safe / loss covered' statement (marks the bottom)

active_when: exchange_cold_wallet_outflow_usd: abnormal large outflow from a known exchange cold/hot wallet (>$100M) flagged on-chain
withdrawals_paused_flag = true (exchange halts withdrawals)
stablecoin_exchange_inflow_zscore > 2 and/or btc_dominance_change_24h rising (flight to BTC/stables)
stolen_asset_to_mixer_volume spikes (stolen ETH/ERC-20 routed to mixers/DEXs)
loss_socialized_flag = true / exchange CEO 'all funds safe / loss covered' statement marks the bottom
data_sources: on-chain exchange-wallet trackers (Arkham, Nansen, ZachXBT, Whale Alert)
exchange status pages / official comms for withdrawal pauses & solvency statements
perp funding & OI (Coinglass) for risk-off confirmation

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC/ETH same-day ~2-6% (down-leg median across instances ~4.5%, p75 ~12% when the hack lands on an already risk-off macro tape); BTC per-asset median ~11.8% and ETH ~4.5% over wider windows that include macro; large-cap alts amplified. Note many small CEX/custody incidents are immaterial to spot (the $46M USMS theft was a non-mover; BTC -3.7% was macro)
move_probability.lag: immediate (minutes) for the headline; full sentiment effect over hours
move_probability.duration: hours to a few days; rapid recovery once solvency is reassured — the most mean-reverting of the three archetypes
move_probability.half_life: shortest of the category — dip often bought back within 1-3 days once loss_socialized_flag fires (Bybit covered shortfall in ~72h)
move_probability.conditioning: impact scales with hack size RELATIVE to the network and with the prevailing macro tape: a large hack into an already risk-off market compounds (Bybit slid further as market was ~20% below ATH); on a calm tape even a $1.5B socialized hack is a few-percent BTC/ETH dip. Stolen-asset ticker sees extra transient sell pressure as the hacker launders. Custody/insider thefts immaterial to spot are NOT tradable

pm_gate.scope: broad BTC/ETH/large-cap book on initial headline
pm_gate.rationale: this is the one hacks archetype with genuine market-wide sentiment-shock potential; cheap hedge against the same-day risk-off dip

pm_gate.scope: the literally-stolen asset (e.g. ETH in Bybit) for transient laundering sell-pressure; modest BTC/ETH short only if hack hits a risk-off tape
pm_gate.rationale: stolen-asset sees extra sell pressure; broad move is small and mean-reverting so size light

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH/large-cap dip, AFTER loss_socialized_flag / CEO solvency statement
pm_gate.rationale: network is unharmed and loss is socialized -> most mean-reverting archetype; the dip is the buy
socialized-loss CEX hacks retrace within days; reversion edge is favorable post-reassurance, unlike protocol/bridge token crashes

pm_gate.scope: all pairs on/around the affected exchange during the withdrawal-pause window
pm_gate.rationale: liquidity pulled from CEXs, spreads blow out and inventory risk spikes; widen quotes/reduce size
realized vol spikes on the shock; de-gross to hold target vol
funding/basis dislocate intraday on the risk-off flush; trim until it normalizes

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (exchange_cold_wallet_outflow_usd >= 1e8) AND (withdrawals_paused_flag == true OR stablecoin_exchange_inflow_zscore > 2 OR btc_dominance_change_24h > 0) AND stolen_asset_ticker_is_market_asset == true
backtest_gate.usage: On/off gate: enable tail-hedge + vol-targeting de-gross, short the stolen asset, and disable nothing on BTC/ETH beyond light short. Apply a SHORT-then-MEAN-REVERT prior: P(down) ~1.0 over 0-24h but flip to P(up)/liquidation-fade once loss_socialized_flag == true. Size the BTC/ETH leg by hack_usd / network_mcap AND by a macro-regime flag (amplify if market already risk-off).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: The headline loss figure and whether the loss will be socialized are NOT known at the first on-chain outflow — gate on the outflow + withdrawal-pause that ARE observable, and timestamp loss_socialized_flag at the actual CEO statement (Bybit ~72h later), never backfilled. CRITICAL filter: require the theft to be material vs spot and the stolen asset to be a traded market asset — government/custody/insider thefts ($46M USMS) are non-movers and will pollute the sample (any observed BTC move there is macro). Only n=3 large instances, measured_fraction 0.17, so direction is reliable but magnitude is a weak prior.

signals.one_liner: CEX hack: brief market-wide risk-off (BTC/ETH ~2-6%) that mean-reverts within days once the loss is socialized — hedge + short the stolen asset, then buy the dip; ignore immaterial custody/insider thefts.

signals.name: Incentive-Driven Ecosystem Pump (and Fade)
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks after the incentive announcement; reflexive run-up builds over 1-3 months
signals.typical_duration: 2-4 months of outperformance, then multi-month or multi-year mean reversion once incentives taper
signals.recurrence: every cycle - 1-2 major instances per bull market
affected_scope: ecosystem DeFi tokens on that chain
leading_signals: foundation announces 8-9 figure incentive/grant program
TVL inflow acceleration (TVL_7d_pct_change spike)
DEX volume surge relative to chain baseline
stablecoin net inflow to the chain
rising bridge inflows
native token funding rates turning positive

active_when: incentive_program_size_usd >= 50000000 (8-9 figure foundation/grant program announced) AND days_since_incentive_announcement <= 90
chain_tvl_7d_pct_change > 25% OR chain_tvl_zscore_90d > 2
dex_volume_zscore > 2 vs 90d chain baseline
stablecoin_netflow_to_chain > 0 and accelerating AND bridge_inflow_usd_7d at multi-month high
funding_rate_zscore > 0 (native token funding flipping positive) confirms reflexive spot+perp demand
token_price_vs_eth_ratio breaking to a new 60d high while program is active
data_sources: DeFiLlama (TVL, chain TVL change, stablecoin netflow, bridge flows)
foundation announcements / crypto news feeds (incentive program size & date)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: L1 token (named chain) +112% to +710% (median ~+293%, max ~+1460% for BNB-class); per-asset medians: AVAX ~277%, BNB ~764%, ETH revival ~98%. Subsequent fade -68% to -94% (median -81%). Ecosystem DeFi tokens move with higher beta than the L1.
move_probability.lag: days-to-weeks from incentive announcement to first inflows; reflexive run-up builds over 1-3 months
move_probability.duration: 2-4 months of outperformance
move_probability.half_life: edge decays as the program matures; once days_since_incentive_announcement > 90 or incentives taper, the bullish prior collapses and flips to the fade (see ratio-mean-reversion-unwind)
move_probability.conditioning: amplified in a risk-on / alt-season tape (BTC dominance falling), positive funding, and accelerating stablecoin inflows; muted or invalidated if broad-market risk-off (BTC dominance rising) coincides with the announcement

pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0 with large magnitude during the incentive window; go long the named L1 token while TVL/DEX/funding signals confirm and days_since_incentive_announcement <= 90.
pm_gate.scope: the named L1 token + highest-liquidity ecosystem DeFi tokens on that chain

pm_gate.rationale: TVL/DEX-volume z-score breakout is a clean momentum entry; tilt rotation book toward the incentivized chain's token vs the alt basket.
pm_gate.scope: named L1 token vs alt-L1 basket

pm_gate.rationale: Stablecoin netflow, bridge inflow, and TVL acceleration are the direct mechanism; trade the flow signal long.
Funding flips and stays positive during the pump; short-funding carry is squeezed and crowded long-perp; reduce or avoid shorting the carry on the named token.
Trend is reflexive and persistent during the window; fading the breakout is the losing side until the catalyst saturates.
Rising realized vol with a positive drift; vol-targeting can hold the long with a sizing overlay rather than cutting.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (incentive_program_size_usd >= 50e6) AND (days_since_incentive_announcement BETWEEN 0 AND 90) AND (chain_tvl_zscore_90d > 2 OR chain_tvl_7d_pct_change > 25) AND (dex_volume_zscore > 2)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON directional-long / momentum-rotation / on-chain-flow on the named L1 token and gate OFF mean-reversion on it. Use as a strong P(direction)=long prior (p_up=1.0 in-sample, n=3 events) for the affected token; size the prior down toward neutral once days_since_incentive_announcement > 90.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Use only the announced program size known at t and TVL/flow as-of t (DeFiLlama is point-in-time-safe). Do NOT use the realized peak price or the magnitude of the eventual fade to set entries — those are forward-looking. The +200-1500% magnitudes are realized full-window moves, not what is knowable at entry; treat them as outcome distribution, not signal.

signals.one_liner: Foundation drops a big incentive program -> TVL/DEX/bridge inflows spike -> named L1 token rips +100-700% over 1-3 months; go long the chain token while the program is fresh (<90d) and flows accelerate, then hand off to the fade.

signals.name: Challenger / 'Next Ethereum-Killer' Revival Rotation
signals.typical_lag: rotation builds over weeks to months as the ratio (challenger/ETH) trends; reaction to a single catalyst (e.g. app going viral) can be immediate
signals.typical_duration: a full bull-cycle leg (3-12 months) of outperformance, then ratio mean-reversion
signals.recurrence: 1-2 major rotations per cycle; the named challenger changes each cycle (BSC->SOL/AVAX->SOL/SUI)
affected_scope: the challenger L1 token (SOL, SUI, APT, AVAX)
ecosystem tokens on the challenger chain
leading_signals: challenger/ETH price ratio breaking to new highs
challenger DEX volume overtaking ETH for sustained periods
viral dApp launch driving fee revenue
monthly active addresses surpassing rivals
recovery from a crisis/forced-seller low
media 'flippening' headlines (often a late/contrarian signal)

active_when: challenger_eth_ratio_zscore > 1 AND sol_eth_ratio (or challenger/ETH ratio) breaking to a new 90d high
challenger_dex_volume_vs_eth_ratio > 1 sustained for >= 14 days (challenger DEX volume overtaking ETH)
relative_strength_vs_eth_30d > 0 and rising
monthly_active_addresses_yoy > 50% OR chain_fee_revenue_30d at a new high (viral dApp / usage milestone)
days_since_crisis_low between 30 and 365 (recovery leg off a forced-seller low, e.g. post-FTX SOL)
challenger_market_cap_to_eth_market_cap rising (capital share gaining)
data_sources: CoinGecko (price ratios, market caps, relative strength)
DeFiLlama / Dune (DEX volume by chain, fee revenue)
Artemis / Token Terminal (active addresses, fee revenue, chain comparisons)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: challenger L1 +59% to +180% (median ~+102%, max ~+324%) over a rotation leg; per-asset medians SOL ~84%, SUI ~120%. Relative outperformance vs ETH of 30-90% on the ratio.
move_probability.lag: rotation builds over weeks-to-months as the challenger/ETH ratio trends; reaction to a single viral-app catalyst can be immediate
move_probability.duration: a full bull-cycle leg of 3-12 months of outperformance
move_probability.half_life: edge persists while the ratio trends; decays once the ratio reaches multi-year-high z-score extremes and on-chain growth decelerates — the signal then hands off to ratio-mean-reversion-unwind
move_probability.conditioning: amplified in risk-on / alt-season (BTC dominance falling), real usage growth, and a genuine catalyst (killer app, recovery off a crisis low); 'flippening' media headlines are a LATE/contrarian signal — fade their amplification effect, do not chase on them

pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0 over the rotation leg; long the challenger L1 while the challenger/ETH ratio and usage trend up.
pm_gate.scope: challenger L1 token (SOL/SUI/APT/AVAX class) + ecosystem tokens

pm_gate.rationale: The whole archetype is a relative-strength rotation; tilt the L1 rotation book long the challenger vs ETH (long challenger/ETH ratio).
pm_gate.scope: challenger token long vs ETH short (ratio trade) or vs alt-L1 basket

pm_gate.rationale: DEX-volume-overtaking-ETH and active-address growth are the direct flow drivers; trade them long.
Multi-month ratio trend; standard trend/breakout systems on the challenger token catch the leg.
Fading a trending, reflexive ratio is the losing side until the ratio hits extremes; disable on the challenger.
pm_gate.scope: challenger L1 token + high-beta ecosystem alts

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (challenger_eth_ratio_zscore > 1) AND (challenger_dex_volume_vs_eth_ratio > 1 for >= 14d) AND (relative_strength_vs_eth_30d > 0) AND (challenger_eth_ratio_zscore < 2.5)  // upper bound excludes the extreme top handled by the unwind gate
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON directional-long / momentum-rotation / trend-following / on-chain-flow on the challenger token; encode as P(direction)=long prior (p_up=1.0 in-sample, n=4 rotations). Pair as a long-challenger/short-ETH ratio book. Turn the prior off and hand to the unwind gate once the z-score crosses into extreme territory.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Compute ratio z-scores on a trailing window only. 'Flippening' media saturation is a lagging/coincident top signal — do not treat headline count as a leading long signal in-sample. Realized +59-324% are full-leg outcomes; entry is on the ratio breakout + usage confirmation, not on the realized peak.

signals.one_liner: Capital rotates from ETH into a fresh 'ETH-killer' (SOL/SUI/APT) on a usage or crisis-recovery catalyst; the challenger/ETH ratio trends up and the token runs +60-180% over a multi-month leg — long the challenger, short ETH as a ratio, until the ratio hits extremes.

signals.name: L2 / New-Chain Token Launch & Airdrop Rotation
signals.typical_lag: immediate at TGE (price discovery in first hours); first follow-on rally within weeks
signals.typical_duration: launch pop fades over days-weeks; multi-month downtrend as unlocks/farmed supply sell off
signals.recurrence: every major L2/chain TGE - several per cycle
leading_signals: airdrop snapshot / TGE date announced
farmed on-chain activity spike pre-snapshot
exchange listing announcements
large token unlock dates on the vesting schedule
FDV-to-circulating ratio (high = future sell-pressure)

active_when: airdrop snapshot / TGE date announced AND days_since_tge BETWEEN 0 AND 30 (launch window)
circulating_to_fdv_ratio < 0.15 (low float, high FDV => structural future sell-pressure)
airdrop_pct_of_supply >= 10% (large free-float distribution prone to dumping)
days_to_first_unlock <= 30 OR unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply >= 5% within 14d (sell-pressure catalyst imminent)
pre_tge_active_address_spike present (mercenary farming inflating activity pre-snapshot)
first_day_volume_usd extreme then decaying (price-discovery exhaustion)
data_sources: project tokenomics / vesting schedules (TokenUnlocks, project docs)
CoinGecko / CoinMarketCap (FDV, circulating supply, first-day volume, listings)
on-chain explorers / Dune (pre-TGE active address spikes, farmed activity)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Net launch outcome is mostly flat/mixed in the measured set (p_flat=0.8). When it pops, single-session follow-on rallies of ~+20-30% (one measured up move ~+25%, ARB); then a multi-month bleed of -50%+ as unlocks/farmed supply hit (the down leg). per_asset: ARB up 1 / flat 1 (~25%); ETH/SUI/APT launches scored flat.
move_probability.lag: immediate at TGE (price discovery in the first hours); first follow-on rally within weeks
move_probability.duration: launch pop fades over days-weeks; multi-month downtrend as unlocks and farmed supply sell off
move_probability.half_life: launch-day price-discovery edge decays within hours-to-days; the sell-pressure (down) tilt builds over weeks-to-months as cliffs unlock
move_probability.conditioning: down-tilt amplified by high FDV/low float, large airdrop_pct_of_supply, near-term unlock cliffs, and risk-off tape; a transient pop is more likely with strong exchange-listing breadth and broad alt-season demand

pm_gate.rationale: p_up only 0.2 and p_flat 0.8 at/after launch; structural sell-pressure from farmed/unlocked supply makes naive launch longs negative-EV. Do not hold the new token long through the launch window.
Trade the event explicitly: short into the launch-day liquidity spike / first follow-on pop when circulating_to_fdv is low and an unlock cliff is near; fade the pop rather than chase.
As unlock cliffs (days_to_first_unlock <= 30, unlock_pct >= 5%) approach, tilt short the new token on the supply overhang once a perp/borrow exists.
pm_gate.scope: the new token with imminent unlock cliffs

pm_gate.rationale: For tokenless-launch variants (Base/Onchain Summer), the speculative flow routes into chain-themed meme tokens and parent equity (COIN); run sniping on the launch-meme basket, not the (absent) chain token.
pm_gate.scope: launch-themed memecoins; parent equity COIN for Base

pm_gate.rationale: No stable reference price during launch price-discovery; mean-reversion has no anchor and the structural drift is down.
pm_gate.scope: the new token in its first weeks

pm_gate.rationale: Launch-day volume is extreme and one-directional risk (unlock dumps) is high; if MM is run, widen spreads/inventory limits to avoid being run over.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_tge BETWEEN 0 AND 30) AND ((circulating_to_fdv_ratio < 0.15) OR (airdrop_pct_of_supply >= 10) OR (days_to_first_unlock <= 30) OR (unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply >= 5))
backtest_gate.usage: Gate OFF directional-long and mean-reversion on the new token; gate ON event-driven (fade-the-pop) and a mild P(direction)=short prior weighted by FDV/unlock features. Treat the base move-probability as p_flat-dominant (0.8) — do not assume a directional edge except the structural down-tilt as unlocks approach. Route the bullish leg to launch-meme/parent-equity baskets for tokenless launches.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: measured_fraction=0.0 here — magnitudes are largely qualitative/unmeasured, so do NOT hard-code the +25% pop as a reliable signal. Vesting/unlock schedules ARE known point-in-time (publish dates precede unlocks) and are safe features. Do not use the eventual multi-month drawdown to set launch-day entries (look-ahead). First-day price is venue-dependent and noisy — use volume/flow features, not a single print.

signals.one_liner: L2/new-chain TGE or airdrop: mostly flat-to-down (p_flat 0.8, p_up 0.2) as farmed and unlocked supply sells off — fade the launch pop and tilt short into near-term unlock cliffs; for tokenless launches (Base) route speculation into meme tokens and COIN, not a chain token.

signals.name: Rotation Unwind / Challenger Ratio Mean-Reversion
signals.typical_lag: the ratio top forms over weeks; the unwind accelerates over days once leverage flushes
signals.typical_duration: months to a full bear leg of underperformance
signals.recurrence: follows every challenger rotation - the back half of each cycle
affected_scope: the previously-leading challenger token (SOL, AVAX, SUI)
leading_signals: challenger/ETH ratio at multi-year highs with negative momentum divergence
extreme positive funding rates / high open interest on the challenger
'flippening' media saturation
decelerating on-chain growth (active addresses, fees rolling over)
broad-market risk-off (BTC dominance rising)
incentive programs tapering

active_when: challenger_eth_ratio_zscore_extreme > 2 (challenger/ETH ratio at multi-year highs) AND negative momentum divergence (price high, momentum lower-high)
challenger_funding_rate_zscore > 2 AND open_interest_to_marketcap_ratio elevated (crowded leveraged longs)
active_address_30d_momentum < 0 (on-chain growth and fees rolling over)
btc_dominance_change > 0 over 7-14d (broad-market risk-off / Bitcoin Season)
drawdown_from_60d_high > 10% confirming the ratio top has begun rolling
incentive programs tapering / 'flippening' media saturation peaking (late-cycle marker)
data_sources: CoinGecko (ratio, BTC dominance, drawdown, realized vol)
Coinglass / Hyperliquid (funding rates, open interest, liquidations)
Artemis / Token Terminal (active address momentum, fee revenue)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: challenger -45% to -63% (median ~-54%, max ~-94%) over the unwind; per-asset down medians SOL ~49%, AVAX ~94%, BNB ~84%. Challenger/ETH ratio reverts 25-50%+ off its high. One counter (up) case ~+113% (BNB run-up before its own unwind). High-beta ecosystem alts de-rate harder than the challenger L1.
move_probability.lag: the ratio top forms over weeks; the unwind accelerates over days once leverage flushes
move_probability.duration: months to a full bear leg of underperformance
move_probability.half_life: the sharp leverage-flush leg plays out over days-to-weeks; relative underperformance vs ETH persists for months until the next revival catalyst
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by extreme positive funding/high OI (more long fuel to liquidate), rising BTC dominance (risk-off), decelerating on-chain growth, and incentive taper; muted/invalidated if a fresh genuine catalyst re-ignites the chain (re-arms the challenger-revival archetype)

pm_gate.rationale: p_down=0.8 with large magnitude; short the over-extended challenger token (or long-ETH/short-challenger ratio) once the ratio is at extreme z-score, funding is hot, and the 60d-high drawdown confirms the roll.
pm_gate.scope: previously-leading challenger token (SOL/AVAX/SUI) + high-beta ecosystem alts

pm_gate.rationale: Leverage is crowded long; once the cascade flushes (funding resets, OI drops sharply), fade the over-extended liquidation washout for the bounce — but only after the flush, not before.
Extreme positive funding looks like attractive short-funding carry but it precedes the very deleveraging flush that wrecks crowded positioning; flatten carry on the challenger ahead of the unwind.
p_up only 0.2; exit residual rotation longs on the challenger once extremes + risk-off confirm. Do not hold the high-beta L1 into the unwind.
Buying the dip on the challenger during a reflexive deleveraging bear leg is the losing side; disable long-mean-reversion on the challenger and its alts.
Reflexive deleveraging + forced liquidations create fat left tails; enable tail/downside hedges on the high-beta L1 basket.
Realized vol spikes during the flush; cut gross on the challenger basket to hold risk constant.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (challenger_eth_ratio_zscore_extreme > 2) AND (challenger_funding_rate_zscore > 2 OR open_interest_to_marketcap_ratio > 90th_pct) AND ((btc_dominance_change > 0) OR (active_address_30d_momentum < 0)) AND (drawdown_from_60d_high > 10)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON directional-short / tail-hedge on the challenger basket and gate OFF funding-carry and long-mean-reversion on it; enable liquidation-fade ONLY conditioned on a post-flush sub-state (funding reset + sharp OI drop). Encode as P(direction)=short prior (p_down=0.8 in-sample, n=5, measured_fraction 0.88 — the cleanest gate in this category).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: All trigger features (ratio z-score, funding, OI, BTC dominance, drawdown-from-60d-high) are computable point-in-time from trailing windows — no look-ahead if z-scores use only data up to t. 'Flippening media saturation' is qualitative; use it as soft confirmation, not a hard backtest trigger. Do not use the realized -54% to fix entries — that is the outcome distribution; entry is on the extreme + roll-over confirmation.

signals.one_liner: After a challenger L1 tops out (ratio at extreme z-score, funding hot, OI crowded long, on-chain growth rolling over, BTC dominance rising), the high-beta token de-rates -45% to -90% — short the challenger / long ETH, flatten funding-carry, enable tail-hedge, and only fade the liquidation washout after the flush.

signals.name: Macro Risk-Off Liquidity Shock
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours (intraday on the headline; equities/futures lead by minutes)
signals.typical_duration: 1-7 days for the acute drop; full risk-off regime can persist weeks to months
signals.recurrence: several times per year; clusters around FOMC days, CPI prints, and geopolitical/tariff headlines
leading_signals: DXY breaking out higher
US 2Y/10Y yields spiking
equity VIX > 25 and rising
Nasdaq futures gapping down
BTC-Nasdaq 30d correlation > 0.5
funding rates very positive (crowded longs) into the event
perp open interest at local highs

active_when: dxy_1d_pct_change >= +0.5% AND rising over 3 sessions (dollar liquidity tightening)
vix_level > 25 AND vix_1d_change > 0 (equity stress confirming)
nasdaq_futures_overnight_gap <= -1.0% (risk-off leads crypto by minutes)
us2y_yield_1d_bps_change >= +10bps (hawkish rate repricing)
btc_nasdaq_30d_rolling_corr > 0.5 (crypto coupled to risk, not decoupled)
fomc_or_cpi_event_dummy == 1 OR headline_shock_dummy == 1 (tariff/geopolitical/Fed-chair headline)
perp_funding_rate_zscore > 1.5 AND open_interest_zscore > 1 (crowded longs into the event = fuel)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC 12-20% (median 15%); large-cap alts/ETH ~7.5-20%; total-market-cap 40% in severe events; overall down-move distribution median 17.2% (p25 12.5%, p75 25.3%, max 50%)
move_probability.lag: immediate to hours; equities/Nasdaq futures lead crypto by minutes
move_probability.duration: 1-7 days for the acute drop; full risk-off regime can persist weeks to months
move_probability.half_life: edge on the directional-short / de-risk signal is sharpest in the first 24-72h; decays as the headline gets priced and a relief bounce sets in
move_probability.conditioning: amplified when funding is very positive and OI at local highs into the event (crowded longs become forced sellers); amplified by thin weekend/off-hours books; muted/flipped if BTC-equity correlation has already broken down (then check flight-to-quality archetype)

pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0 across 6 instances; crypto sits at far end of risk curve and overshoots the macro move
pm_gate.scope: BTC + large-cap alts; size up on high-beta alts which fall 2-3x BTC

pm_gate.rationale: risk-off shock initiates a downtrend / extends macro-trend regime; momentum is to the downside
long-basis/funding-carry positions get run over as longs are liquidated and funding flips; basis collapses in the washout
cash-and-carry spreads gap and margin spikes during forced deleveraging
buying dips into a synchronized macro de-risking catches a falling knife; reversion fails until the regime resets
pm_gate.scope: alts especially; majors only after VIX rolls over

pm_gate.rationale: range breaks violently to the downside; grid bots accumulate into a one-way move
this is the regime tail hedges are built for; carry the hedge through the acute window
realized vol spikes; vol-target mandates mechanically cut gross — front-run rather than chase
speculative/high-beta names lead the drop and liquidity evaporates

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = ((dxy_1d_pct_change >= 0.5) OR (vix_level > 25 AND vix_1d_change > 0) OR (nasdaq_futures_overnight_gap <= -1.0) OR (us2y_yield_1d_bps_change >= 10)) AND (btc_nasdaq_30d_rolling_corr > 0.5) AND ((fomc_or_cpi_event_dummy == 1) OR (headline_shock_dummy == 1))
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that disables long mean-reversion/range-grid/funding-carry and enables directional-short + trend-following + tail-hedge. As a Bayesian prior set P(down)=1.0, P(up)=0.0 conditional on the gate firing with crowded-long fuel (funding_zscore>1.5).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: headline_shock_dummy and fomc_or_cpi_event_dummy must be timestamped to the headline/print release, not the day's close; do not use the post-event drawdown to define the trigger. DXY/VIX/futures must use the value available at decision time (prior close or live), and btc_nasdaq_30d_corr uses a trailing window only.

signals.one_liner: Dollar/VIX/yields spike on a Fed-CPI-tariff headline while crypto is correlated to equities -> BTC drops 12-20% (alts more): short/de-risk, flatten carry, disable dip-buying, carry tail hedge.

signals.name: Crypto Leverage Liquidation Cascade (macro-triggered)
signals.typical_lag: minutes to a few hours (mechanical, faster than fundamentals warrant)
signals.typical_duration: hours to 2-3 days; sharp V-shaped partial recovery common within 24-72h
signals.recurrence: 1-3 major cascades per year, plus many smaller ones; triggered by macro headlines or exchange events
leading_signals: perp open interest near all-time highs
funding rates persistently positive / elevated
long/short ratio skewed long
estimated leverage ratio rising
thin order-book depth
a binary macro/headline catalyst pending
stablecoin supply not keeping pace with OI

active_when: aggregate_perp_open_interest_usd at/near all-time-high AND oi_to_marketcap_ratio in top decile (over-leveraged stack)
funding_rate_8h positive AND funding_rate_zscore > 1.5 (persistently crowded longs)
long_short_account_ratio skewed long (> ~1.5x) AND estimated_leverage_ratio rising
orderbook_depth_2pct thin / falling (air-pocket risk)
headline_event_dummy == 1 (binary macro/exchange catalyst pending or just hit)
TRIGGER FIRES: 24h_liquidation_volume_usd spikes > 3x trailing-30d median (cascade in progress)
data_sources: Coinglass (OI, funding, liquidation volume, long/short ratio)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC ~13-16% intraday (median 14%); ETH ~19%; SOL/high-beta alts ~24-50% wicks; overall down distribution median 16.8% (p25 13.3%, p75 21.0%, max 50%)
move_probability.lag: minutes to a few hours — mechanical, faster than fundamentals warrant
move_probability.duration: hours to 2-3 days; sharp V-shaped partial recovery common within 24-72h
move_probability.half_life: the short edge has a very short half-life (the air-pocket); the FADE/long edge opens once 24h_liquidation_volume exhausts and funding flips negative, typically within 24-72h
move_probability.conditioning: magnitude scales with pre-event OI/leverage and book thinness; the deeper the leverage stack the larger the overshoot vs the macro shock (2-4x); V-recovery probability higher when the trigger was a one-off headline rather than a sustained regime shift

pm_gate.rationale: after the washout exhausts (liquidation volume rolling over, funding flips negative), fade the overshoot for the V-recovery — the core trade of this archetype
pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH first, then SOL/high-beta on confirmation; staged entries

pm_gate.rationale: longs get force-closed and funding inverts violently; carry positions are run over during the cascade
do not catch the knife mid-cascade; reversion only re-enables post-exhaustion as part of liquidation-fade
if detected pre-trigger (high OI + crowded longs + pending catalyst), pre-position short; close into the liquidation spike
pm_gate.scope: BTC + high-beta alts; take profit fast

pm_gate.rationale: inventory risk and ADL during thin-book cascades; widen quotes, cut size, expect adverse selection
convex protection pays off precisely in the reflexive doom-loop
violent one-way wick blows through grid levels
explosive downside breakout with the largest single-session range; momentum-breakout engines capture the cascade leg

backtest_gate.gate_expression: armed = (oi_to_marketcap_ratio >= p90_trailing) AND (funding_rate_zscore > 1.5) AND (long_short_account_ratio > 1.5) AND (orderbook_depth_2pct <= p25_trailing) AND (headline_event_dummy == 1); cascade_active = armed AND (24h_liquidation_volume_usd > 3 * median_30d); fade_window = cascade_active_lag(12-48h) AND (funding_8h < 0) AND (liquidation_volume_rolling_down)
backtest_gate.usage: Use 'armed' as a pre-position short gate and P(down)~1.0 prior. Use 'fade_window' as the gate that enables liquidation-fade / directional-long for the V-recovery. Gate funding-carry and mean-reversion OFF whenever cascade_active is true.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: 24h_liquidation_volume_usd and the V-recovery are only known after the fact — backtest must trigger the fade on a rolling liquidation-volume-rollover + negative-funding signal, NOT on the realized low. OI/funding/depth percentiles must use trailing windows; never peek at the post-cascade price.

signals.one_liner: Over-leveraged stack (record OI + crowded longs + thin books) meets a headline -> mechanical liquidation doom-loop, BTC ~14% / alts up to 50% intraday, then a 24-72h V-recovery: flatten carry, short into it, then enable liquidation-fade after the washout exhausts.

signals.name: Macro Liquidity / Risk-On Tailwind
signals.typical_lag: immediate on the print, often with anticipatory run-up over prior days/weeks
signals.typical_duration: the headline pop is hours-days; the regime tailwind can run weeks-months
signals.recurrence: several FOMC/CPI prints per year; major easing-cycle inflections every few years
leading_signals: DXY rolling over / making lower highs
Fed funds futures pricing cuts
softening CPI/PCE trend
real yields falling
global M2 / central-bank balance sheets expanding
BTC outperforming on up-days (positive beta)
negative funding flipping positive (shorts covering)

active_when: dxy_20d_pct_change < 0 AND dxy making lower highs (dollar rolling over)
fed_funds_futures_implied_cuts_next_meeting > 0 (market pricing easing)
cpi_surprise_actual_minus_consensus < 0 (softer-than-expected inflation print)
real_10y_yield_change < 0 (real yields falling)
fomc_cut_dummy == 1 (delivered cut)
global_m2_yoy rising (liquidity expanding)
WARNING for sell-the-news: pre_event_run_up_5d large (> ~5%) implies easing already priced -> expect flat/muted
