move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC +2.5% to +10% on the print (median up-move 5.0%, p25 3.7%, p75 7.5%); flat/sell-the-news outcomes cluster near 0% when priced in; multi-week regime tailwind can compound to +20-60%
move_probability.lag: immediate on the print, often with anticipatory run-up over prior days/weeks
move_probability.duration: headline pop is hours-days; the regime tailwind can run weeks-months
move_probability.half_life: the headline-pop edge decays within hours-to-a-day (especially if already priced); the regime edge is slow and persistent across the easing cycle
move_probability.conditioning: amplified when the dovish print is a SURPRISE (cpi_surprise < 0, larger-than-expected cut) and BTC was near lows with shorts to squeeze; muted/flat (the 33% flat case) when easing is fully priced and pre_event_run_up_5d is large (buy-the-rumor-sell-the-news)

pm_gate.rationale: p_up=0.67 vs 0 down; dovish liquidity print injects dry powder and crypto is the highest-beta sponge
pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH + large-cap alts; size up only on surprise prints, light on priced-in ones

pm_gate.rationale: risk-on tailwind initiates/extends an uptrend; ride the regime, not just the print
regime tailwind broadens into alts; rotate toward leaders as the easing cycle runs
risk-on with shorts covering pushes funding positive — collect carry on the long-basis side
fading a confirmed liquidity tailwind is the losing side of this archetype
tail premium bleeds in a calm risk-on regime; trim, do not flatten entirely
falling realized vol lets vol-target mandates add gross into the trend
shallow pullbacks within an uptrend are buyable but the print itself is directional, not range-bound

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (fomc_cut_dummy == 1 OR cpi_surprise_actual_minus_consensus < 0 OR dxy_20d_pct_change < 0) AND (real_10y_yield_change < 0); priced_in_flag = (pre_event_run_up_5d > 5.0 AND fed_funds_futures_implied_cuts_next_meeting > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use 'active' as an ON gate enabling directional-long/trend-following/momentum-rotation/funding-carry and reducing shorts. As a prior, P(up)=0.67, P(flat)=0.33, P(down)=0.0; downgrade the long tilt to size-light when priced_in_flag is true (shift mass toward the flat outcome).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: cpi_surprise and fed_funds_futures cuts must use the consensus/forward curve as of the moment BEFORE the release, never the realized print revision. pre_event_run_up_5d is trailing and safe; do not let the post-print return leak into the gate. Distinguish a delivered cut (fomc_cut_dummy at release timestamp) from anticipation.

signals.one_liner: Dovish surprise (soft CPI, rate cut, falling DXY/real yields) -> BTC +2.5-10% pop and an upside regime tailwind: tilt long, enable trend/momentum/funding-carry, cut shorts — but expect a flat sell-the-news if easing was already priced (33% flat).

signals.name: Banking/Fiat Stress Flight-to-Bitcoin
signals.typical_lag: hours to a few days (often resolves over a weekend as the banking story develops)
signals.typical_duration: days to a couple of weeks while the banking stress is acute
signals.recurrence: rare — a few times per cycle; requires fiat-system-specific stress
leading_signals: regional-bank equity index falling sharply while BTC holds/rises
a major stablecoin (USDC/DAI) depegging
spike in bank CDS
deposit-flight headlines
BTC-equity correlation breaking down / going negative
stablecoin redemptions and flight to 'unaffected' stablecoins (USDT premium)

active_when: bank_equity_index_1d_change <= -3% (regional-bank stress) WHILE btc_return_minus_spx_return_spread > 0 (BTC holding/rising vs equities)
stablecoin_peg_deviation_bps for USDC/DAI > 100bps (major stablecoin depegging on reserve scare)
bank_cds_spread_change rising sharply (banking counterparty stress)
btc_equity_corr_breakdown_flag == 1 (30d BTC-equity correlation breaks down / goes negative)
usdt_vs_usdc_premium > 0 (flight from stressed stablecoin to 'unaffected' one)
banking_stress_headline_dummy == 1 (bank-failure / sovereign-downgrade / deposit-flight headline)
data_sources: stablecoin peg oracles (CoinGecko/Chainlink, Curve pool ratios)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC +18% to +300% over the stress window (median up-move 80%, p25 34.5%, p75 165%); modern liquid examples (SVB/Moody's) cluster nearer +18-40%; the named depegging stablecoin (e.g. USDC) is the short leg, ~-13%
move_probability.lag: hours to a few days; often resolves over a weekend as the banking story develops
move_probability.duration: days to a couple of weeks while the banking stress is acute
move_probability.half_life: the decoupling edge lasts as long as the banking stress is unresolved; collapses fast once a backstop/FDIC/peg-restoration is announced (re-peg + BTC give-back)
move_probability.conditioning: REQUIRES fiat-plumbing-specific stress (bank run, stablecoin-reserve scare, sovereign downgrade) AND a confirmed BTC-equity correlation breakdown; if the stress is generic broad risk-off (correlation still high) this FLIPS to the bearish macro-risk-off-shock archetype — the two are mutually exclusive gates

pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0; BTC acts as bearer flight-to-quality vs the banking system when correlation breaks down
pm_gate.scope: BTC primarily; large-cap alts only partially / on confirmation

pm_gate.rationale: the depegging stablecoin (USDC -13% type) is a high-probability re-peg buy once a credible backstop is signaled — pair with the BTC long
decoupling rally can run parabolic (Cyprus/SVB) — let trend ride while stress persists
shorting BTC into a banking-stress flight bid is the losing side; short squeezes accelerated the SVB/Moody's breaks
BTC itself is acting as the hedge here; keep equity/fiat-side hedges but do not add crypto downside protection
stablecoin-leg counterparty/peg risk contaminates carry collateral; de-risk collateral exposure to the stressed stablecoin
pm_gate.scope: books collateralized in the depegged stablecoin

pm_gate.rationale: rising spot bid into the flight can steepen basis — lean long-basis as BTC decouples

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (banking_stress_headline_dummy == 1) AND (bank_equity_index_1d_change <= -3 OR stablecoin_peg_deviation_bps > 100 OR bank_cds_spread_change > p90) AND (btc_equity_corr_breakdown_flag == 1 AND btc_return_minus_spx_return_spread > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that OVERRIDES the bearish macro-risk-off gate: when active, enable directional-long/trend/basis on BTC and the stablecoin re-peg trade; disable BTC shorts. As a prior, P(up)=1.0 — but treat magnitude with caution (heavy right-tail, small n). The correlation-breakdown condition is the switch that distinguishes this from risk-off.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: btc_equity_corr_breakdown_flag uses a trailing correlation window only. The huge historical up-moves (Cyprus +300%) include thin/early-market and parabolic episodes — do not size on the median; the look-ahead hazard is using the full stress-window peak to size entries when only the breakdown signal is known at decision time. Re-peg/backstop announcements end the edge and must not be used to extend the holding window in hindsight.

signals.one_liner: Banking/fiat-plumbing stress (bank failure, USDC depeg, sovereign downgrade) while BTC-equity correlation breaks down -> BTC decouples UP (+18-40% modern, fat right tail): tilt long BTC, buy the depegged stablecoin re-peg, flatten BTC shorts — flips bearish if correlation stays high (then it's risk-off, not flight-to-quality).

signals.name: Celebrity / Influencer Pump on an Existing Memecoin
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to hours after tweet/event)
signals.typical_duration: hours to a few days; scheduled-event pumps fade within 24h of the event
signals.recurrence: very high during bull markets — Musk alone moved DOGE on a dozen+ occasions across Jan-May 2021 and again in 2024-2026
leading_signals: spike in social mentions / Google Trends for the coin name
scheduled celebrity media appearance announced in advance
run-up in price + volume in days before a hyped event
influencer follower count vs coin float (thin float amplifies)
Robinhood/exchange app outages from order volume

active_when: twitter_mention_zscore_24h > 3 on a tracked memecoin (DOGE/SHIB/named coin) AND 1h_volume_zscore > 3
scheduled_event_flag == true AND days_to_event <= 7 (announced celebrity media appearance / SNL-style event)
google_trends_spike: coin-name search interest > 2x trailing-30d max
price_runup_pct_7d_pre_event > 50% into a scheduled event (front-running risk = sell-the-news primed)
social_volume_to_marketcap_ratio in top decile (thin float + viral attention)
SELL-THE-NEWS sub-state: event_day has arrived AND sell_news_flag (event_day_return < runup_return) -> flip bearish

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named coin / DOGE / SHIB up-leg: median +200% (p25 +140%, p75 +600%, max +750%); DOGE median ~+140%, SHIB outliers ~+750%; sell-the-news reversal -20% to -40% (one measured -30% on the SNL event day)
move_probability.lag: immediate — minutes to hours after the tweet/event
move_probability.duration: hours to a few days; scheduled-event pumps fade within 24h of the event itself
move_probability.half_life: very short — edge decays within 24-48h; the up-bias collapses the moment the catalyst is priced and the tweet stream stops
move_probability.conditioning: thin float + high social_volume_to_marketcap amplifies upside; a SCHEDULED hyped event flips the playbook to sell-the-news (front-run the run-up, fade the event); higher-follower endorser (Musk) = larger move; bull-market regime hugely raises recurrence

pm_gate.rationale: Immediate-lag attention shock with p_up=0.8 and median +200% favors riding the up-leg on the named coin; enter on the mention/volume z-score spike, not after.
pm_gate.scope: the named memecoin only (DOGE/SHIB/large-cap alt); do not generalize to the sector

pm_gate.rationale: Strong bullish prior into the catalyst; size small given the move is parabolic and reverses fast.
Social/volume z-score breakout is the cleanest trigger; volatility expands violently around the catalyst.
On the sell_news_flag flip (scheduled event has occurred and event_day_return < runup_return), fade the unwind for a -20% to -40% reversion.
pm_gate.scope: named coin, only after the scheduled-event sub-state fires

pm_gate.rationale: A parabolic attention spike will stop out short-mean-reversion fades prematurely; widen or disable counter-trend fades until the event passes.
Inventory risk and toxic one-directional flow during the spike; widen quotes and cut size on the named coin (exchange-outage / fill-risk regime).

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (twitter_mention_zscore_24h > 3 AND 1h_volume_zscore > 3) OR (scheduled_event_flag == true AND days_to_event <= 7); bearish_subgate = active AND sell_news_flag == true
backtest_gate.usage: Gate ON momentum-rotation/vol-breakout/directional-long on the named coin while active; use P(up)=0.8 as a directional prior for the up-leg. When bearish_subgate fires, flip to a directional-short / mean-reversion prior (P(down) for the post-event unwind). Use as an entry trigger, not a hold signal — pair with a tight time-stop (24-48h).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Social/Trends z-scores must be computed only from data timestamped BEFORE the decision bar — do not peek at the post-tweet spike when labeling the entry. The sell_news_flag requires the event day to have closed; do not evaluate it before the event window completes. n=5 with measured_fraction=0.0 means magnitudes are web-reported, not internally price-verified — treat the +200% median as a soft prior, not a backtested expectancy.

signals.one_liner: Celebrity tweet/endorsement on DOGE/SHIB: ride the immediate +140-600% attention spike (p_up 0.8) on the named coin, then fade the scheduled-event sell-the-news (-20-40%); edge dies in 24-48h.

signals.name: Launch-Day Parabolic Token (Politician / Pump.fun / Celebrity Coin)
signals.typical_lag: the pump is immediate (minutes); the dump follows within hours to days
signals.typical_duration: peak within 24h; 80-98% collapse over days to weeks
signals.recurrence: extremely high during froth windows — pump.fun launched thousands daily in late 2024 / early 2025; politician coins clustered Jan-Feb 2025
leading_signals: insider/sniper wallets buying seconds-to-minutes before public announcement
pct of supply held by team/top wallets
no liquidity lock / no vesting
concentrated holder distribution (top-10 wallet share)
explosive first-hour volume with vertical price
official figure directly endorsing (legitimacy halo)

active_when: time_since_launch_hours <= 24 AND first_hour_return_pct > 1000% (vertical launch parabola) -> bullish micro-window only
pct_supply_top10_wallets > 60% OR liquidity_locked_flag == false -> structural rug/dump risk HIGH
insider_buy_before_announce_flag == true (wallets bought seconds-to-minutes before public announce, e.g. MELANIA 24 wallets ~2.5min pre-announce)
first_hour_volume_to_marketcap in top decile with concentrated holder distribution -> distribution imminent
BEARISH dominant-state: time_since_launch_hours > 24 AND drawdown_from_ath_pct still small (<30%) -> high probability of continued -80% to -98% collapse
official-figure endorsement (politician/celebrity legitimacy halo) on a token with no vesting
data_sources: on-chain token analytics (Solscan, Birdeye, Bubblemaps for holder concentration)
pump.fun / launchpad APIs (launch time, liquidity-lock status)
mempool/early-block wallet tracing for insider pre-buys
DEX pool data (liquidity depth, LP lock)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: up-leg (first minutes-hours, n=2): median +5022% (range +44% to +10000%, e.g. BOME +10000%); down-leg (n=5): median -89% from peak (p25 -79%, p75 -90%, range -52% to -96%) — politician coins TRUMP/LIBRA/MELANIA all -79% to -96%
move_probability.lag: pump is immediate (minutes); the dump follows within hours to days
move_probability.duration: peak within 24h; 80-98% collapse over days to weeks
move_probability.half_life: the up-leg edge lasts only the first minutes-to-hour; the dominant down-leg expectancy persists for days-to-weeks as insiders distribute and ATH drawdown deepens
move_probability.conditioning: high top-10 wallet share + no liquidity lock + insider pre-buy flag make the post-peak collapse near-certain (LIBRA ~86% of participants lost); legitimacy halo from an official endorser draws a bigger retail bid (bigger dump); only BOME/FARTCOIN-style listing-momentum cases sustain the up-leg

pm_gate.rationale: The ONLY bullish edge is the first-hour parabola for sniper bots that are in pre-announce or in the first blocks; requires sub-second execution and a hard time-stop. Disable for anyone who cannot enter in the first hour.
pm_gate.scope: the named launch token, first <1h only

pm_gate.rationale: Dominant p_down=0.6 with median -89% collapse; short/fade the token after the first-hour peak where borrow/perp exists (e.g. once listed on Hyperliquid), targeting the -80% to -98% drawdown.
pm_gate.scope: named token after time_since_launch_hours > 1-24 and parabola exhaustion

pm_gate.rationale: Late retail longs are a near-pure wealth transfer to insiders; do not buy after the first hour or after any insider_buy_before_announce_flag.
pm_gate.scope: the named token (and all freshly-launched politician/pump.fun coins)

pm_gate.rationale: There is no bounce to fade into — distribution is structural (supply unlock), not a transient liquidity gap; mean-reversion buys catch a falling knife to -96%.
Adverse-selection and rug risk are extreme (LP can be pulled); do not provide passive liquidity on an unlocked, insider-concentrated launch token.
When such launches cluster (politician-coin window), treat as a Security/Black-Swan signal for the meme sector and carry a small downside hedge on correlated solana-meme exposure.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: snipe_window = (time_since_launch_hours <= 1 AND first_hour_return_pct > 1000%); short_window = (time_since_launch_hours > 1) AND (pct_supply_top10_wallets > 60% OR liquidity_locked_flag == false OR insider_buy_before_announce_flag == true)
backtest_gate.usage: Use snipe_window to gate ON memecoin-sniping with a hard intra-hour time-stop (prior P(up) only in the first hour). Use short_window to gate ON directional-short and gate OFF directional-long/mean-reversion/market-making, applying P(down)=0.6 and a -89% median target as the move-probability prior. Apply per-token, never to the broad book.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Survivorship/listing bias is severe: pump.fun launches thousands of tokens daily and most never get price history — backtesting only on tokens that reached a CEX (TRUMP/BOME) massively overstates the up-leg. Build the universe from ALL launches at t=0, not from those that survived. drawdown_from_ath_pct and holder-concentration must use only data available at the decision bar; insider_buy_before_announce_flag is observable on-chain in real time but must be tagged from blocks BEFORE the public announce timestamp. n=5, measured_fraction=0.14 — down-leg is well-evidenced (5 instances), up-leg is thin (n=2) and dominated by one +10000% outlier.

signals.one_liner: Fresh launch token (politician/pump.fun/celebrity): snipe-only in the first hour, then short/avoid — p_down 0.6 with a median -89% collapse to insiders; late longs and market-making are wealth transfers.

signals.name: Memecoin Season as a Late-Cycle Risk-On Top Signal
signals.typical_lag: froth peak leads the broad top by days to a few weeks
signals.typical_duration: sector drawdown plays out over months; -75% to -80% peak-to-trough in memecoin market cap
signals.recurrence: once per major cycle (2021, late-2024/early-2025); froth peaks recurred each bull phase
leading_signals: memecoin sector market cap at record + as a rising share of total crypto mcap
launchpad (pump.fun) daily revenue at record highs
politician/celebrity coins launching (peak novelty, then novelty exhaustion)
joke coins (Fartcoin) at ATHs
memecoin share of total mcap above a high threshold
negative funding flips / BTC dominance starting to rise

active_when: memecoin_sector_marketcap_zscore > 2 (sector at record) AND memecoin_share_of_total_crypto_mcap above its high threshold / rising
pumpfun_daily_revenue_zscore > 2 (launchpad revenue at record, e.g. ~$15M/day Jan 2025) AND new_token_launches_per_day at record
politician_celebrity_coin_count_30d > 0 (peak-novelty politician/celebrity coins launching) AND joke coins (Fartcoin) at ATHs
altseason_index in euphoria zone AND btc_dominance_rate_of_change turning POSITIVE (capital starting to rotate back to BTC)
CONFIRMATION of top: memecoin_mcap_drawdown_from_ath > 10-15% off the froth peak with negative funding flips
spike-and-fade pattern: violent intra-month meme runups (PEPE/BONK/FLOKI +40-77%) that round-trip to negative month-close

move_probability.expected_abs_move: down-leg (n=8): median -67.5% (p25 -47.5%, p75 -79%); memecoin SECTOR mcap -75% to -80% peak-to-trough; BTC broad-market correction ~-50% (one measured -53% in 2021); late-cycle DOGE/large-meme draws -19% to -87%. Residual up-spikes (n=6) median +27.8% but round-trip (e.g. Jan-2026 PEPE +77% -> ~flat; WIF +2000% before -60%)
move_probability.lag: froth peak LEADS the broad top by days to a few weeks
move_probability.duration: sector drawdown plays out over months; -75% to -80% peak-to-trough in memecoin market cap
move_probability.half_life: slow-burn — once the top-signal fires, the bearish forward 1-6 month bias persists; intra-month meme rallies are violent but fully round-trip (spike-and-fade)
move_probability.conditioning: rising BTC dominance + negative funding flips CONFIRM the rotation out of risk and strengthen the bearish forward bias; a LIBRA-style scandal/blowup accelerates exhaustion; this is a contrarian top signal — peak euphoria is the sell, so do NOT chase the late meme spike

pm_gate.rationale: Froth-peak signal precedes a multi-month sector/broad drawdown; bias trend systems to the short/flat side on alts and the meme sector once BTC.D turns up.
pm_gate.scope: memecoin sector + large-cap alts; keep BTC trend neutral-to-long-flat

pm_gate.rationale: Late-cycle meme momentum spikes round-trip to negative (Jan-2026 every name closed red); long-momentum rotation into memes is a top-buying trap here.
p_down=0.6 with a -67.5% median sector down-leg; build short/underweight on the highest-beta memes after the froth-peak confirmation.
Distribute into euphoric retail; trim long beta across alts and memes, rotate residual exposure toward BTC.
Peak memecoin froth is a late-cycle risk-on top that has preceded -50% broad-market crashes (2021 BTC -53%); carry downside hedges on the broad book.
Realized vol is about to expand as the sector deflates; cut gross to hold the vol budget through the drawdown.
Crowded long-funding flips negative as the unwind begins; flatten meme/alt funding-carry to avoid being caught long in the deleveraging.
Buying the dip in a structural -75% sector deflation catches a falling knife; disable long-side reversion on memes/alts until drawdown stabilizes and BTC.D rolls over.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (memecoin_sector_marketcap_zscore > 2 AND memecoin_share_of_total_crypto_mcap > high_threshold) AND (pumpfun_daily_revenue_zscore > 2 OR politician_celebrity_coin_count_30d > 0); confirmed_top = active AND btc_dominance_rate_of_change > 0 AND memecoin_mcap_drawdown_from_ath > 10%
backtest_gate.usage: When active, apply a bearish forward-return prior (P(down)=0.6 over 1-6 months) to the alt/meme book: gate OFF momentum-rotation and long mean-reversion on memes/alts, gate ON tail-hedge and directional-short tilts, and reduce long beta. confirmed_top hardens the short bias and triggers funding-carry flatten. Use as a slow regime gate, not an entry trigger.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Avoid look-ahead in defining the 'peak': sector-mcap z-score, dominance ROC, and drawdown_from_ath must be computed only from data up to the decision bar — labeling the top with future ATH knowledge is the classic hindsight trap. The forward-bear edge needs the signal to fire BEFORE the broad top (lead = days-to-weeks), so backtest the forward 1-6 month return measured strictly after the fire date. n=5 instances, measured_fraction=0.5 — down-leg magnitudes are partly price-verified; the up-spikes (n=6) include extreme outliers (WIF +2000%) that should be down-weighted as they round-trip.

signals.one_liner: Peak memecoin froth (record sector mcap, pump.fun revenue, politician/joke coins at ATH) is a contrarian late-cycle top: bias short/flat alts+memes, enable tail-hedges, expect a -67% to -80% sector deflation over months.

signals.name: TGE / Airdrop Sell-the-News Dump
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes to first 24-72h)
signals.typical_duration: weeks to months; many never reclaim debut price (W, ZK, SCR, BLAST, STRK, IP)
signals.recurrence: Near-universal for VC-backed L1/L2 and infra airdrops 2023-2026. The default expectation for any farmed airdrop.
leading_signals: pre-market/IOU perp price far above implied airdrop FDV
high points-farming TVL with mercenary (non-sticky) capital
low or absent anti-sybil controls / no per-wallet claim cap
large % of supply unlocked at TGE to farmers vs locked to insiders
spike in exchange inflows (deposit netflow z-score) right as claims open
community complaints about allocation fairness pre-launch

active_when: days_since_tge <= 7 AND token is a VC-backed / farmed L1/L2/infra airdrop
tge_airdrop_pct_of_total_supply >= 7 (free-cost-basis float hitting market at claim)
premarket_perp_price_vs_debut_open_ratio >= 1.3 (pre-market/IOU perp anchored far above implied airdrop FDV)
exchange_inflow_netflow_zscore_first_24h > 2 (claim-driven deposit spike)
anti_sybil_present_boolean == false OR per_wallet_claim_cap_present_boolean == false
pct_airdrop_wallets_selling_first_48h > 30 (Nansen-style) once observable
data_sources: Hyperliquid + Binance/Bybit pre-market & IOU perp feeds

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named coin: median -53.6% from open, IQR -26% to -67%, tail to -80% over 1-7d; per-asset: PUMP ~-60%, XPL ~-69%, JUP ~-68%, IP ~-80%, STRK ~-50%, ZK ~-27%, SCR ~-32%, EIGEN ~-12%, BLAST ~-8%
move_probability.lag: immediate — open is the high; first leg within minutes to first 24-72h
move_probability.duration: weeks to months; many never reclaim debut price (W, ZK, SCR, BLAST, STRK, IP)
move_probability.half_life: most of the move lands in 48-72h; the day-1/day-7 dump is the high-signal window, then the edge decays into slow bleed
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by no anti-sybil + no claim cap + high pre-market premium + high % unlocked to farmers; blunted when a large fraction of recipients do NOT deposit to exchanges (EIGEN ~68% non-depositing kept the move small at -12%)

pm_gate.scope: the newly-launched named coin, day 0 to day 7
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0 over 11 instances; open is the structural high. Short the debut pop or fade strength on a no-cap/no-anti-sybil farmed airdrop.

pm_gate.scope: the named coin during the TGE window
pm_gate.rationale: Buying the debut pop is the losing side; longs are the FOMO retail absorbing farmer supply at the top.
No mean to revert to — there is no price history and the fair value is far below the hype open; reversion buys catch a falling knife.
Launch momentum is a one-way down move after the open; trend models keyed off the debut spike will be whipsawed.
Funding can be wildly positive into the dump (pre-market longs) then flip; spot is collapsing under the perp. Carry is dominated by realized spot loss.
Directional vol expansion is to the downside; trade the breakdown not the breakout.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_tge <= 7) AND (tge_airdrop_pct_of_total_supply >= 7) AND ((anti_sybil_present_boolean == false) OR (per_wallet_claim_cap_present_boolean == false) OR (premarket_perp_price_vs_debut_open_ratio >= 1.3))
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that enables directional-short / disables directional-long+mean-reversion on the named coin, and as a strong P(direction) prior P(down|active) ≈ 1.0 with expected drawdown ~ -50% median. Scale short conviction by (premarket_premium, airdrop_pct, NOT pct_recipients_non_depositing).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: premarket_perp_price and airdrop_pct are known at/before the open, but pct_airdrop_wallets_selling and exchange_inflow_zscore only become observable AFTER claims open — do not use the 48h sell-rate to take a day-0 position (look-ahead). Use only pre-open structural features (allocation %, caps, anti-sybil, pre-market premium) for the entry decision; use the realized-flow features only to size adds intraday.

signals.one_liner: Farmed VC airdrop TGE = sell-the-news: open is the high, ~-54% median over days; short the debut, disable longs/mean-reversion on the coin (EIGEN-style high non-depositing rate is the only mitigant).

signals.name: Launch-Pump-and-Hold (Fair-Launch / Revenue-Backed)
signals.typical_lag: hours to days for initial pump; momentum persists weeks
signals.typical_duration: 2-8 weeks of outperformance, then reverts to market beta
signals.recurrence: Rare. Requires no-VC fair-ish distribution + real revenue. HYPE is the canonical case; most launches do NOT qualify.
leading_signals: zero private investor / VC allocation (no insider cliff)
protocol has real, measurable revenue/fees pre-launch
large % of recipients NOT depositing to exchanges (low sell intent)
small initial float / high reserved-for-future emissions
rising open interest with positive funding but spot leading perps

active_when: vc_allocation_pct == 0 (no private investor / insider cliff)
protocol_revenue_run_rate_usd > 0 with measurable pre-launch fees
pct_recipients_not_sending_to_exchange high (e.g. > 60%, low sell intent)
initial_circulating_float_pct low (small float, high reserved emissions)
spot_volume_vs_perp_volume_ratio >= 1 (spot leading perps) AND rising OI with positive funding
days_since_tge <= 14 (the structurally bullish launch window)
data_sources: exchange spot vs perp volume + funding/OI (Hyperliquid, Binance)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named coin upside: median +89%, IQR +56% to +140%, min +50%, tail to +730% (HYPE); per-asset HYPE ~+421% median, JTO ~+150%, MOVE ~+66%, INIT ~+50%, PYTH ~+33% (one -12% pullback observed)
move_probability.lag: hours to days for initial pump; momentum persists weeks
move_probability.duration: 2-8 weeks of outperformance, then reverts to market beta
move_probability.half_life: edge concentrated in the first 1-3 weeks; decays as float unlocks and the launch narrative fades into broad-market beta (MOVE later collapsed)
move_probability.conditioning: requires ALL of: zero VC, real revenue, low sell intent. Amplified by small float + spot leading perps. FRAGILE and rare — n=5; misclassifying a VC-backed launch into this bucket is the dominant risk. Reverts hard once unlocks begin.

pm_gate.scope: the named coin, day 0 to ~3 weeks, only if zero-VC + real-revenue confirmed
pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0 over 5 instances; no insider cliff + small float + revenue means launch demand outweighs supply. Buy/hold the launch window.
Launch momentum persists for weeks — this is one of the rare TGE setups where trend-following the debut works.

pm_gate.scope: the named coin during the launch window
pm_gate.rationale: Shorting a fair-launch revenue token into a small float with a buyback bid is the losing side (see HYPE short squeezes).
Funding may stay positive but spot is leading and trending up; short-the-perp carry fights the move. Prefer spot exposure.
Realized vol is extreme on the upside; tight vol-target stops get shaken out of a valid up-trend.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (vc_allocation_pct == 0) AND (protocol_revenue_run_rate_usd > 0) AND (initial_circulating_float_pct < median_launch_float) AND (days_since_tge <= 21)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate that flips directional bias to LONG on the named coin and enables momentum-rotation; as a P(direction) prior P(up|active) ≈ 1.0 but with WIDE magnitude dispersion (median +89%, fat right tail). Size by inverse-float and revenue-multiple. This is the explicit INVERSE gate to tge-sell-the-news — the vc_allocation_pct==0 + revenue check is what separates the two.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: vc_allocation_pct and revenue run-rate are known pre-launch (point-in-time safe). pct_recipients_not_sending_to_exchange is only observable post-claim — use it to confirm/scale, not to enter. Beware survivorship: n=5 and the bucket is curated around winners; do not over-fit conviction. The reversion-to-beta after week ~8 (MOVE collapse) is a look-back hazard if the backtest holds too long.

signals.one_liner: Rare fair-launch + real-revenue + zero-VC TGE pumps and holds (median +89%, HYPE +730%): tilt long / enable momentum on the coin for ~3 weeks — but n=5, fragile, and only if the no-VC+revenue gate truly passes.

signals.name: Points-Farming Meta - Pre-Launch Inflow & Post-Airdrop Outflow
signals.typical_lag: inflow builds over weeks/months pre-snapshot; outflow within days of snapshot/claim
signals.typical_duration: TVL/activity reversion over days to weeks post-airdrop
signals.recurrence: Was dominant 2023-mid-2024 (EigenLayer, Blast, restaking/LRTs, Solana farms); structurally decayed after EIGEN disappointment but recurs around every major anticipated launch (Plasma deposits 2025).
leading_signals: announced points program without confirmed tokenomics
TVL/deposit growth far outpacing organic usage (fees-per-TVL falling)
concentration of deposits in 'farmable' assets right before rumored snapshot
on-chain transaction count rising while unique-user retention is low
social mentions of 'farming' + leverage loops (recursive LRT deposits)

active_when: announced points program WITHOUT confirmed tokenomics (pre-snapshot inflow phase)
tvl_growth_rate_pre_tge high AND fees_to_tvl_ratio falling (mercenary, non-organic capital)
deposit_concentration_gini rising into rumored snapshot
unique_active_address_retention_30d low while transaction count rises
recursive_leverage_loop_flag == true (LRT/restaking loops)
OUTFLOW phase: days_to_expected_snapshot <= 0 (snapshot/claim passed) → expect tvl_drawdown_pct_post_snapshot -30% to -70% and ecosystem-token weakness
data_sources: on-chain explorers (tx count, active addresses, retention)
Nansen / Arkham (deposit concentration, recursive LRT loops)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: post-snapshot downside on the ecosystem/named token: median -15.1%, IQR -12.3% to -41%, range -7.7% to -50%; protocol TVL/activity swings -30% to -70%; per-asset BERA ~-31%, STRK ~-50%, ZRO ~-17%, EIGEN ~-12%, BLAST ~-8%
move_probability.lag: inflow builds over weeks/months pre-snapshot; the tradeable outflow/decline triggers within days of snapshot/claim
move_probability.duration: TVL/activity reversion over days to weeks post-airdrop
move_probability.half_life: outflow shock is fast (days); the meta itself structurally decayed after EIGEN (Oct 2024) but recurs around every major anticipated launch (Plasma 2025)
move_probability.conditioning: downside amplified by high deposit concentration + recursive leverage loops + low fees/TVL; mitigated by claim-friction designs (ZRO proof-of-donation reduced sell pressure). The PRE-snapshot inflow leg is mildly bullish for the ecosystem token; the POST leg is the tradeable bearish event.

pm_gate.rationale: Mercenary TVL drains within days of claim; falling TVL/activity leads token weakness. Short on the outflow signature (deposit drain + retention collapse).

pm_gate.scope: the airdropped/ecosystem token in the post-snapshot window
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0, median -15%; farm-and-dump at protocol level pressures the token as activity evaporates.
Buying post-snapshot is fading the farmer exit; activity and TVL are mechanically rolling over.
The decline is structural (capital leaving), not a dip to buy.

pm_gate.scope: the ecosystem token during the PRE-snapshot inflow phase only
pm_gate.rationale: Dry-powder injection lifts activity/sentiment before the snapshot; ride the inflow but exit before/at the snapshot.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: post_snapshot_active = (days_to_expected_snapshot <= 0) AND (tvl_growth_rate_pre_tge >= high_threshold) AND (fees_to_tvl_ratio < low_threshold) AND (unique_active_address_retention_30d < low_threshold); pre_snapshot_active = (points_program_announced AND tokenomics_unconfirmed AND days_to_expected_snapshot > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Two-phase gate. PRE: mild long/on-chain-flow tilt on the ecosystem token. POST: short / disable-long gate with P(down|post_snapshot) ≈ 1.0, magnitude prior ~ -15% median (token) / -30% to -70% (TVL). Use deposit_concentration_gini + recursive_leverage_loop_flag to scale, and claim_friction_flag (e.g. proof-of-donation) to DAMPEN the short.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: days_to_expected_snapshot relies on a RUMORED/announced snapshot date — using the actual confirmed snapshot date is look-ahead. tvl_drawdown_pct_post_snapshot and retention_30d are realized AFTER the event; they cannot be used to enter at the snapshot — only the pre-snapshot inflow features (TVL growth, fees/TVL, gini) are PIT-safe for the entry. Beware regime decay: the meta weakened post-EIGEN, so a static gate over-fires on 2023-mid-2024 data.

signals.one_liner: Points farming = pre-snapshot mercenary inflow (mild long) then post-snapshot farm-and-dump (median -15% token, -30/-70% TVL): tilt long into the snapshot, flip short on the drain — claim-friction designs blunt it.

signals.name: Revenue-funded buyback flywheel (usage -> token demand)
signals.typical_lag: continuous (block-by-block); compounds over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: persists while trading volume/fees stay high; reverses on a volume downturn
signals.recurrence: structural/ongoing per protocol with a buyback mandate; a growing 2025-2026 tokenomics meta
leading_signals: protocol fee revenue + buyback wallet on-chain accumulation
token outperformance vs BTC (decoupling)
perp/spot volume trend (the flywheel's fuel)
FDV-to-annualized-revenue multiple
social dominance / attention spikes

active_when: buyback_pct_of_revenue high (e.g. ~99% for HYPE Assistance Fund) AND on-chain buyback wallet actively accumulating
protocol_fee_revenue_30d high and stable/rising (the flywheel fuel)
buyback_qoq_change >= 0 (buybacks NOT contracting)
token_return_minus_btc_return > 0 over trailing 30d (decoupling upward)
perp/spot volume trend rising
FLYWHEEL-REVERSAL warning: buyback_qoq_change strongly negative (e.g. -40% QoQ) AND volume downturn → demand bid fading
data_sources: on-chain buyback wallet tracking (Assistance Fund address, Arkham/Nansen)
protocol revenue dashboards (DefiLlama, Hyperliquid stats, OpenSea volume)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: protocol token upside when flywheel ON: +82.9% observed (HYPE May 2026 to ATH, n=1 up); HYPE per-asset median ~+45% across moves; downside leg ~-7.3% on volume pullback; SEA recorded flat/TBD (design-confirmed, not yet measurable)
move_probability.lag: continuous (block-by-block); compounds over weeks-months
move_probability.duration: persists while trading volume/fees stay high; reverses on a volume downturn
move_probability.half_life: long while volume holds (multi-month decoupling) — but reflexive: buybacks scale with volume, so the bid and the half-life both collapse when volume rolls over (HYPE buybacks -40% QoQ Q3-25→Q1-26)
move_probability.conditioning: bullish/decoupling-up while fee revenue and volume are high; flips to no-edge/flat (or downside beta) on a volume downturn. p_flat=0.5 reflects the SEA pending/unmeasured case and the reflexive reversal risk — NOT a symmetric bet.

pm_gate.scope: the buyback-mandate token (HYPE, and peers with confirmed high buyback_pct_of_revenue) while revenue/volume rising
pm_gate.rationale: Mechanical, price-insensitive buy bid can decouple the token UPWARD even while majors fall (HYPE +82.9% while BTC -13.6%).
Shorting a token with a structural mechanical bid is the losing side; shorts get squeezed while the venue is used.
The decoupling produces persistent relative-strength momentum vs majors.

pm_gate.scope: the buyback token ONLY on confirmed volume downturn (buyback_qoq_change strongly negative)
pm_gate.rationale: The flywheel reverses reflexively when volume drops — the structural bid fades and the token gives back relative strength.
Decoupling is directional, not a clean vol signal; keep standard sizing.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: bullish_active = (buyback_pct_of_revenue >= 0.5) AND (protocol_fee_revenue_30d rising) AND (buyback_qoq_change >= 0) AND (token_return_minus_btc_return > 0); reversal_active = (buyback_qoq_change <= -0.30) AND (volume_30d_change < 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use bullish_active as an ON gate enabling directional-long + momentum-rotation vs BTC and disabling shorts on the buyback token, with a P(up) > P(down) tilt (n=2, asymmetric, NOT a coin flip — the p_flat=0.5 is the unmeasured SEA case). Use reversal_active to flip: enable shorts / flatten longs when buybacks contract on falling volume.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Quarterly buyback figures are reported with a LAG — using a quarter's buyback total before it is publicly disclosed is look-ahead; use trailing on-chain buyback-wallet accumulation (real-time) instead. token_return_minus_btc_return is trailing/PIT-safe. Tiny sample (n=2, one of which is unmeasured SEA): treat as a regime tilt, not a high-conviction prior. fdv_to_revenue_multiple can be stretched at the top (entering late risks buying the reflexive peak).

signals.one_liner: Revenue→buyback flywheel (HYPE Assistance Fund, ~99% of fees) gives a mechanical bid that decouples the token UP while majors fall (+82.9%): tilt long / disable shorts while volume rises — but it reverses reflexively when buybacks contract (-40% QoQ).

signals.name: Pre-IPO / synthetic-asset perp oracle-failure flash crash
signals.typical_lag: instant (single-block oracle print)
signals.typical_duration: minutes (often partial recovery once the bad print clears)
signals.recurrence: rising as pre-IPO/prediction/synthetic-equity perps proliferate (Hyperliquid Ventuals, Bitget preSPCX, etc.)
leading_signals: single-oracle dependency for an illiquid underlying
upcoming corporate action (split/dividend) on the referenced asset
thin order-book depth + high open leverage
low median position margin (retail-skewed)

active_when: oracle_source_concentration high (single-oracle dependency for an illiquid underlying)
pending_corporate_action_flag == true on the referenced asset (split / dividend / IPO event imminent)
underlying_liquidity_depth low (thin order book, no public benchmark)
open_leverage_ratio high AND median_position_margin low (retail-skewed, e.g. ~$31 median margin in SPACEX-USDH)
contract is a pre-IPO / synthetic-equity / prediction perp (Ventuals, Bitget preSPCX, etc.)
data_sources: perp venue oracle config (Notice.co, single-source feeds)
corporate-action calendars for the referenced asset (split/dividend/IPO)
venue order-book depth + open-interest / margin telemetry (Hyperliquid, Bitget)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: the specific pre-IPO/synthetic perp: ~-45% to -80% in minutes (SPACEX-USDH -45% on Hyperliquid, preSPCX ~-80% on Bitget on the same split); the platform token (HYPE) is UNAFFECTED / flat
move_probability.lag: instant — single-block oracle print
move_probability.duration: minutes; often partial recovery once the bad print clears (SPACEX-USDH $2,277→$1,254→~$2,169 in ~30 min)
move_probability.half_life: minutes — the dislocation is a single-block artifact that mean-reverts as soon as the oracle corrects
move_probability.conditioning: triggered by a corporate action hitting a single-oracle illiquid underlying; contained to the affected contract — does NOT propagate to the platform token or other markets. Severity scales with open leverage and how badly the oracle mishandles the action.

pm_gate.scope: the specific pre-IPO/synthetic perp around a pending corporate action
pm_gate.rationale: A single-block -45% to -80% liquidation flush can wipe leveraged longs; do not hold leveraged exposure into a split/dividend on a single-oracle contract.

pm_gate.scope: the specific pre-IPO/synthetic perp, ONLY as a fast post-print snap-back fade with hard size caps
pm_gate.rationale: The artifact reverts within minutes (recovered to ~$2,169 from $1,254) — a disciplined reversion fade of the bad print can capture the snap-back, but only with tiny size given oracle/liquidation risk.

pm_gate.scope: the affected synthetic perp immediately after the cascade clears
pm_gate.rationale: The -45% is a forced-liquidation artifact, not fair value; fading the washout once the print corrects is the edge.
Contained microstructure failure — HYPE held near highs; no contagion hedge needed at the portfolio level.

pm_gate.scope: any synthetic/pre-IPO perp with high oracle concentration
pm_gate.rationale: Latent single-block gap risk is not captured by realized vol; cut size on these contracts pre-emptively.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (contract_type IN {pre_ipo_perp, synthetic_equity_perp, prediction_perp}) AND (oracle_source_concentration >= high) AND (pending_corporate_action_flag == true) AND (underlying_liquidity_depth <= low) AND (open_leverage_ratio >= high)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a RISK gate: disable leveraged directional exposure on the named contract into the corporate action, and arm a fast liquidation-fade / mean-reversion fade of the single-block print (minutes-horizon, hard size cap). P(down|active) ≈ 1.0 for the contract; P(contagion to platform token) ≈ 0. Scope strictly to the affected contract.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: pending_corporate_action_flag is known IN ADVANCE from a corporate-action calendar (PIT-safe) — this is what makes the gate predictive. The exact crash magnitude and recovery are NOT knowable pre-event; the fade leg must be a reactive minutes-horizon rule, not a sized-to-known-bottom bet. n=1 (SPACEX-USDH) measured + 1 cross-venue corroboration (preSPCX) — treat as a structural/mechanistic gate, not a statistically rich prior.

signals.one_liner: Single-oracle pre-IPO/synthetic perps flash-crash -45% to -80% in one block on a mishandled corporate action then snap back in minutes (HYPE itself unaffected): disable leverage into the event, arm a fast liquidation-fade of the print, scope strictly to the contract.

signals.name: Pre-priced approval 'sell-the-news' then structural re-rating
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-to-hours on the event); structural inflow effect over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: sell-off 1-3 weeks; structural re-rating 1-9 months
signals.recurrence: once per product launch (BTC spot ETF, ETH spot ETF); recurs as new vehicles get approved
leading_signals: rising implied volatility / funding rates into the decision date
futures-basis blowout (annualized basis >15-20%)
spike in 'days_to_decision' search/social volume
exchange BTC balances declining pre-event
Polymarket/Kalshi approval-odds approaching ~100%

active_when: days_to_known_decision_date <= 7 AND approval_odds_prediction_market >= 0.90 (anticipation/pre-event phase — long the rumor)
event_fired == TRUE AND days_since_decision <= 21 (post-approval window — fade the news on the named asset)
futures_annualized_basis >= 0.15 (15-20%+ basis blowout signals crowded pre-positioning into the date)
perp_funding_rate_zscore_pre_event >= 2 over the 5 sessions into the decision
implied_vol_term_structure_slope inverted (front IV bid above back) into the event date
exchange_netflow_zscore < -1.5 (BTC balances declining into event = accumulation, structural-bullish tail)
STRUCTURAL re-rate phase: etf_net_inflow_usd_daily_post_event positive and rising for >= 3 consecutive weeks post-launch

move_probability.expected_abs_move: On the named asset (BTC/ETH): up-leg median ~50% (IQR 39-61%) over the structural 6-12mo re-rate; down-leg median ~19.5% (IQR 18-21%) in the 1-3wk post-approval dump. BTC median abs move ~44.5%, ETH ~25%. Two distinct phases, not symmetric.
move_probability.lag: Dump immediate (minutes-to-hours on the approval print); structural inflow re-rating builds over weeks-to-months
move_probability.duration: Sell-off 1-3 weeks; structural re-rating 1-9 months
move_probability.half_life: Sell-the-news decay ~1-2 weeks (mean-reverts as forced profit-taking exhausts); structural inflow edge persists for months while ETF flows stay net-positive
move_probability.conditioning: Dump amplified when pre-event funding/basis are stretched (z>2, basis>20%) and IV is rich — crowded longs unwind. Structural up-leg conditional on positive sustained ETF inflows; if first-month flows disappoint (ETH-ETF July-2024 pattern), the dump extends and re-rate is delayed.

pm_gate.rationale: Trade both legs: long the anticipation (days_to_decision<=7, odds>=90%), then flip to fade the named asset post-approval. The whole archetype is the playbook for this class.
Post-approval sell-the-news dump (median -19.5%) on the named asset within 1-3 weeks; short into the print after odds hit ~100%.
pm_gate.scope: named asset only (BTC or ETH being approved)

pm_gate.rationale: Pre-event basis/funding blowout (>15-20%) is a crowding signal that reverses violently on the news; carry collectors get caught in the unwind.
Realized vol spikes around the event; vol-targeting auto de-grosses, but force it ahead of a known date.
Known catalyst date with rich front IV — long gamma / straddle into the print captures the post-event range expansion regardless of direction.
Structural up-leg is driven by persistent ETF net inflows; go directional-long the named asset once post-event daily inflows are positive for 3+ weeks.
After the 1-3wk washout completes and exchange balances keep declining + ETF inflows positive, ride the structural re-rate (median +50%).

backtest_gate.gate_expression: phase_anticipation = (days_to_known_decision_date BETWEEN 0 AND 7) AND (approval_odds_prediction_market >= 0.90); phase_dump = (event_fired == TRUE) AND (days_since_decision <= 21); phase_rerate = (event_fired == TRUE) AND (etf_net_inflow_usd_daily_post_event > 0 for >=15 trading days)
backtest_gate.usage: Use phase_dump as an on/off gate that ENABLES directional-short / event-driven-fade on the named asset and DISABLES funding-carry, with P(down)=0.50 but asymmetric magnitude (median -19.5%). Use phase_rerate as a gate enabling directional-long/etf-flow-following with magnitude prior median +50%. P(up)=P(down)=0.50 means direction is regime-gated by phase, NOT a standalone coin-flip — do not trade the event flag unconditionally.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: approval_odds and basis are known pre-event, but the post-event etf_net_inflow figures publish with a 1-day lag — do not use same-day flow to time the dump. The decision DATE is known in advance (no look-ahead) but the OUTCOME is not until the print; never backfill the approval result into pre-event bars. n=2 only — treat magnitudes as wide priors, not point estimates.

signals.one_liner: Telegraphed ETF approvals: long the rumor, short the news on the named asset (median -19.5% over 1-3wk), then ride the ETF-inflow structural re-rate (median +50%) — fade crowded funding/basis into the print.

signals.name: Pro-crypto policy regime shift (election / executive pivot)
signals.typical_lag: immediate (overnight) and continuing for days-to-weeks
signals.typical_duration: weeks to a few months of sustained trend
signals.recurrence: rare / episodic — tied to major political or executive events
leading_signals: prediction-market odds shifting toward the pro-crypto outcome
crypto-linked equities (COIN, MSTR) front-running
rising open interest with positive funding
campaign/policy statements (e.g. Bitcoin Conference promises)

active_when: policy_announcement_event_flag == TRUE OR election_outcome_dummy flips pro-crypto (overnight surprise)
prediction_market_odds_delta >= +15pts toward the pro-crypto outcome within 24h (front-running phase)
crypto-linked equities COIN/MSTR up > +5% in a session leading spot (equity front-run)
perp_open_interest_change > +10% with funding_rate_zscore > +1 (shorts being squeezed, OI building long)
altcoin_btc_beta_30d elevated AND total_market_cap_excl_btc_change > BTC change (alt-led broad re-rate)
data_sources: Truth Social / White House feeds (executive posts/EOs)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Up-leg median ~28% (IQR 12.5-54%, range 5-125%) across affected assets; down-leg (the EO 'sell-the-news' sub-case) median ~5.5%. By asset: BTC median ~19%, SOL ~17.8%, XRP ~18.2%, ADA ~64.5%, DOGE ~125%. Smaller/meme alts move multiples of BTC.
move_probability.lag: Immediate (overnight) and continuing for days-to-weeks
move_probability.duration: Weeks to a few months of sustained trend (genuine surprise) — but a confirmatory EO with 'no new buying' can sell-the-news within 1-2 days
move_probability.half_life: Genuine regime surprise: edge persists weeks (slow short-covering + institutional repositioning). Detail-disappointment leg (named-coin reserve with no actual purchases): mean-reverts within ~3 days (Mar-2025 round-trip).
move_probability.conditioning: Bias is strongly bullish and alt-beta-amplified ONLY on genuine surprise (election win, first-time named-coin endorsement). FLIPS to the -5.5% sell-the-news case when the announcement merely confirms priced-in expectations or reveals no actual buying (EO funded with seized BTC). Memecoins/small named alts have the fattest right tail; BTC is the most muted.

pm_gate.rationale: Broad reflexive re-rating of the asset class's regulatory risk premium; bullish 0.67 with alt beta. Tilt long total market, overweight high-beta named alts.
pm_gate.scope: BTC + large-cap alts + named coins + memecoins

pm_gate.rationale: Move is broad and trending over weeks; rotate into the highest-beta names (alts, memes) that capture the de-risk disproportionately.
Fattest right tail lives in memes/small named coins (DOGE +125%, ADA +64.5%) on political endorsement; this is the regime where meme-sniping is on.
Genuine regime shift produces weeks-to-months of sustained trend — CTA/trend models catch the leg.
Downside-tail hedges bleed in a reflexive bullish squeeze; trim while the regime is risk-on. Re-arm if the catalyst is a confirmatory EO at risk of sell-the-news.
Shorts are forced to chase in the squeeze (analog: forced-liquidation, reflexive-deleveraging); flatten shorts on a genuine surprise.
Fading a regime-shift breakout is the wrong side; disable counter-trend on affected names during the trending leg. (Re-enable specifically for the EO detail-disappointment round-trip.)

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (policy_announcement_event_flag == TRUE OR election_outcome_dummy == 1) AND (prediction_market_odds_delta >= 0.15 OR surprise_flag == TRUE); subcase_sell_the_news = active AND (announcement_confirms_priced_in == TRUE OR no_new_purchase_committed == TRUE)
backtest_gate.usage: Use `active` as a tilt-long / enable gate for momentum-rotation, trend-following, memecoin-sniping with P(up)=0.67 prior and alt-beta-scaled magnitude (size positions by altcoin_btc_beta_30d). Flip to a SHORT-bias prior (P(down) leg, magnitude ~5.5%) under subcase_sell_the_news. Apply the 0.67/0.33 split as a Bayesian direction prior weighted by whether the event is a genuine surprise vs a confirmation.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Election/EO outcomes are unknown until they fire — never backfill the result into pre-event bars; only prediction_market_odds_delta is available pre-event. Distinguishing 'genuine surprise' from 'priced-in confirmation' must be derived from pre-event prediction-market odds (high prior odds => confirmation => sell-the-news), NOT from hindsight. n=3 events / n=9 up-observations; ADA/DOGE tails are single-instance — do not over-fit magnitude.

signals.one_liner: Pro-crypto political/executive surprise: broad reflexive risk-premium re-rate (P_up 0.67), alt-beta amplified (memes/named coins move multiples of BTC) — but a confirmatory EO with no new buying flips to a ~5.5% sell-the-news round-trip.

signals.name: Idiosyncratic regulatory de-risking of a named coin
signals.typical_lag: immediate (hours)
signals.typical_duration: days to weeks; can mark a durable regime change for that asset
signals.recurrence: episodic per asset; XRP repeatedly re-rated on Ripple-SEC milestones
leading_signals: news/rumor of regulator departure or settlement
litigation docket dates
options skew normalizing for the named asset
the asset's discount-to-peers narrowing
social-volume spike on the specific ticker

active_when: regulator_departure_event_flag == TRUE OR litigation_milestone_date hit with favorable/settlement read (named asset)
single_asset_social_volume_zscore > 2 on the specific ticker (idiosyncratic attention spike)
coin_idiosyncratic_return_vs_btc > +5% in 24h with BTC roughly flat (decoupling = the tell)
single_asset_open_interest_change > +20% on the named coin's perps
options skew normalizing (put skew compressing) for the named asset
accounting_rule_change_flag == TRUE (e.g. SAB-122 / FASB fair-value — structural, low immediate spot)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Up-leg median ~13.8% (IQR 8.1-19.4%, range 2.5-25%); the canonical hard de-risk (XRP/Gensler-exit) printed +25% in 24h. Pure accounting/structural de-risks (SAB-122, FASB) tend to be flat on spot (~2.5% / noise). No measured down cases.
move_probability.lag: Immediate (hours)
move_probability.duration: Days to weeks; a settlement/regulator-exit can mark a durable regime change for that asset
move_probability.half_life: Sharp event-driven impulse decays over days; if it marks a structural overhang removal (litigation settled) the re-rate can be durable (no decay). Accounting de-risks have no spot half-life — they enable a slow structural demand channel.
move_probability.conditioning: Magnitude scales with how large the priced-in discount was: a coin carrying a heavy securities-law overhang (XRP) re-rates hardest (+25%). Move is idiosyncratic (low BTC correlation) — that decoupling is the entry confirmation. Pure compliance/accounting changes (SAB-122, FASB) are structural-only and produce flat spot — do not expect a tradeable spot pop.

pm_gate.rationale: Single-name regulatory overhang removal is a clean asset-specific catalyst; long the named coin on the de-risk headline.
pm_gate.scope: the named coin (e.g. XRP) + closely-related peers

pm_gate.rationale: Bullish 0.67 / zero measured downside; tilt long the specific de-risked asset, sized to its discount-to-peers.
Idiosyncratic social + OI spike on the single ticker is the on-chain/flow signal to follow into the named asset.
Do not fade a durable overhang-removal re-rating on the named coin; the move can be regime-changing, not mean-reverting.
pm_gate.scope: the named coin only (rest of book unaffected)

pm_gate.rationale: Shorts predicated on the regulatory overhang are now offside; flatten on the de-risk signal.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (regulator_departure_event_flag == TRUE OR litigation_milestone_favorable == TRUE) AND (coin_idiosyncratic_return_vs_btc > 0.05) AND (single_asset_social_volume_zscore > 2); structural_only = (accounting_rule_change_flag == TRUE)
backtest_gate.usage: Use `active` as a single-name long gate (P_up 0.67, P_down ~0, magnitude median ~14%, scaled by the asset's prior discount-to-peers); apply only to the named coin and its peers, NOT the broad book. Treat `structural_only` as NO-spot-trade (gate OFF for spot strategies) — it informs a slow structural-demand prior, not a directional bet.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Litigation/personnel outcomes are unknown until announced — gate must trigger on the headline timestamp, not the docket date. Long the freshly-legitimized sector (ETH median +25% on GENIUS); keep BTC weight neutral since it is already regulatorily clean.

backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Distinguish a throttle from a sovereign ban AT decision time using btc_global_return and jurisdiction share — a local-amplified print can look like a crash on local venues; do not mislabel using local-venue prices as if global. The structural volume drain (-70-82%) is only knowable days/weeks after the effective date — do not use it to label the announcement-day trade.

signals.one_liner: India/Nigeria-style tax or access throttle: jurisdiction-contained — global price ~flat (67%), only a transient local price gap (-13-17%) and a permanent local volume drain (-70-82%); a NO-TRADE for the global book, an arb/MM-pullback signal locally.

signals.name: Deregulation / Crackdown Reversal (the inverse, 2024-2026)
signals.typical_lag: immediate on the named token; broader regime re-rating over weeks-months
signals.typical_duration: can be durable (regime change) rather than a transient pop
signals.recurrence: Episodic, tied to legal milestones and political regime change; clustered 2024-2026
leading_signals: court rulings against the regulator (e.g. Fifth Circuit Tornado Cash ruling)
change in administration / SEC chair (enforcement-cadence regime change)
exchange relisting announcements
settlement / dismissal headlines
litigation-discount narrowing in token's price vs peers

active_when: regulatory_event_flag == 'deregulation_reversal' AND (lawsuit_dropped_or_settled_flag == true OR sanctions_lifted_flag == true OR relisting_announced_flag == true) for the previously-targeted token
court ruling AGAINST the regulator on the named matter (e.g. Fifth Circuit Tornado Cash) — leading signal
change in administration / SEC chair → policy_regime_dummy flips pro_crypto (enforcement-cadence regime change)
prior_litigation_discount_pct large (token traded at a discount to peers due to the overhang) — bigger snap-back fuel
relisting announcement by a major US venue for the previously-delisted token
token_24h_return spiking positive on the dismissal/relief headline
data_sources: court dockets / PACER, Fifth Circuit rulings
SEC newsroom (dismissal stipulations), Treasury/OFAC press releases
peer-relative pricing to compute litigation-discount (CoinGecko sector indices)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named token +40% to +100%+ on full relief; up-leg distribution median 32.5%, p25 18.8%, p75 46.2%, min 5%, max 60% (TORN ~+60% on the day; COIN ~+5% on a partial/equity reaction)
move_probability.lag: immediate on the named token (intraday); broader regime re-rating over weeks-to-months
move_probability.duration: can be DURABLE (regime change) rather than a transient pop — the overhang clears permanently when the case is dropped/sanctions lifted
move_probability.half_life: initial pop half-life ~days, but the re-rating leg is durable for weeks-months if it reflects a true regime shift (vs a single milestone)
move_probability.conditioning: magnitude scales with prior_litigation_discount_pct (the bigger the suppressed discount, the bigger the snap-back) and with policy_regime_dummy = pro_crypto (a regime flip is more durable than a one-off ruling); upside CAPPED if residual overhang remains (e.g. TORN devs' criminal charges still pending). This is the dominant 2024-2026 pattern, inverting the category's historical bearish bias.

pm_gate.scope: the previously-targeted token + named peers (SOL/ADA/MATIC on SEC dismissals, privacy tokens on sanctions relief)
pm_gate.rationale: p_up=1.0; buy the overhang-clearing snap-back, sized by prior_litigation_discount_pct.
The reversal headline is the catalyst — go long the litigation-discount unwind and relisting beneficiaries.
Shorts pricing in permanent regulatory damage are the losing side on relief; cover/flatten any short into the headline.
Do not fade the re-rating — it can be a durable regime move, not mean-reverting; disable reversion shorts on the name.

pm_gate.scope: relief-beneficiary basket (previously-named tokens, exchange tokens, privacy tokens)
pm_gate.rationale: On a pro-crypto regime flip, rotate the book toward the de-rated names that now lose their overhang.

pm_gate.scope: the named token + broad sentiment if regime-wide
pm_gate.rationale: A durable up-leg on a regime change is a clean trend signal; let trend models ride the re-rating.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (regulatory_event_flag == 'deregulation_reversal') AND (lawsuit_dropped_or_settled_flag OR sanctions_lifted_flag OR relisting_announced_flag) AND (prior_litigation_discount_pct > 0) AND (policy_regime_dummy == 'pro_crypto' OR ruling_against_regulator == true)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate scoped to the previously-targeted token (+ named peers): enable directional-long / event-driven / momentum-rotation and flatten shorts. P(direction) prior: P(up | active) = 1.0 on the named token, magnitude scaled by prior_litigation_discount_pct and capped by any residual_overhang_flag (pending criminal charges etc.).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Only n=2 measured instances and confidence is medium — small sample. At decision time, distinguish a binding dismissal/sanctions-lift (tradable) from a mere procedural delay or rumor. Do not let knowledge of the eventual durable 2025-2026 pro-crypto regime leak into pre-2024 labels — before the regime flip the base rate for this archetype firing was near zero. Watch for residual overhang that caps upside.

signals.one_liner: Crackdown reversal (2024-2026 inverse): dropped lawsuits / lifted sanctions / relistings clear the overhang and re-rate the previously-targeted token +30-60%+ — go long the litigation-discount unwind, flatten shorts; durable on a true regime flip but only n=2 measured.

signals.name: Spot ETF launch day / approval 'sell the news'
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours; full drawdown plays out over days
signals.typical_duration: 1-2 weeks to the local trough, then recovery
signals.recurrence: fires once per major product launch (BTC Jan 2024, ETH Jul 2024, HK Apr 2024); a recurring template for every future first-of-kind spot ETF launch (e.g. SOL, XRP)
leading_signals: asset rallies 20-60% in the weeks INTO the approval/launch date
perpetual funding rates elevated / positive heading into launch
options skew bid for calls into the event date
legacy trust (GBTC/ETHE) discount to NAV has collapsed toward zero pre-launch (arbitrage primed to unwind)

active_when: days_to_etf_launch (signed, calendar) in [-30, +14] for a first-of-kind spot ETF on the named asset (BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP/ZEC etc.)
trailing_30d_return_into_event >= +20% (anticipatory rally; 20-60% band is the danger zone)
funding_rate_zscore_at_event > +1.5 (perp funding elevated/positive into launch = crowded long)
legacy_trust_discount_to_nav_pct has compressed to within ~2% of 0 pre-launch (arbitrage primed to unwind)
options 25d call skew bid into the event date (call IV - put IV > 0)
ACTIVE bearish window opens at t=0 (launch/approval print) and runs t+1..t+14
data_sources: congressional/SEC EDGAR + issuer S-1/S-3 calendar for launch dates
Hyperliquid + CEX funding APIs (Coinglass) for funding zscore
Farside/SoSoValue for launch-day ETF volume & flow
Grayscale/issuer NAV pages for trust discount

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named-coin down case median ~17% (p25 6.4%, p75 31.5%) over 1-2wk; BTC ~14%, ETH ~20%, SOL ~30%; rare anticipation-phase up case (ZEC pre-approval) ~180%; weak-flow launch (HK) ~0%
move_probability.lag: immediate to hours on the print; full drawdown plays out over days
move_probability.duration: 1-2 weeks to local trough, then recovery
move_probability.half_life: ~7-10 days; edge largely spent by t+14
move_probability.conditioning: amplified when into-event rally >40%, funding zscore high, and trust discount fully closed; FLIPS to no-edge/flat when day-one real flows are weak (HK template: AUM/inflows far below US peers) — sell-the-news needs a crowded long to unwind. Anticipation (pre-approval) phase can still rally hard; the bearish bias is on the actual launch/approval print, not the filing.

pm_gate.scope: the launching asset and large-cap alts in the 0..t+14 window
pm_gate.rationale: sell-the-news local top; trim anticipatory longs before the catalyst realizes

pm_gate.scope: launching asset on the print when into-event rally >40% + high funding + closed trust discount
pm_gate.rationale: 60% down probability, median ~17% drop over 1-2wk

pm_gate.scope: perp longs collecting funding on the launching asset
pm_gate.rationale: crowded positive funding unwinds into the event; reflexive deleveraging risk
momentum signals are at peak right at the catalyst; high reversal risk

pm_gate.scope: buy-the-dip on launching asset after t+7..t+14 washout
pm_gate.rationale: typical recovery after 1-2wk trough; fade the overshoot
realized vol spikes around the event; cut gross to hold risk budget
wait for the post-launch sustained-flow signal to take over; launch-day volume != net demand

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_to_etf_launch BETWEEN 0 AND 14) AND (trailing_30d_return_into_event >= 0.20) AND (funding_rate_zscore_at_event >= 1.0) AND (legacy_trust_discount_to_nav_pct >= -2.0); weak_flow_override = (launch_day_etf_total_volume_usd < 0.1 * median_us_launch_volume) -> set bias flat
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an event-window short/long-trim gate on the launching asset: gate directional-short ON and directional-long/momentum size DOWN inside the window; apply P(down)=0.60 directional prior. After t+7 flip to a mean-reversion buy gate. As a Bayesian prior: P(down | active & crowded-long) ~ 0.6, but condition on real day-one flow (weak flow -> flat).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Launch dates are known in advance (no look-ahead) but day-one ETF volume/flow and final into-event return are only knowable at/after the print — do not use post-launch flow to define the gate at t<0. measured_fraction is low (0.38) and the single up case is a pre-approval anticipation rally (ZEC), not a launch — do not let it contaminate the launch-print prior.

signals.one_liner: First-of-kind spot ETF launch into a crowded 20-60% rally = sell-the-news: 60% down, ~17% median drop over 1-2wk on the named coin — trim longs, flatten funding carry, tilt short on the print, then buy the t+7-14 washout (unless day-one real flows are weak, then flat).

signals.name: Sustained daily net inflows (bullish) / net outflows (bearish)
signals.typical_lag: same-day to 1-3 days (flow tends to lead/coincide with price)
signals.typical_duration: as long as the streak persists — days to several weeks
signals.recurrence: ongoing and continuous — flows are reported every trading day; multiple distinct streaks per year
leading_signals: consecutive-day net flow streak (sign and length)
single-day flow magnitude crossing prior records (>$1B in / >$500M out)
IBIT (BTC) / ETHA (ETH) flow dominance — the bellwether funds
rolling 5-day cumulative flow zscore
flow divergence from price (flows turning while price flat = leading signal)

active_when: BULLISH: flow_streak_length_days >= +3 (consecutive net-inflow days) AND rolling_5d_cum_flow_usd > 0 AND flow_zscore_60d > +1
BEARISH: flow_streak_length_days <= -3 (consecutive net-outflow days) AND rolling_5d_cum_flow_usd < 0 AND flow_zscore_60d < -1
record-flag amplifier: single_day_flow_vs_trailing_max >= 1.0 (>$1B in for BTC / >$500M out) marks accelerating regime
ibit_or_etha_share_of_flow > 0.5 (bellwether fund confirming the direction)
LEADING tell: flow_to_price_correlation_20d high AND flow sign turns while price flat (flow leads price)
data_sources: Farside Investors daily ETF flow tables

move_probability.expected_abs_move: inflow (up) regime median ~16.5% (p25 12.1%, p75 36.2%, max 60.2%) over the streak; BTC inflow ~16.5%, ETH inflow ~36-40%; outflow (down) regime median ~19.6% (p25 19%, p75 22.9%) — outflows hit harder per episode than inflows
move_probability.lag: same-day to 1-3 days; flow tends to lead or coincide with price
move_probability.duration: as long as the streak persists — days to several weeks
move_probability.half_life: decays when the streak breaks / outflow_decay slows; ~the streak length itself
move_probability.conditioning: INFLOW bull case is amplified by record single-day prints (e.g. $1.38B post-election) and a risk-on macro backdrop; DEGRADES to a mere price floor (not a driver) in a risk-off regime — Apr-2026 ETH had a 10-day inflow streak yet fell ~40% YTD. OUTFLOW bear case is amplified by macro risk-off + leverage (reflexive: redemptions remove the marginal bid, longs get liquidated). Read the SIGN of the streak as the regime switch.

pm_gate.scope: BTC, ETH (the funds that exist); long on positive streak, short/flat on negative streak
pm_gate.rationale: this IS the strategy class — 78% up given a sustained inflow streak; flow leads price

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH on positive flow streak + flow_zscore>1
pm_gate.rationale: sustained inflows = structural marginal buyer reinforcing the trend
inflow regimes coincide with grind-higher; rotate into the bellwether asset (ETH inflow moves are larger, ~36%)

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH on a -3 day+ outflow streak with record outflow flag
pm_gate.rationale: outflow regime median ~19.6% drawdown; structural bid collapse

pm_gate.scope: perp longs on the affected asset when the flow streak turns negative
pm_gate.rationale: reflexive deleveraging — vanishing bid liquidates longs; carry no longer compensated

pm_gate.scope: affected asset after an outflow-driven washout when outflow_decay_slope flattens
pm_gate.rationale: exhaustion of forced selling marks a bottoming signal

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH during an active record outflow streak
pm_gate.rationale: do not fade a trending structural-bid-removal regime; flow is reflexive/trend-reinforcing

pm_gate.scope: book-level during sustained outflow + macro risk-off
pm_gate.rationale: outflow regimes cluster with broad deleveraging (Nov-2025 IBIT record outflow)

backtest_gate.gate_expression: long_active = (flow_streak_length_days >= 3) AND (rolling_5d_cum_flow_usd > 0) AND (flow_zscore_60d >= 1); short_active = (flow_streak_length_days <= -3) AND (rolling_5d_cum_flow_usd < 0) AND (flow_zscore_60d <= -1); risk_off_dampener = (btc_60d_return < 0) -> treat inflow streak as floor not driver (cap long sizing)
backtest_gate.usage: Primary directional gate for etf-flow-following / trend / momentum on BTC & ETH. Long gate uses P(up)=0.78; short gate uses the outflow bias (~19.6% median drawdown). Use flow_streak_length and flow_zscore as the on/off switch and as a continuous P(direction) prior. In a confirmed risk-off macro regime, downgrade inflow longs to floor-only (reduce size) — inflows do not reverse a downtrend.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Daily net flow is reported with a ~1 business-day lag (T+1 settlement reporting) — at decision time on day D you only have flow through D-1. Build features on lagged flow only; do NOT use same-day flow that publishes after the close. Highest measured_fraction (0.79) and n=9 make this the cleanest signal in the category.

signals.one_liner: Sustained spot-ETF flow streak is the marginal-buyer regime switch: a >=3-day inflow streak is 78% up (~16% BTC / ~36% ETH over the run) — enable flow-following/trend long; a >=3-day outflow streak is bearish (~19.6% median drawdown) — tilt short, flatten funding carry, enable tail-hedge. In risk-off, inflows are only a floor, not a driver.

signals.name: Converted legacy trust structural outflow (GBTC / ETHE)
signals.typical_lag: begins day 1 of conversion; heaviest in first 2-4 weeks
signals.typical_duration: front-loaded over ~6-10 weeks then decays to equilibrium
signals.recurrence: once per converted trust (GBTC Jan 2024, ETHE Jul 2024); a template for any future closed-end-to-ETF conversion
leading_signals: trust discount-to-NAV collapsing toward 0% pre-conversion (signals imminent arbitrage unwind)
trust fee far above competing ETFs (fee gap drives rotation)
daily trust outflow magnitude and its decay rate (slowing = exhaustion / bottoming signal)
trust AUM as % of total category AUM

active_when: a high-fee closed-end trust (GBTC 1.5% / ETHE 2.5% / future analog) has just converted to an open-ended ETF: conversion_day >= 0
trust_discount_to_nav_pct_pre_conversion had collapsed toward 0 in the weeks before (arbitrage primed)
trust_fee_minus_min_competitor_fee_bps large (>100bps) — fee gap drives rotation to IBIT/ETHA
gbtc_or_ethe_daily_outflow_usd is large and dominates total category netflow (trust_outflow_share_of_total_category_netflow > 0.5)
ACTIVE through ~weeks 1-10; heaviest weeks 1-4
EXIT/exhaustion: outflow_decay_slope_5d flattens toward 0 (forced selling exhausting) AND cumulative_trust_outflow_vs_initial_aum_pct high
data_sources: Farside/SoSoValue per-fund flow tables (GBTC, ETHE line items)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: down case median ~27.7% (p25 23.9%, p75 31.5%, min 20%, max 35.4%); BTC episode ~20%, ETH episode ~35.4% (ETH amplified by the Aug-2024 yen carry crash, so not purely trust-attributable)
move_probability.lag: begins day 1 of conversion; heaviest first 2-4 weeks
move_probability.duration: front-loaded over ~6-10 weeks, then decays to equilibrium
move_probability.half_life: ~3-4 weeks (front-loaded); decays as discount-buyers are flushed
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by a larger fee gap and larger trust AUM share; the mechanical sell pressure is sentiment-independent so it persists even on neutral tape. The down magnitude can be overstated when a macro crash coincides (ETH/ETHE + Aug-2024 carry unwind) — separate the mechanical trust outflow from concurrent macro. n=2 only (both bearish), so treat the 100% down as a small-sample directional template, not a calibrated probability.

pm_gate.scope: the converting asset (BTC at GBTC conversion, ETH at ETHE) during weeks 1-4
pm_gate.rationale: mechanical, sentiment-independent forced supply; both historical instances were ~20-35% down

pm_gate.scope: converting asset during peak outflow weeks
pm_gate.rationale: structural sell pressure caps upside until outflows decay

pm_gate.scope: converting asset — but read NET-of-trust flow
pm_gate.rationale: aggregate net flow runs negative because trust outflows swamp new-fund inflows; do not misread it as demand collapse forever
slowing daily outflows is the bottoming signal — fade the final washout

pm_gate.scope: converting asset after cumulative trust outflow > ~50% of initial AUM and decay slope flattening
pm_gate.rationale: buy the exhaustion bottom; GBTC outflows slowed and BTC recovered by Apr 2024

pm_gate.scope: converting asset perp longs during heavy outflow weeks
pm_gate.rationale: persistent spot sell pressure pins price; long carry under-compensated

pm_gate.scope: converting asset during peak outflow if it coincides with macro risk-off
pm_gate.rationale: trust outflow + macro crash compounded the ETH drawdown to 35%

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_trust_conversion BETWEEN 0 AND 70) AND (trust_outflow_share_of_total_category_netflow >= 0.5) AND (gbtc_or_ethe_daily_outflow_usd > 0); exhaustion = (outflow_decay_slope_5d >= 0) AND (cumulative_trust_outflow_vs_initial_aum_pct >= 50) -> flip short gate OFF, mean-reversion/liquidation-fade ON
backtest_gate.usage: Gate directional-short / reduce-longs on the converting asset during the active window; apply a strong P(down) directional prior (small sample, treat as bearish template not precise probability). Critically, decompose: gate on TRUST-SPECIFIC outflow share, not headline aggregate net flow, so it doesn't conflict with the sustained-flow signal. Use the decay-slope exhaustion flip to switch to mean-reversion/liquidation-fade longs.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Conversion date is known in advance. Per-fund (GBTC/ETHE) daily outflow publishes T+1 — use lagged values. The biggest hazard is attribution: ETH's -35% overlapped the Aug-2024 yen carry-trade crash, so a naive backtest will over-attribute the move to ETHE outflow; control for a concurrent macro/cross-asset crash dummy. n=2 and measured_fraction=0 — do not over-fit magnitude.

signals.one_liner: A high-fee legacy trust (GBTC/ETHE) converting to an ETF unleashes mechanical, sentiment-independent forced selling — both historical cases ~20-35% down over weeks 1-10: tilt short / trim longs on the converting asset, then flip to mean-reversion + liquidation-fade when the daily outflow decay slope flattens (exhaustion bottom). Gate on trust-specific outflow share, not headline net flow.

signals.name: Algorithmic / reflexive death-spiral depeg
signals.typical_lag: immediate to hours once the peg cracks; full collapse over 1-7 days
signals.typical_duration: terminal — days to a week to reach near-zero; no recovery
signals.recurrence: recurring; ~once every 6-18 months a notable algo design fails (2021 IRON, 2022 UST/USDD, 2025 xUSD/deUSD)
leading_signals: unsustainably high fixed yield (Anchor 19.5%, IRON farms hundreds of percent)
large single-address withdrawals from the anchor pool/farm
Curve/AMM pool tilting heavily to the stablecoin side
stablecoin trading 0.98-0.99 persistently before the break
concentration of backing in one risky counterparty (Stream Finance)
sister-token price rolling over while stablecoin still ~pegged

active_when: stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1usd < -0.01 sustained for > 30min AND collateralization_ratio_below_1 == true (uncollateralized/algo design) -> ARMED
sister_token_supply_growth_rate (24h) > 50% OR circulating_supply_zscore_of_sister_token > 3 -> CONFIRMED death-spiral (reflexive minting active)
