anchor_or_pool_TVL_outflow_24h > 20% of pool TVL combined with dex_pool_imbalance_pct > 70% on the stablecoin side -> bank-run in progress
deposit_apy_vs_market_apy_spread > 10pp (unsustainable yield, e.g. Anchor 19.5%) flags the asset as a candidate to PRE-ARM before any break
share_of_supply_in_single_yield_venue > 50% (concentration) raises severity
TRIGGER-SHORT: sister-token rolling over (>15% 24h drawdown) WHILE stablecoin still ~0.99 = earliest actionable short window on the sister token
data_sources: on-chain (token total-supply / mint events, e.g. Etherscan/Tron/LunaCQ)
DeFi lending dashboards (Morpho/Euler/Silo exposure for contagion)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Named stablecoin -50% to -100% (median -35%, IQR -20% to -98%); sister/gov token -95% to -100% (LUNA -100%, TITAN -100%, deUSD -98%, xUSD -74%); contagion spillover BTC ~-33%, ETH ~-35%, USDT venue wick ~-8% (only in canonical/largest events like Terra)
move_probability.lag: immediate to hours once peg cracks; sister-token roll-over can precede the stablecoin break by hours-to-days
move_probability.duration: terminal — 1-7 days to near-zero; no recovery for the algo coin
move_probability.half_life: edge on the depeg itself is gone once near-zero (~3-7 days); contagion-hedge edge persists 1-2 weeks; pre-break short-the-sister-token signal decays within 24-48h of confirmation
move_probability.conditioning: amplified by high leverage/revolving loans on the design (2025 deUSD), high supply concentration in one yield venue, broad risk-off backdrop, and weekend/off-hours thin liquidity; the bigger the coin's market cap and DeFi-lending footprint, the larger the cross-market contagion

pm_gate.scope: the sister/governance token (LUNA/TITAN/ENA-class, deUSD/xUSD issuers) and the named algo stablecoin via perps
pm_gate.rationale: p_down=1.0, terminal collapse; sister token hyperinflates to zero — highest-conviction short in the taxonomy once minting confirmed
canonical events (Terra) cascaded -33% BTC / -35% ETH via CeFi/DeFi-lending contagion; buy downside protection on the broad book

pm_gate.scope: any carry using the depegging coin or its ecosystem as margin/collateral
pm_gate.rationale: collateral value evaporates and venues raise margin / delist; carry breaks down catastrophically

pm_gate.scope: stablecoin-yield / cash-and-carry positions backed by the affected coin or by exposed lending vaults (Morpho/Euler/Silo)
pm_gate.rationale: yield-bearing stablecoin and revolving-loan exposure turns to bad debt; exit before redemptions freeze

pm_gate.scope: the algo stablecoin and its sister token
pm_gate.rationale: no floor — 'buy the depeg' is a value trap; this is NOT a reserve-backed coin that reverts to par
fading the cascade fails — supply hyperinflation means no exhaustion bottom

pm_gate.scope: large-cap alts during the contagion window
pm_gate.rationale: broad-market drag during the canonical episodes; de-risk long book

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (collateralization_ratio_below_1 == TRUE) AND (stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1usd <= -0.01 for >=30min) AND ((sister_token_supply_growth_rate_24h > 0.50) OR (circulating_supply_zscore_of_sister_token > 3)) ; severity_high = active AND (anchor_or_pool_TVL_outflow_24h > 0.20 OR share_of_supply_in_single_yield_venue > 0.50)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a hard ON gate to DISABLE mean-reversion/liquidation-fade/carry on the affected ecosystem and to ENABLE directional-short on the sister token + tail-hedge on the broad book. As a Bayesian prior set P(down|active)=1.0 for the named coin and sister token (terminal), and a contagion prior P(down|severity_high) on BTC/ETH/large-cap alts skewed bearish (~-30% tail for largest-cap algo coins).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Supply-growth and TVL-outflow features must be lagged to on-chain confirmation time (block timestamp), not the date the collapse is later labeled. deposit_apy_vs_market_apy_spread is the only true LEADING (pre-break) feature; avoid using post-hoc 'this was an algo coin' labels — derive collateralization_ratio from the contemporaneous design/reserve disclosures available at decision time. Beware survivorship: only events where minting was on-chain-observable in real time are tradeable.

signals.one_liner: Algo/reflexive stablecoin spiral: once the peg cracks and the sister token starts hyperinflating, it goes terminal (to ~zero) — short the gov token, tail-hedge the broad book, and never buy the depeg.

signals.name: Fiat/asset-backed reserve-shock depeg
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-hours of disclosure); worst during banking off-hours / weekends
signals.typical_duration: hours to days; full recovery if reserves are real, permanent partial loss if not
signals.recurrence: recurring; clustered around banking/custodian stress events
affected_scope: stablecoins sharing its collateral (DAI, FRAX held USDC)
leading_signals: disclosure of reserve held at a stressed bank/custodian
issuer pausing or slowing redemptions
prominent insolvency accusation against the issuer
collateral concentration in illiquid/RWA assets vs cash
downstream protocols (Maker, Frax) carrying large balances of the coin

active_when: stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1usd < -0.02 coincident with a disclosure event (reserve_exposure_to_impaired_counterparty_pct > 0 reported, OR redemption_window_open_closed_flag == CLOSED/SLOWED, OR prominent public insolvency accusation) -> ACTIVE
secondary_vs_primary_market_discount widening while redemption window remains nominally open = classic redeem-arb setup (buy discount, redeem at par)
weekend_or_after_hours_flag == TRUE amplifies depth of discount (USDC/SVB worsened over the closed banking weekend)

BACKING-REAL vs BACKING-GONE split: if reserve is liquid cash/T-bills at a solvent backstop -> expect recovery to par; if reserve is illiquid RWA / drained liquid buffer / key-compromise unbacked mint -> expect permanent partial loss
downstream_stablecoin_collateral_overlap_pct > 0 (DAI/FRAX holding the affected coin) arms a second-order depeg on the downstream coins
MACRO READ-ACROSS: if trigger == TradFi banking stress (SVB-type), flip BTC/ETH bias to UP (banking-system hedge)
data_sources: issuer attestations / reserve reports + real-time disclosures (Circle, Tether, First Digital)
DefiLlama (downstream protocol collateral overlap, e.g. Maker/Frax USDC weight)
banking-stress / TradFi news feeds + macro calendar (banking off-hours flag)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Affected stablecoin down: median -18.5% (IQR -13.5% to -34.5%); credible fiat-backed -9% to -25% then recovers (USDC -12%, FDUSD -13% to -24%, DAI -15%, FRAX -12%); impaired/unbacked -49% to -80% permanent (USDR -49%, USR -80%). Issuer gov token (FXS) ~-20%. CONDITIONAL UP: when trigger is TradFi banking stress, BTC +32% / ETH +6.8% (n=2 up moves, median +19.4%)
move_probability.lag: immediate — minutes to hours of the disclosure; worst during banking off-hours / weekends
move_probability.duration: hours to days; full recovery if reserves are real, permanent partial loss if not
move_probability.half_life: redeem-arb edge resolves in ~1-3 days (USDC recovered in ~3d); the BTC banking-hedge tilt persists days-to-weeks while TradFi stress is live; the panic-discount mean-reversion edge decays within hours of credible reserve confirmation
move_probability.conditioning: recovery probability hinges on backing quality — liquid cash + solvent backstop = high recovery; illiquid RWA / drained buffer / key-compromise unbacked mint = permanent loss. Amplified by weekend/after-hours banking closure, by issuer pausing redemptions, and by downstream collateral overlap (DAI/FRAX). The BTC-up read-across only fires for genuine banking-system triggers, not crypto-native fraud/key-comp

pm_gate.scope: credible fiat/cash-backed coins (USDC, FDUSD, DAI, FRAX) trading at a discount with reserves verified solvent — buy-discount / redeem-at-par
pm_gate.rationale: these revert to par once redemptions resume (USDC recovered ~3d); the discount = market's haircut probability, and arb wins when backing is real

pm_gate.scope: impaired RWA-backed / unbacked-mint / drained-buffer coins (USDR, USR-type)
pm_gate.rationale: permanent partial loss — buying the discount here is a value trap; reserves genuinely gone

pm_gate.scope: BTC and ETH WHEN trigger == TradFi banking stress
pm_gate.rationale: documented banking-hedge bid (BTC +32%, ETH +6.8% during USDC/SVB) — risk-on-risk-off read-across flips crypto bid

pm_gate.scope: issuer governance token (MKR/FXS-class) and the affected stablecoin (until recovery confirmed)
pm_gate.rationale: gov token absorbs issuer-solvency risk (FXS -20%); short into the disclosure, cover on reserve confirmation

pm_gate.scope: cash-and-carry / stablecoin-yield positions denominated in or collateralized by the affected coin or its downstream holders (DAI/FRAX)
pm_gate.rationale: collateral value uncertain during window; trim until peg/redemption status resolves rather than full flatten given likely recovery

pm_gate.scope: stable/stable and stable/USD pairs on the affected coin
pm_gate.rationale: venue discounts gap fast; widen quotes/inventory bands to avoid being run over during the panic wick

pm_gate.scope: broad book if reserve impairment looks genuine and coin is systemic (large DeFi-lending footprint)
pm_gate.rationale: real impairment of a major coin can cascade; hedge the contagion tail

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1usd <= -0.02) AND (reserve_disclosure_event == TRUE OR redemption_window_open_closed_flag != OPEN OR insolvency_accusation == TRUE) ; recovery_likely = active AND (reserve_exposure_to_impaired_counterparty_pct low AND backing_is_liquid_cash AND solvent_backstop_present) ; permanent_loss = active AND (backing_illiquid_RWA OR liquid_buffer_drained OR unbacked_mint) ; btc_up_readacross = active AND (trigger_is_tradfi_banking_stress == TRUE)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate selects mean-reversion ON for recovery_likely coins (P(revert-to-par) high, target ~$1) and OFF for permanent_loss coins. Use btc_up_readacross to flip the BTC/ETH directional prior to LONG (P(up) elevated) ONLY for banking-stress triggers. As a prior: P(down) on the stablecoin/gov token at onset, then conditional P(recover) gated on backing quality.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Backing-quality (liquid vs impaired) must be assessed from disclosures available AT the event, not from the eventual outcome — do not leak 'USDC recovered' into the entry decision. reserve_exposure_to_impaired_counterparty_pct is only known once disclosed; gate must trigger on the disclosure timestamp. The BTC-up read-across is conditional on trigger TYPE (TradFi vs crypto-native) classified point-in-time; misclassifying a crypto-native fraud as banking stress flips the sign wrongly.

signals.one_liner: Reserve-shock depeg: fiat/cash-backed coins wobble -9% to -25% then snap back (buy the discount, redeem at par) while impaired/RWA-backed coins lose ~half permanently — and when the trigger is TradFi banking stress, BTC catches a hedge bid (+32% USDC/SVB).

signals.name: Venue-specific liquidity-cascade flash depeg
signals.typical_lag: instantaneous wick; reverts in minutes to a few hours
signals.typical_duration: minutes to hours; usually fully recovered same day
signals.recurrence: frequent; minor venue wicks happen several times a year, severe ones during big liquidation cascades
leading_signals: market-wide forced-liquidation cascade in progress (Oct 10-11 2025)
single-venue order-book depth collapsing
AMM stable-pool weight skewing past ~70/30
high leverage / open interest using the stablecoin as margin
thin weekend/off-hours liquidity

active_when: per_venue_price_vs_aggregate_price_spread > 1% (single venue prints discount while aggregate/redeemable price stays ~$1) -> ACTIVE venue wick
liquidation_volume_zscore_market_wide > 2 (market-wide forced-liquidation cascade in progress) -> severe-wick risk window armed (Oct 10-11 2025)
amm_pool_imbalance_pct > 70% on one side OR exchange_orderbook_depth_within_50bps collapsing -> localized liquidity vacuum
oracle_vs_market_price_divergence elevated AND share_of_stablecoin_used_as_exchange_collateral high -> auto-liquidation propagation risk to leveraged borrowers
open_interest_zscore_at_event high + thin weekend/off-hours liquidity amplifies the wick

CONFIRM-ARB: aggregate/on-chain redeemable price stays within ~1% of $1 while one CEX venue shows a deep discount = mechanical (non-fundamental) dislocation -> buy the wick, redeem/sell at par elsewhere
data_sources: per-venue CEX order books / trade feeds (Binance, Kraken)
aggregate price (CoinGecko/CMC) + on-chain redeemable price (Curve/Uniswap pool quote)
Coinglass/exchange liquidation feeds (market-wide liquidation zscore, OI)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: On the affected VENUE only: median -8.5% (IQR -2.7% to -28.5%, range -0.3% to -40%) — USDe(Binance) -35%, ENA -40%, USDT venue wicks -0.3% to -8%; aggregate/redeemable price ~0% (USDe aggregate -0.9%). Broad-market context during the cascade BTC ~-9%
move_probability.lag: instantaneous wick; the dislocation appears and begins reverting within minutes
move_probability.duration: minutes to hours; usually fully recovered same day
move_probability.half_life: very short — the arb edge exists only for the minutes-to-hours of the wick; time_to_revert_to_peg_minutes is the half-life proxy (typically <60min for liquid coins)
move_probability.conditioning: severity scales with the market-wide liquidation cascade intensity, single-venue depth collapse, AMM skew past 70/30, high leverage/OI using the coin as margin, and thin weekend/off-hours books; revert speed is faster the more liquid the aggregate/on-chain redemption path

pm_gate.scope: the wicked stablecoin on the dislocated venue ONLY, once aggregate/redeemable price confirmed ~$1 (buy the venue wick, exit at par)
pm_gate.rationale: mechanical not fundamental; fast arbs win because the coin stays fully redeemable — highest-EV play in this archetype

pm_gate.scope: assets dumped into the thin venue during the cascade, AFTER liquidation_volume_zscore peaks and rolls over
pm_gate.rationale: venue wick is driven by forced selling into a vacuum; fade the over-extension once the cascade exhausts

pm_gate.scope: active quoting on the affected venue's stable pairs during the wick
pm_gate.rationale: depth collapses and price gaps; widen inventory bands / pull quotes to avoid adverse fills, re-engage as depth returns

pm_gate.scope: perp positions using the wicking stablecoin as margin/collateral on the affected venue
pm_gate.rationale: the wick can auto-liquidate over-collateralized borrowers via oracle/collateral mark-down — cut margin reliance on the coin during the event

pm_gate.scope: the broad market during the underlying liquidation cascade (BTC/ETH/large-cap)
pm_gate.rationale: severe venue depegs coincide with market-wide cascades (Oct 2025, BTC ~-9%); the cascade itself is a tradeable vol event
do NOT short the stablecoin on the wick — it is fully backed and reverts to par; shorting the dislocation is negative-EV

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (per_venue_price_vs_aggregate_price_spread > 0.01) AND (aggregate_redeemable_price within 0.01 of 1.0) AND (collateralization_ratio_below_1 == FALSE) ; severe = active AND (liquidation_volume_zscore_market_wide > 2 OR amm_pool_imbalance_pct > 0.70 OR exchange_orderbook_depth_within_50bps in bottom decile)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate to ENABLE venue-isolated mean-reversion (buy-the-wick) on the dislocated venue with target = par, and to ENABLE liquidation-fade post-cascade. As a prior, P(revert-to-par)~high and P(down sustained)~0 for the redeemable coin — but treat the BROAD market during 'severe' as a bearish vol event (cascade). Position the wick arb only on venues where the on-chain redemption/aggregate path is confirmed liquid.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Critical: the entry signal requires the AGGREGATE/redeemable price simultaneously available at decision time to confirm the wick is venue-isolated (not a true depeg). Do not use end-of-day reverted price to label the wick — use the intra-event per-venue vs aggregate spread. time_to_revert_to_peg is realized only after the fact; do not condition entry on it. Distinguish from algo-death-spiral via collateralization_ratio_below_1 == FALSE at event time — misclassifying a real insolvency wick (xUSD/deUSD) as a flash wick is the dangerous look-ahead failure.

signals.one_liner: Venue-flash depeg: a single exchange wicks a fully-backed stablecoin -8% to -40% during a liquidation cascade while it stays ~$1 redeemable everywhere else — buy the venue wick to par, fade the cascade, never short the coin (confirm collateralization first).

signals.name: Net Mint Expansion (Dry-Powder Injection)
signals.typical_lag: minutes-to-hours on sentiment for large discrete mints; days-to-weeks for the aggregate-supply-growth trend to map onto price
signals.typical_duration: discrete mint pop fades within 24-72h; sustained net-supply expansion can fuel multi-week to multi-month uptrends
signals.recurrence: very frequent — discrete $1B+ USDT mints occur dozens of times per year; sustained-expansion regimes align with each major bull leg (2020-21, late-2024, 2025)
leading_signals: Tether Treasury / Circle mint transactions on-chain (Whale Alert tags)
30-day net change in aggregate stablecoin market cap turning positive / accelerating
USDT minted to Tron/Ethereum 'authorized but not issued' inventory then moved to exchanges
rising stablecoin balances on exchange hot wallets (exchange stablecoin reserves up)
stablecoin market-cap making new ATH while BTC consolidates

active_when: single_mint_size_usd >= 1e9 (discrete Tether/Circle mint tagged on-chain within last 24h) => short-horizon sentiment pop mode
stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change > 0 AND accelerating (30d slope > prior 30d slope) => sustained dry-powder-expansion regime
aggregate_stablecoin_netflow_to_exchanges_zscore > 1.5 over 7d (fresh supply landing on CEX hot wallets, i.e. deployable not idle)
stablecoin_mktcap_at_ath_flag == true WHILE BTC consolidates (ranging, 30d realized range < median) — pent-up fuel
CRITICAL confirmation: regime is risk-ON (BTC 30d return >= 0 OR funding positive); supply growth in risk-OFF (BTC trending down) is idle dry powder, NOT a long trigger
data_sources: Whale Alert (Tether Treasury / Circle mint tags)
on-chain (Tron/Ethereum USDT-USDC supply, exchange hot-wallet balances)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC: discrete >=$1B mint sentiment pop ~0.4-2.5% within hours; sustained-expansion regime BTC median +13.7% (p25 +4.0%, p75 +41.9%, max +311% over multi-month bull legs). Idle-supply (risk-off) case: ~flat (one observed instance, ~$322B record cap with no spot lift while BTC fell 40% YTD).
move_probability.lag: minutes-to-hours on sentiment for discrete >=$1B mints; days-to-weeks for the aggregate-supply trend to map onto price
move_probability.duration: discrete mint pop fades within 24-72h; sustained net-supply expansion fuels multi-week to multi-month uptrends
move_probability.half_life: discrete pop edge decays within ~24-72h; trend edge persists as long as 30d supply growth stays positive — flip off when slope rolls over
move_probability.conditioning: Only directionally tradable when risk-ON (BTC not in a downtrend, funding non-negative). In risk-off, supply growth is idle and the signal goes flat — do NOT chase. Amplified when stablecoin mktcap at ATH while BTC ranges (compressed spring).

pm_gate.rationale: 83% up, zero observed downs; fresh quote-currency buying power lands on order books. Size up only when risk-ON confirmation holds.
Sustained net-supply expansion (positive accelerating 30d change) coincides with multi-week uptrends — let trend models run.
Dry-powder deployment historically rotates into majors then large-cap alts.
Zero observed down moves in expansion regime; shorting into incoming bid is unfavorable.
Expansion is a spot tailwind; carry unaffected unless funding spikes on the FOMO leg (then trim).

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (single_mint_size_usd >= 1e9 AND days_since_last_billion_mint == 0) OR (stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change > 0 AND stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change > lag(stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change,30)); long_enabled = active AND btc_return_30d >= 0
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate for trend-following/momentum/directional-long on BTC and large-caps, and as a P(up)=0.83 directional prior. Two sub-modes: discrete-mint => 24-72h horizon small-magnitude pop; sustained-expansion => multi-week horizon with median +13.7% target. Gate longs OFF the prior when btc_return_30d < 0 (idle-powder regime).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: stablecoin market-cap and on-chain supply must be lagged to settlement/confirmation time — DefiLlama/CryptoQuant figures are revised; use the value known at decision time, not the final revised series. Mint tags from Whale Alert arrive in near-real-time but 'minted-to-inventory' (authorized-but-not-issued) is NOT yet buying power, so only count supply that has moved to exchange wallets. Do not use the next-day supply print to trade the same-day open.

signals.one_liner: Stablecoin mints = incoming buying power: 83% up, 0% down; tilt long BTC/large-caps on accelerating supply growth (multi-week) or discrete >=$1B mints (intraday pop) — but ONLY when risk-on, since idle dry powder doesn't lift price in a downtrend.

signals.name: Net Burn / Redemption Contraction
signals.typical_lag: coincident-to-lagging — supply contraction typically follows the price correction by days, confirming weakness rather than leading it
signals.typical_duration: weeks-to-months; supply contraction regimes persist through bear phases
signals.recurrence: occasional regime-level events — major contractions tied to 2022 bear market and acute redemption scares; routine small burns are frequent but low-signal
leading_signals: 30-day net change in aggregate stablecoin market cap turning negative
large USDT/USDC burns on-chain (Treasury redemptions)
exchange stablecoin reserves declining
USDT market cap falling sharply over days (mass redemption)
stablecoin supply rolling over after a parabolic expansion

active_when: stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change < 0 (aggregate supply contracting over trailing 30d) — primary regime flag
usdt_supply_7d_delta_usd < 0 AND large on-chain burns/redemptions tagged (Treasury redemption transactions)
exchange_stablecoin_reserve_zscore declining (z < -1 over 30d) — dry powder leaving exchanges
supply_peak_drawdown_pct from local max > ~5% (supply rolling over after parabolic expansion)
redemption_volume_usd_per_day elevated (top-decile vs trailing year)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC down: median 13% (p25 8%, p75 31.5%, min 3%, max 50%); per-asset BTC median -31.5% across the two regime contractions (2022). USDT itself ~-3% (brief redemption-scare wobble).
move_probability.lag: coincident-to-lagging — contraction typically follows the price correction by days; it CONFIRMS weakness rather than leading it
move_probability.duration: weeks-to-months; contraction regimes persist through bear phases
move_probability.half_life: slow — the bearish regime label persists until 30d supply change turns positive again; not a fast-decaying signal
move_probability.conditioning: This is a confirmation/regime filter, not a timing trigger — do not initiate fresh shorts solely on it (price has usually already fallen). Strongest when supply rolls over after a parabolic expansion (deleveraging). Routine small burns are low-signal; require the 30d aggregate to be negative.

pm_gate.rationale: Contracting supply confirms a bear regime — bias trend models short / down-only.
Buy-the-dip mean reversion fails when dry powder is draining and there's progressively less bid to absorb selling.
Zero observed up moves in contraction regime; reduce gross long exposure.
Contraction often coincides with the sharpest cycle drawdowns (2022); maintain downside hedges.
Deleveraging regimes carry liquidation-cascade risk; trim leveraged carry.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (stablecoin_mktcap_30d_pct_change < 0) AND (exchange_stablecoin_reserve_zscore < -1 OR supply_peak_drawdown_pct > 5)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an OFF gate for long-biased strategies (mean-reversion on alts, directional-long) and a confirmation tilt-short for trend models; apply P(down)=1.0 as a regime prior NOT a fresh-entry trigger (signal is lagging). Combine with price-trend to avoid shorting an exhausted move.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Supply contraction is coincident-to-lagging: at decision time the BTC drop has typically already happened, so backtests must not credit this signal with leading the move — align the supply print to its actual on-chain confirmation timestamp and verify the price move is forward of the feature, not behind it. Only 2 regime instances (n=2), so down-magnitude stats (n=3) are thin and dominated by 2022.

signals.one_liner: Shrinking stablecoin supply = dry powder draining: 100% down (n=2, lagging confirmation) — use as a bear-regime filter to disable alt mean-reversion and tilt trend short, not as a fresh short trigger.

signals.name: Stablecoin Depeg Shock (Backing-Doubt)
signals.typical_lag: immediate — the market reacts within minutes to hours of the depeg headline
signals.typical_duration: acute phase 24-72h; full peg recovery hours-to-days if backing is real, permanent if not (UST)
signals.recurrence: rare but high-impact — a handful of major events (UST May 2022, USDC Mar 2023, USDe Oct 2025); minor wobbles more frequent
leading_signals: stablecoin secondary-market price deviating >50bps from $1
issuer disclosure of reserve exposure to a stressed counterparty/bank
spiking redemption queue / mint-burn imbalance
Curve/DEX stablecoin pool imbalance (one coin dominating the pool)
rising funding-rate stress and CEX withdrawal spikes

active_when: stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1_bps > 50bps on secondary markets (major stablecoin trading <$0.995) — primary trigger
curve_pool_imbalance_ratio extreme (one coin dominating a major stable pool, e.g. >80%)
issuer disclosure of reserve exposure to a stressed counterparty/bank (headline flag)
redemption_queue_size_usd spiking / mint-burn imbalance
btc_realized_vol_spike_zscore > 2 concurrent with the depeg headline
ESCALATION: max_depeg_depth_pct deepening + no credible backing confirmation => treat as potential terminal depeg (UST-class)
data_sources: issuer disclosures + news feeds (reserve exposure headlines)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: Down moves: median 14.4% (p25 12.6%, p75 31.1%, min 8.7%, max 100%). By scope — depegged coin: -3% to -100% (UST -100%, USDe -35%, USDC -12.5%); BTC -8.7% to -14.5% in acute window (median ~13%); ETH ~-14.3%; SOL ~-19.5%. Recovery up-leg (n=1): BTC +17% off the low when backing confirmed (USDC/SVB).
move_probability.lag: immediate — market reacts within minutes to hours of the depeg headline
move_probability.duration: acute phase 24-72h; full peg recovery hours-to-days if backing is real, permanent if not (UST)
move_probability.half_life: very fast — acute risk-off shock decays within 24-72h; a sharp V-recovery follows if backing is confirmed (USDC Mar-2023: BTC +17% off low)
move_probability.conditioning: Two regimes diverge sharply: (a) cash-backed scare with credible backstop => V-shaped, fade the panic in BTC/ETH after the washout; (b) algorithmic/synthetic with no real backing (UST, USDe-style recursive loops) => no repeg, do NOT fade the suspect coin. Amplified by leverage/recursive-collateral loops (USDe Oct-2025 = largest liquidation day in history).

pm_gate.rationale: Acute market-wide risk-off; downside hedges should already be on, add if depeg is deepening with no backing confirmation.

pm_gate.scope: perps (esp. on the suspect coin and its collateral chains)
pm_gate.rationale: Depegs trigger forced-liquidation cascades and funding stress; flatten leveraged carry to avoid being caught in the unwind.
Do not buy a falling stablecoin or alts mid-cascade — algorithmic depegs go to zero (UST).
Once the liquidation cascade exhausts and backing is credible, fade the panic in majors (BTC V-recovered +17% post-USDC).
Immediate flight-to-safety crushes alts/DeFi hardest in the acute window.
Realized-vol spike (z>2) blows through vol budgets; de-gross to target.

pm_gate.scope: the depegged coin (if algorithmic/synthetic) + DeFi tokens exposed to it
pm_gate.rationale: Synthetic/algo coins with no real backing keep falling; short the suspect coin and direct contagion vectors.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (stablecoin_price_deviation_from_1_bps > 50) AND (btc_realized_vol_spike_zscore > 2 OR redemption_queue_size_usd > threshold); terminal_risk = active AND (coin_type IN {algorithmic, synthetic} OR no_backing_confirmation_within_24h)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an immediate OFF gate for long/carry/mean-reversion across the whole book and P(down)=1.0 directional prior for the acute 24-72h window. Flip a SECOND gate after washout: if backing confirmed (cash-reserve coin), enable liquidation-fade long on BTC/ETH (prior P(up) for the recovery leg, BTC ~+17%). Keep shorting the suspect coin if terminal_risk holds.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: The depeg price deviation is observable in real-time, but 'is it backed?' is NOT known at t0 — backtests must not assume the eventual repeg/no-repeg outcome when sizing the acute trade (look-ahead on the recovery). Split the event into (1) acute-shock window using only info available at the headline, and (2) post-confirmation window. Issuer disclosures (e.g. SVB exposure) are the point-in-time pivot — anchor the V-recovery long ONLY to the timestamp the backstop/backing news actually printed.

signals.one_liner: Stablecoin depeg = instant market-wide risk-off shock: 100% down (BTC -9 to -15%, depegged coin -3 to -100%); flatten carry + flight-to-safety, then fade the washout in BTC/ETH ONLY if backing is confirmed — keep shorting algo/synthetic coins (UST/USDe go to zero).

signals.name: Low SSR / Loaded Exchange Reserves (Positioning Indicator)
signals.typical_lag: days-to-weeks — a positioning indicator, not a precise timing trigger
signals.typical_duration: the bullish deployment phase can run weeks-to-months once dry powder is confirmed loaded
signals.recurrence: cyclical — low-SSR readings clustered at the mid-2021, late-2022, and 2024 rebound phases
leading_signals: SSR falling to historically low band (cited ~13-21 range at cycle bottoms)
SSR oscillator below lower Bollinger band
rising exchange stablecoin reserves concurrent with low SSR (confirms accumulation vs outflow)
stablecoin market cap rising while BTC consolidates (SSR compressing for bullish reason)

active_when: ssr_value in historically low band (cited ~13-21 at cycle bottoms) AND ssr_zscore_vs_trailing_2y < -1
ssr_oscillator_bollinger_position below lower Bollinger band
MANDATORY disambiguation: exchange_stablecoin_reserve_30d_change > 0 (low SSR caused by stablecoin ACCUMULATION, not BTC outflows) — only then bullish
stablecoin market cap rising while BTC consolidates (SSR compressing for the bullish reason)
INVERTED/INVALID when low SSR is driven by BTC market-cap collapse + capital leaving (exchange reserves falling) — signal flips to neutral/bearish (2026-01 case)
data_sources: CoinGecko / DefiLlama (BTC mktcap, stablecoin mktcap for ratio)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC up (n=2): median +52.5% (p25 +51.2%, p75 +53.8%, min +50%, max +55%) over multi-month rebounds (2022-bottom and 2024 pre-election). One flat/invalid case (2026-01, low SSR from outflows). All estimates — low-confidence magnitudes.
move_probability.lag: days-to-weeks — a positioning indicator, not a precise timing trigger
move_probability.duration: the bullish deployment phase can run weeks-to-months once dry powder is confirmed loaded
move_probability.half_life: slow — the setup persists until SSR normalizes back into mid-band or supply stops growing; not a same-day signal
move_probability.conditioning: ONLY bullish when accompanied by genuine stablecoin accumulation (exchange reserves rising). A low SSR produced by BTC outflows is a false signal — the 33% flat outcome is exactly this inverted case. Use as a regime/positioning tilt, pair with a price-trigger (breakout/MA cross) for timing.

pm_gate.rationale: Loaded dry powder relative to BTC cap historically precedes multi-month rebounds (median +52.5%) — accumulate, but only with reserve-direction confirmation.
Positioning supports the next up-leg; let trend entries fire once price confirms.
Low-SSR at oscillator extremes is a positioning mean-reversion setup (oversold dry-powder spring).
Sidelined stablecoin liquidity can overwhelm shorts on deployment; trim short exposure.
Positioning signal alone doesn't justify removing hedges, especially given the inverted-signal failure mode.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (ssr_zscore_vs_trailing_2y < -1 OR ssr_oscillator_bollinger_position < lower_band) AND exchange_stablecoin_reserve_30d_change > 0
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a long-bias positioning tilt (P(up)=0.67) for directional-long / trend / mean-reversion on BTC, NOT a standalone entry — require a price-confirmation trigger. The exchange_stablecoin_reserve_30d_change > 0 clause is essential: it disambiguates accumulation (bullish) from outflow-driven low SSR (the flat/invalid 33% case).
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: SSR is a slow positioning indicator with days-to-weeks lag, so do not expect same-bar response. Critical look-ahead hazard: do not use the eventual rebound to label the SSR reading bullish — many low-SSR prints are outflow-driven and lead nowhere (2026-01). Compute the reserve-direction confirmation using only data available at the SSR reading date. Magnitudes are all estimates (n=2, all low-confidence), so treat the +52.5% as a weak prior, not a target.

signals.one_liner: Low SSR = full fuel tank (BTC cheap vs stablecoin pile): 67% up / 33% flat, multi-month BTC rebounds (~+50% est.) — but ONLY if exchange stablecoin reserves are RISING; a low SSR from BTC outflows is a false signal, so always pair with reserve-direction confirmation.

signals.name: Moving-average regime cross (golden/death cross, 200-DMA loss/reclaim)
signals.typical_lag: lagging — the cross prints days-to-weeks AFTER the price move; the 200-DMA break itself reacts within hours
signals.typical_duration: regime label persists weeks to months; the acute stop-cascade on a 200-DMA loss plays out in 1-3 days
signals.recurrence: BTC has printed multiple death crosses 2018-2025; 200-DMA tested multiple times per cycle
leading_signals: 50-DMA flattening and converging toward 200-DMA
price closing below 200-DMA on rising volume
50/200 spread narrowing to within 1-2%
200-DMA slope turning negative

active_when: death_cross ACTIVE when sma_50_minus_sma_200_spread crosses from positive to negative (days_since_50_200_cross between 0 and 5) on BTC daily
golden_cross ACTIVE when sma_50_minus_sma_200_spread crosses from negative to positive (days_since_50_200_cross 0-5)
200-DMA loss ACTIVE when consecutive_closes_below_sma200 >= 1 AND close_below_sma200_volume_zscore > 1.0 (break on rising volume)
200-DMA reclaim ACTIVE when price closes back above sma_200 after >=3 consecutive prior closes below
regime-fragility PRE-SIGNAL when abs(sma_50_minus_sma_200_spread)/sma_200 < 0.02 AND sma_200_slope_20d turning negative (cross imminent)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC: up-leg median ~22.5% (p25 18.8, p75 31.2), down-leg median ~23.7% (p25 16.7, p75 31.2); large-cap alts scale ~1.3-1.8x BTC. The acute 200-DMA-loss stop cascade can deliver -10% to -30% in 1-3 days before any cross even prints.
move_probability.lag: lagging on the cross itself (prints days-to-weeks AFTER the price move); the 200-DMA break reacts within hours
move_probability.duration: regime label persists weeks-to-months; acute stop-cascade on a 200-DMA loss plays out 1-3 days
move_probability.half_life: the predictive edge of the cross-as-entry decays within ~3 weeks (first ~3 weeks post-death-cross are a coin flip; recovery accumulates over 2-3 months)
move_probability.conditioning: Death cross near a LOCAL LOW after price already fell 20%+ tends to be a contrarian bottom (Sep 2023, golden cross followed); death cross near ATH / on ETF outflows is genuine continuation (Nov 2025). Confirm with funding/OI: cross + elevated leverage = continuation risk; cross + reset leverage = exhaustion. Treat the cross as a confirmation/regime label, never a fresh entry.

pm_gate.rationale: A confirmed cross sets the trend regime; trend-following should be aligned long after golden cross, aligned short/flat after death cross. The cross is the canonical regime label these systems are built to follow.
Death cross flips the macro-trend regime risk-off; rotate toward defensive/lower-beta and reduce alt exposure until reclaim.

The 200-DMA loss stop cascade overshoots; first ~3 weeks post-death-cross are a coin flip with a 15-26% mean-reverting recovery, favoring reversion buys after the acute break rather than chasing the breakdown.
Do NOT initiate fresh shorts on the death cross at a local low — historically a coin flip; size down chasing the lagging signal.
200-DMA breaks coincide with realized-vol spikes and stop cascades; vol-target should de-gross into the regime shift.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: death_cross_active = (days_since_50_200_cross <= 5 AND sma_50_minus_sma_200_spread < 0); dma200_loss_active = (consecutive_closes_below_sma200 >= 1 AND close_below_sma200_volume_zscore > 1.0); golden_cross_active = (days_since_50_200_cross <= 5 AND sma_50_minus_sma_200_spread > 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a regime on/off gate for trend-following and momentum-rotation (enable aligned to cross direction). Use the 200DMA-loss flag to gate mean-reversion-long entries on BTC after the acute break. As a P(direction) prior, condition on context: P(up)=0.6 unconditional, but split by price_minus_sma_200_pct at cross time — death crosses with price already >20% below recent high lean contrarian-up; crosses near highs lean continuation-down.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: The cross is a LAGGING confirmation — entering on the cross date embeds no look-ahead, but DO NOT use the eventual regime label to retroactively classify the entry. Compute SMAs only from closes up to t-1. Beware survivorship: the '15-26% recovery' is conditional on a coin-flip first 3 weeks, so a naive long-on-death-cross backtest will look better than it trades unless the first-3-week chop is included.

signals.one_liner: BTC 50/200 cross & 200-DMA break: a lagging trend label, not an entry — death-cross-at-lows mean-reverts (P_up 0.6), 200-DMA loss triggers a 1-3 day stop cascade; gate trend-following to the cross, fade the acute break on BTC.

signals.name: Open-interest washout / forced-liquidation cascade
signals.typical_lag: immediate — minutes to hours; the full cascade often completes inside 24h
signals.typical_duration: acute crash 1-2 days; OI/leverage reset persists weeks; price often recovers a large fraction within 1-2 weeks
signals.recurrence: the largest cascades cluster ~1-2 per year, with the biggest in May 2021, Aug 2024, and Oct 2025
leading_signals: aggregate open interest at cycle highs
funding rate persistently positive/elevated
long/short ratio skewed heavily long
estimated-leverage-ratio rising
thin spot order-book depth into a macro catalyst

active_when: CASCADE ACTIVE when liquidations_usd_24h spikes to a multi-month high AND oi_24h_pct_change < -10% AND max_intraday_drawdown_pct > 8% on BTC (proportionally larger on alts)
long_liquidation_washout when long_liq_share > 0.7 during the spike (the over-leveraged-long flush, bearish-then-bounce)
PRE-CONDITION (fragility) when aggregate_oi_usd_zscore > 1.5 AND funding_rate_8h_zscore > 1.5 AND oi_to_marketcap_ratio elevated AND estimated_leverage_ratio rising into a macro catalyst
WASHOUT-COMPLETE / bounce-zone when liquidations_usd_24h collapses back toward baseline AND oi has reset (oi_24h_pct_change deeply negative then flattening) AND funding flips negative

move_probability.expected_abs_move: DOWN: BTC down-leg median ~21% (p25 13.4, p75 23.4, range 8.7-30%); ETH median ~18.4%; SOL/high-beta alts ~19.5% and frequently -15% to -50% in the worst flushes. Bounce of +5% to +15% within days post-washout.
move_probability.lag: immediate — minutes to hours; the full cascade often completes inside 24h
move_probability.duration: acute crash 1-2 days; OI/leverage reset persists weeks; price typically recovers a large fraction within 1-2 weeks
move_probability.half_life: the bearish impulse half-life is hours (mechanical, self-exhausting); the post-washout long-bias edge has a half-life of days-to-1-week as funding normalizes
move_probability.conditioning: Magnitude scales with pre-cascade OI z-score, funding richness and long_liq_share, and inversely with spot order-book depth. Macro-triggered cascades (Aug 2024 yen carry, broad risk-off) tend to retrace slower than purely-positioning ones (Oct 2025). Solvency/contagion-driven washouts (Nov 2022 FTX) mark durable bottoms; pure-leverage washouts snap back fastest.

pm_gate.rationale: Long-basis/funding-carry positions get margin-called in the cascade; flatten before/at the OI z-score + funding z-score fragility trigger to avoid being part of the long liquidation fuel.
Fragility pre-condition (high OI + rich funding into a catalyst) is exactly when to be long tail/vol protection ahead of the mechanical down-cascade.
Catching the falling knife mid-cascade is the recurring loser; reversion on alts must wait for the washout-complete flag (liquidations collapsing, OI reset).
The mechanical overshoot snaps back; enable fade/long once liquidations_usd_24h collapses and funding flips negative — spot buyers absorbing forced selling at a discount is the winning side.
Washout is often a short-term bottom; scale spot-long into the reset-leverage zone with the +5-15% bounce as the prior.
Realized vol explodes in the cascade; de-gross at the fragility trigger and re-risk only after vol mean-reverts.
Inventory risk and adverse selection spike during the flush; widen quotes/skew away from the cascade direction until depth recovers.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: cascade_active = (liquidations_usd_24h_zscore > 2.0 AND oi_24h_pct_change < -0.10 AND max_intraday_drawdown_pct > 8); fragility_pre = (aggregate_oi_usd_zscore > 1.5 AND funding_rate_8h_zscore > 1.5); washout_complete = (cascade_active.shift earlier AND liquidations_usd_24h_zscore < 0.5 AND funding_rate_8h < 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate: disable mean-reversion-long and funding-carry while cascade_active; enable tail-hedge/vol on fragility_pre; enable liquidation-fade + directional-long when washout_complete. As a P(direction) prior, cascade_active sets P(down)=1.0 over the next hours, then FLIPS to a long bias (use the +5-15% bounce, ~days half-life) once washout_complete fires.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Liquidation and OI prints have reporting lag and exchange-coverage gaps — use only data available at decision time, not revised aggregates. The single largest hazard is fitting on the bounce: the bottom tick is unknowable live, so backtest the long entry off the washout_complete flag (objective: liquidations collapsing + funding negative), NOT off the realized low. Do not use intraday max-drawdown computed with the full session's low to trigger an intraday entry.

signals.one_liner: Forced-liquidation cascade: a mechanical, high-conviction down-impulse (P_down 1.0, BTC ~21% / alts up to 50%) that overshoots and snaps back — flatten funding-carry + enable tail-hedge on the fragility trigger, then flip to liquidation-fade/long once OI resets and funding goes negative.

signals.name: On-chain valuation extreme (MVRV Z-score, realized price, NUPL, Pi-cycle)
signals.typical_lag: slow — signals fire days-to-weeks around tops/bottoms; full reversion plays out over months
signals.typical_duration: months; sub-1.0 MVRV windows lasted ~15 days (Mar 2020), ~178 days (2022), ~305 days (2018-19)
signals.recurrence: once or twice per ~4-year cycle for the full extreme
leading_signals: MVRV Z-score crossing above 7 (top) or MVRV ratio below 1 (bottom)
price crossing below realized price
NUPL entering 'euphoria' (>0.75) or 'capitulation' (<0)
Pi-cycle 111DMA crossing above 2x350DMA
long-term-holder supply distributing

active_when: TOP-extreme ACTIVE when mvrv_z_score > 7 OR (nupl > 0.75 'euphoria') OR pi_cycle_111dma_vs_2x350dma crosses above 0 (111DMA > 2x350DMA)
BOTTOM-extreme ACTIVE when mvrv_ratio < 1.0 OR price_to_realized_price < 1.0 (price below realized price) OR nupl < 0 ('capitulation')
top-divergence WARNING when price makes a higher high but mvrv_z_score makes a lower high (realized cap catching up — Nov 2021 pattern)
distribution PRE-SIGNAL when lth_sopr rising sharply AND realized_cap_30d_change accelerating (long-term holders selling into strength)
REGIME caveat flag when mvrv_z_score peaks well below 7 at ATH (~3-4) — institution-led/ETF regime where the classic euphoria extreme never triggers (2024-25)
data_sources: Glassnode / Santiment (MVRV-Z, NUPL, realized price, LTH-SOPR)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC only (and total-market-cap proxy). UP from bottom-extremes: median ~225% over ~12 months (range +150% to +300%+). DOWN from top-extremes: median ~63.5% cycle drawdown (range -50% to -77%). FLAT: ~20% of the time the extreme never fully triggers (2024-25 ETF regime, MVRV-Z only ~3-4).
move_probability.lag: slow — signals fire days-to-weeks around tops/bottoms; full reversion plays out over months
move_probability.duration: months; sub-1.0 MVRV windows lasted ~15 days (Mar 2020), ~178 days (2022), ~305 days (2018-19)
move_probability.half_life: long — the accumulation/distribution edge persists for months (not days); the bottom-extreme buy edge stays live for the duration of the sub-1.0 window
move_probability.conditioning: Direction depends entirely on WHICH extreme: low MVRV = high-conviction multi-month accumulation (triple-digit upside); high MVRV-Z/Pi-cycle/euphoric NUPL = cycle-top distribution (50-80% drawdown ahead). The 20% flat reflects regime shift: in an institution/ETF-led cycle the euphoria extreme may never print, so the ABSENCE of a top-extreme is itself bullish-neutral. Confirm tops with LTH distribution; confirm bottoms with negative funding + capitulation volume.

pm_gate.rationale: MVRV<1 / price<realized-price is the maximum-pain accumulation zone — historically triple-digit 12-month returns; scale into spot-long over the sub-1.0 window.
At MVRV-Z>7 / euphoric NUPL the marginal buyer is exhausted; de-gross trend-long exposure ahead of the 50-80% cycle drawdown rather than chasing late-cycle momentum.
Top valuation extreme with bearish MVRV-Z divergence is the cleanest multi-month signal to carry cheap downside protection.
Slow cycle marker, not a vol event — leave vol-targeting to its own regime; this signal informs strategic gross, not tactical sizing.
Top-extremes flag fragility but reversion plays out over months and needs a catalyst; do not over-press shorts on the valuation reading alone, and never short the bottom-extreme.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: bottom_extreme = (mvrv_ratio < 1.0 OR price_to_realized_price < 1.0 OR nupl < 0); top_extreme = (mvrv_z_score > 7 OR nupl > 0.75 OR pi_cycle_cross > 0); top_divergence = (price_higher_high AND mvrv_z_lower_high)
backtest_gate.usage: Strategic regime gate, not a trade trigger: bottom_extreme enables/over-weights directional-long and buy-and-hold accumulation; top_extreme reduces trend-long gross and enables tail-hedge. As a P(direction) prior it is regime-conditional — P(up)~high inside bottom_extreme, P(down)~high inside top_extreme; the 0.4/0.4/0.2 split is the UNCONDITIONAL prior and must be conditioned on which extreme is active before use.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Realized price / MVRV use on-chain cost-basis that is computed from confirmed chain data with some indexing lag — use vintaged values as-of decision date. Critical regime hazard: thresholds calibrated on 2017-2021 (MVRV-Z>7 tops) FAILED in 2024-25 (peaked ~3-4), so a static high-threshold gate will never fire in the ETF regime and a static backtest will overstate signal frequency. Use adaptive/percentile thresholds and treat the 'flat/no-extreme' branch as a real outcome.

signals.one_liner: On-chain valuation extreme (MVRV-Z, realized price, NUPL, Pi-cycle): a slow, regime-conditional cycle marker — MVRV<1 = multi-month accumulation (+150-300%), MVRV-Z>7/euphoria = distribution (-50-77%); strategic gross gate for BTC, but ETF-era thresholds have shifted (20% flat).

signals.name: Funding-rate / leverage-sentiment extreme (contrarian)
signals.typical_lag: days to weeks — extreme funding flags fragility; the reversal follows on a catalyst
signals.typical_duration: the positioning unwind resolves over days once triggered; funding normalizes within a week of a washout
signals.recurrence: milder funding spikes several times a year; true multi-week extremes once or twice a cycle
leading_signals: funding rate sustained >0.1-0.3% per 8h for days/weeks (top warning)
funding deeply negative (bottom signal)
OI rising while funding rich
perp basis / annualized basis at extreme
long/short account ratio skewed

active_when: TOP-warning ACTIVE when funding_rate_7d_avg sustained > 0.10-0.30% per 8h (funding_rate_zscore_90d > 2) for multiple days AND oi rising while funding rich AND annualized_perp_basis at an extreme
BOTTOM-signal ACTIVE when funding_rate_8h deeply negative (funding_rate_zscore_90d < -2) — shorts paying, capitulation positioning
crowded-long fragility when oi_weighted_funding high AND long/short account ratio skewed long AND days_funding_above_threshold rising
reversal-trigger PENDING when funding extreme present but no funding_sign_flip yet (extreme flags fragility; needs a catalyst — typically the OI washout)
REGIME caveat when max funding stays muted (~0.13%/8h) through new ATHs (2024 ETF regime) — the classic crowded-long top warning never fully triggers

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC/ETH/large-cap alts. UP (fading deep-negative funding / bottoms): median ~265% (range +30% to +500%+ over months). DOWN (fading sustained extreme-positive funding / tops): ~50% cycle correction. FLAT: ~25% — the extreme flags fragility but no reversal materializes (2024 muted-funding non-signal).
move_probability.lag: days to weeks — extreme funding flags fragility; the reversal follows on a catalyst (which then often becomes an OI washout)
move_probability.duration: the positioning unwind resolves over days once triggered; funding normalizes within a week of a washout
move_probability.half_life: as a standalone timing signal the edge is weak/slow (half-life weeks until a catalyst); once a funding_sign_flip + washout occurs the directional follow-through edge decays over days
move_probability.conditioning: Direction is contrarian and sign-dependent: deep-negative funding = bottom/long bias (highest-conviction, e.g. Nov 2022); sustained extreme-positive = top/short bias. It is a SENTIMENT/FRAGILITY gauge, not precise timing — pair with OI z-score and a catalyst. Carry desks can also simply harvest rich funding (cash-and-carry) rather than fade direction. Magnitude scales with how long and how extreme funding stayed stretched. ETF-era funding runs structurally lower, muting the top signal.

pm_gate.scope: BTC/ETH perps, on sustained extreme-positive funding
pm_gate.rationale: Rich, sustained positive funding is directly harvestable: short-perp/long-spot cash-and-carry collects the funding the crowded longs pay — the cleanest, most mechanical use of the signal.
Deeply negative funding (shorts paying) marks capitulation positioning; the highest-conviction contrarian-long signal (Nov 2022 -> +500%+).

pm_gate.scope: BTC/large-cap, on sustained extreme-positive funding + OI rising
pm_gate.rationale: Crowded over-leveraged longs are vulnerable; tilt short / reduce long gross — but only as a fragility tilt, since the reversal needs a catalyst.

pm_gate.scope: book-wide, on extreme-positive funding + high OI
pm_gate.rationale: Extreme-positive funding with rising OI is the fuel for the next OI washout; carry downside protection into the fragile-crowded-long state.
Funding euphoria is where momentum-chasers pile into the crowded side; trim chasing into the extreme to avoid being the liquidation fuel.
Extreme funding flags coiled positioning fragility; arm vol-breakout to capture the eventual catalyst-driven unwind in either direction.

backtest_gate.gate_expression: top_warning = (funding_rate_7d_avg > 0.001 per 8h AND funding_rate_zscore_90d > 2 AND days_funding_above_threshold >= 3 AND oi_rising); bottom_signal = (funding_rate_8h < 0 AND funding_rate_zscore_90d < -2); reversal_armed = ((top_warning OR bottom_signal) AND funding_sign_flip)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate: top_warning enables funding-carry (harvest) and tail-hedge + trims momentum/long gross; bottom_signal enables directional-long. Use as a contrarian P(direction) prior conditioned on sign — P(down)-tilt under top_warning, P(up)-tilt (strong) under bottom_signal — but DOWNWEIGHT until a catalyst/funding_sign_flip confirms (the 25% flat captures extremes that never reverse). Best combined with the OI-washout gate as the catalyst.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Funding is realized per 8h with known print times — avoid using the funding settlement that occurs AFTER the decision bar. 90d z-score must use a trailing window only. Biggest hazard is threshold staleness/regime shift: 0.2-0.3%/8h tops were normal pre-2022 but funding ran far lower in the 2024 ETF cycle (max ~0.13%), so a fixed positive threshold rarely fires post-2023 and a naive backtest will over-count top signals in old data and miss the regime change. Sample is low-confidence (all 4 instances low-confidence, measured_fraction 0) — treat priors as soft.

signals.one_liner: Funding/leverage-sentiment extreme (contrarian): a fragility gauge, not a timer — deep-negative funding = high-conviction long (median +265%), sustained extreme-positive = harvestable carry + short-tilt fragility (~-50%); enable funding-carry/tail-hedge on rich funding, directional-long on negative, but wait for a catalyst (low-confidence, ETF-era funding muted).

signals.name: Cliff Unlock (large discrete insider release)
signals.typical_lag: Pre-unlock drift begins 1-4 weeks ahead; the sharpest realized move is often 0-7 days AROUND the date, frequently bottoming on or just before the unlock (priced in)
signals.typical_duration: Acute pressure lasts days to ~2 weeks; persistent overhang on tokens with repeated large cliffs can suppress price for months
signals.recurrence: Per-token: usually a one-year initial cliff then periodic; across the market: dozens of large cliffs per year (every major 2021-2023 vintage L1/L2 token)
leading_signals: days_to_unlock counting down
unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply > 5%
rising perp open interest + negative funding pre-unlock (pre-hedging shorts)
negative price drift in the 2-4 weeks before the date
spike in exchange inflows from vesting/treasury wallets
low float / high FDV ratio at launch

active_when: days_to_unlock BETWEEN 0 AND 28 (window opens 4 weeks out, peak focus 0-7 days)
unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply >= 5% (cliff classification; >=15% = high-conviction)
recipient_type == insider (team/investor/treasury) rather than ecosystem/programmatic
float_to_fdv_ratio <= 0.30 at launch (low-float/high-FDV vintage)
cumulative_return_t_minus_30_to_0 < 0 (pre-unlock drift confirming the lean)
exchange_netflow_zscore_pre_unlock > 2 over trailing 24-72h from vesting/treasury wallets
open_interest_change_pre_unlock > 0 WHILE perp_funding_rate_pre_unlock < 0 (pre-hedging shorts stacking)
data_sources: Hyperliquid + CEX perp funding & OI feeds

move_probability.expected_abs_move: named coin down: median ~17% (p25 ~10%, p75 ~26%); typical -10% to -25%; megacliff/launch tails (ICP) -80% to -95% over weeks; large-anticipated insider cliffs can be muted (DYDX -3.5%). BTC ~n/a, alts 10-40%
move_probability.lag: Pre-unlock drift starts 1-4 weeks ahead; sharpest realized move 0-7 days AROUND the date, frequently bottoming on or just before unlock (priced in)
move_probability.duration: Acute pressure days to ~2 weeks; repeated large cliffs suppress price for months
move_probability.half_life: Edge decays fast post-date — bulk of the move is captured by the unlock day; the day-after relief bounce can flip short edge within 1-5 days
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified by: weak/negative demand backdrop, large insider %, low float/high FDV, confirming pre-unlock drift + rising short OI. Muted/flipped when: tokens go mostly to slow-moving VCs (DYDX), allocation is ecosystem/locked not free-float, or a broad alt rally absorbs supply (sell-the-rumor already done)

pm_gate.scope: the named coin only, entered 1-3 weeks pre-unlock on confirming drift + exchange-inflow z-score
pm_gate.rationale: 86% historical down rate with median ~17% move; short the anticipation drift, not the day-of which is often the bottom

pm_gate.scope: named coin + same-vintage low-float high-FDV L1/L2 peers
pm_gate.rationale: core catalyst for this strategy class; trade pre-unlock drift and cover into the priced-in date
do not hold longs into a large insider cliff; net dilution overwhelms organic demand
funding can swing sharply negative as shorts pre-hedge; carry assumptions break around the event

pm_gate.scope: the named coin and same-vintage peers during the pre-unlock window
pm_gate.rationale: buying dips fights a step-change in float; mean-reversion only re-enables on the post-date relief bounce

pm_gate.scope: the named coin AFTER the unlock-day washout
pm_gate.rationale: if the date triggers a capitulation candle, fade it for the relief bounce since the catalyst is now spent
realized vol expands into and around the date; breakout/straddle structures capture the directional washout

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_to_unlock <= 28) AND (unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply >= 5) AND (recipient_type == 'insider') AND (float_to_fdv_ratio <= 0.30); high_conviction = active AND (unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply >= 15) AND (cumulative_return_t_minus_30_to_0 < 0) AND (exchange_netflow_zscore_pre_unlock > 2)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as an ON gate for event-driven and directional-short on the named coin (and a softer tilt on same-vintage peers); set P(down)=0.86 as a directional prior on the t-30-to-0 window, NOT the day-of. Disable mean-reversion/dip-buying on gated names. Size with unlock_pct and float_to_fdv as continuous severity weights.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Unlock schedules ARE known in advance (DefiLlama/Messari) so no look-ahead there — but DO NOT use realized exchange-inflow or funding from inside the post-decision window. Compute netflow_zscore/funding/OI only on data available at entry. Beware the 'priced-in' trap: backtesting day-of returns overstates edge because the move front-runs into the drift; anchor entries to the pre-unlock window. Survivorship: include tokens that did NOT sell off (DYDX, the 2025 ARB/APT up-cases) to avoid overstating p_down.

signals.one_liner: Large insider vesting cliffs (>=5% of float) drift the named coin down ~17% over the 1-4 weeks INTO the date (86% bearish) then often bottom on the priced-in unlock day — short the anticipation, fade the washout.

signals.name: Continuous / Linear Vesting Emission
signals.typical_lag: Slow grind; modest -2% to -8% drift into each monthly date, frequent post-date relief bounce
signals.typical_duration: Structural — persists for the multi-year vesting horizon; per-event effect dissipates within days
signals.recurrence: Monthly/weekly per token, for 2-4 years — extremely high recurrence and thus the most backtestable sub-pattern
leading_signals: recurring unlock_pct_of_circulating_supply (monthly)
annualized emission/inflation rate
negative cumulative return in 5-10 days before each monthly date
weak relative strength vs sector
elevated perp short OI into the date

active_when: recurring monthly/weekly unlock with monthly_unlock_pct_of_circulating >= 1-3% (meaningful tranche)
days_to_next_unlock <= 10 (drift window opens)
annualized_emission_rate elevated vs sector median
relative_strength_vs_sector_index < 0 (weak demand backdrop — the key conditioner)
cumulative_return_t_minus_10_to_0 < 0 (pre-date drift confirming)
perp_funding_zscore < 0 / elevated short OI into the date

move_probability.expected_abs_move: two-sided and modest: down median ~10.5% (p25 ~7.9%, p75 ~13.3%); up median ~14.7% when alt demand is strong; flat ~0.1% close-to-close but large intra-window swings (OP +15% run-up / -14% drawdown around a flat close). Per-event named-coin alts ~5-16%
move_probability.lag: Slow grind; -2% to -8% drift into each monthly date
move_probability.duration: Per-event effect dissipates within days (frequent post-date relief bounce); structural underperformance persists across the multi-year vesting horizon
move_probability.half_life: Per-event edge half-life 1-3 days (relief bounce t+1 to t+5); structural relative-weakness signal persists for the full emission schedule
move_probability.conditioning: This is a DEMAND-conditional edge: bearish ONLY when relative_strength_vs_sector < 0 and demand is weak. In broad alt rallies the scheduled supply is absorbed and the token RISES (ARB +16%, APT +13% in July 2025). Net flow, not supply alone, drives the sign — gate on relative strength, not the unlock alone

pm_gate.scope: named high-emission token ONLY when relative_strength_vs_sector < 0; otherwise no-change
pm_gate.rationale: down-bias is conditional — only short the drift into the date when the demand backdrop is already weak

pm_gate.scope: named token on the post-date relief bounce (t+1 to t+5)
pm_gate.rationale: the classic continuous-emission signature is drift-down-then-relief; fade the pre-date weakness after the date passes
no durable directional bleed (p_up~=p_down) but high two-sided intra-window vol suits range/grid harvesting

pm_gate.scope: underweight/exclude chronic high-emission tokens from long alt baskets
pm_gate.rationale: persistent dilution causes chronic relative underperformance vs sector over the vesting horizon

pm_gate.scope: named token around each monthly date
pm_gate.rationale: intra-window realized vol spikes (15%+ swings) even when close-to-close is flat — straddle/breakout captures it
recurring emission alone does not reliably break carry; monitor only

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_to_next_unlock <= 10) AND (monthly_unlock_pct_of_circulating >= 1.0); bearish_tilt = active AND (relative_strength_vs_sector_index < 0) AND (cumulative_return_t_minus_10_to_0 < 0); relief_long = (t_since_unlock BETWEEN 1 AND 5) AND (cumulative_return_t_minus_10_to_0 < -5)
backtest_gate.usage: Use as a CONDITIONAL gate, not a standing short. Apply P(down)=0.4 / P(up)=0.4 (near coin-flip) — only tilt short when relative_strength_vs_sector<0 (raises effective P(down)); enable mean-reversion long on the relief-bounce sub-window. Treat as a vol/range gate (enable range-grid + vol-breakout) given p_flat with large intra-window swings. Best backtested via recurring monthly panel given highest recurrence.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Schedules are fully known so no look-ahead on the date; the hazard is regime contamination — relative_strength_vs_sector and funding_zscore must be computed strictly pre-date. Do NOT condition on the realized outcome to label demand. The 2025 ARB/APT up-cases prove that ignoring the demand conditioner produces a false short edge; always co-gate on sector relative strength to avoid an overfit one-sided prior.

signals.one_liner: Recurring linear emissions are a near coin-flip per event (40/40/20) with big two-sided swings — only short the drift when sector relative strength is weak, fade the relief bounce after, and trade it as a range/vol pattern otherwise.

signals.name: Estate / Bankruptcy Locked-Token Distribution
signals.typical_lag: Often immediate relief on OTC sale announcement; the scheduled unlock itself is anticipated weeks ahead
signals.typical_duration: Multi-quarter overhang narrative; individual events resolve in days
signals.recurrence: Episodic — tied to specific estate proceedings (FTX 2024-2026 creditor rounds); rare but very large in notional
leading_signals: announced OTC discount % vs spot
named institutional buyer (signals smart-money demand)
scheduled creditor/vesting unlock date
estate wallet on-chain movements to exchanges
size of locked stack as % of circulating supply

active_when: estate_locked_balance_pct_of_supply >= 2% (material overhang, primarily SOL/FTX)
otc_sale_discount_pct announced (deep discount, e.g. ~40-62%, signals locked future-dated tranche)
buyer_is_institutional_flag == true (Galaxy/Pantera-type — smart-money demand signal, relief-positive)
days_to_scheduled_creditor_unlock counting down (telegraphed weeks ahead)
estate_wallet_exchange_inflow spike (the rare genuinely-bearish trigger: locked tokens routed to a CEX for spot sale)
data_sources: bankruptcy court filings / creditor distribution schedules (FTX estate)
DefiLlama unlocks for the scheduled creditor tranche

move_probability.expected_abs_move: mostly muted: down case ~6.2% (single obs, SOL -6% on the April-2024 OTC sale amid broader weakness); flat/mixed ~11% range with no clean directional bleed; named coin (SOL) median abs ~8.6%. Scheduled unlocks themselves repeatedly priced-in / no clean adverse day-of move
move_probability.lag: Often immediate relief on the OTC-sale announcement; the scheduled creditor unlock is anticipated weeks ahead and largely priced in by the date
move_probability.duration: Multi-quarter overhang narrative; individual events resolve within days
move_probability.half_life: Very short per-event (days); the narrative overhang lingers across quarters but is continuously re-priced
move_probability.conditioning: Bearish ONLY if estate routes locked tokens to exchanges for genuine spot sale (estate_wallet_exchange_inflow spike). Discounted OTC to named institutions with future unlock dates is RELIEF-positive (removes feared overhang, signals smart-money demand). Shorting the headline overhang too early is the losing trade; broad-market weakness, not the unlock, drove the observed SOL dip

pm_gate.scope: the named coin (SOL) on OTC-sale announcements and scheduled telegraphed unlocks
pm_gate.rationale: 75% flat / events priced-in; shorting the overhang headline is the documented losing trade — only short if estate_wallet_exchange_inflow confirms real spot dumping

pm_gate.scope: named coin on a deep-discount OTC sale to a named institutional buyer
pm_gate.rationale: buy-the-news: removal of feared overhang + smart-money demand signal is net relief-positive; events resolve flat-to-up

pm_gate.scope: named coin around the telegraphed unlock date
pm_gate.rationale: priced-in events with no clean adverse move favor fading pre-event weakness back toward the mean

pm_gate.scope: named coin ONLY if estate_wallet_exchange_inflow z-score spikes (genuine spot-sale path)
pm_gate.rationale: the one black-swan path is the estate abandoning OTC structure and dumping spot; cheap tail protection covers that low-probability case
no systematic long edge from the unlock itself; defer to other signals unless an OTC-relief catalyst fires

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (estate_locked_balance_pct_of_supply >= 2) AND ((otc_sale_discount_pct IS NOT NULL) OR (days_to_scheduled_creditor_unlock <= 14)); bearish_override = active AND (estate_wallet_exchange_inflow_zscore > 2); relief_long = active AND (otc_sale_discount_pct >= 30) AND (buyer_is_institutional_flag == true)
backtest_gate.usage: Use primarily as a SUPPRESSOR gate: when active, DISABLE naive overhang-shorts and apply P(flat)=0.75 (do not assume bearish). Flip to a P(up) relief-long prior on discounted-institutional-OTC announcements; only switch to a bearish prior when estate_wallet_exchange_inflow confirms spot routing. Enable tail-hedge on the inflow-spike override.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Creditor/unlock dates and OTC announcements are public point-in-time events. Primary hazard: confounding broad-market moves with the event (the SOL -6% was largely market beta, not the sale) — neutralize with a market/sector beta control before attributing. Tiny sample (n=4, all SOL, measured_fraction 0.0 — no clean measured magnitudes) means priors are weak; do not over-fit. Avoid look-ahead on whether buyers were institutional (known at announcement) vs whether tokens later hit exchanges (only knowable later).

signals.one_liner: Estate/bankruptcy locked-token distributions (FTX SOL) are mostly priced-in non-events (75% flat); discounted OTC sales to named institutions are relief-positive buy-the-news, and the only bearish path is the estate actually routing tokens to exchanges — so disable naive overhang shorts.

signals.name: Exchange Netflow / Whale Deposit Signal (continuous flow)
signals.typical_lag: hours to 1-3 days
signals.typical_duration: intraday to 1 week
signals.recurrence: continuous — fires multiple times per month; the most repeatable, backtestable archetype in the category
leading_signals: 7-day MA of exchange inflows spikes above rolling mean (local-top marker)
exchange whale ratio rises above ~0.85
single large stablecoin deposit (e.g. >$1B USDT to Binance) — note unreliable as a directional signal
exchange reserves declining for weeks = supply squeeze/accumulation
Whale Alert flags of large BTC/ETH transfers TO exchange deposit wallets
backtest_features: large_transfer_count_to_exchange (>$1m tx tagged to CEX deposit addrs)

active_when: exchange_netflow_zscore > 2 over rolling 30d (net inflow spike) for BTC/ETH
exchange_whale_ratio > 0.85 (top-10 deposits dominate inflow = whale-led selling)
exchange_inflow_total_7dma rises above its 90d mean AND large_transfer_count_to_exchange elevated
BEARISH-confirm: exchange_reserve_change_pct positive (reserves rising) over 24-72h
BULLISH/accumulation variant: exchange_reserve_change_pct negative for >2 weeks (supply squeeze) — outflow signal
NOTE stablecoin_exchange_netflow positive is NOT a reliable bullish trigger (Mar-2026 record USDT inflow preceded a BTC decline) — do NOT gate longs on it alone
data_sources: Whale Alert (large transfer tags to CEX deposit addrs)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC ~6.2% median down (5.3-28.6% IQR); ETH up to ~51% in cascade cases; the single up case ~13%. Large-cap alts amplify BTC move 1.5-3x
move_probability.lag: hours to 1-3 days from inflow spike to move
move_probability.duration: intraday to ~1 week
move_probability.half_life: ~2-4 days; edge decays fast as the inflow is absorbed/digested; false positives (custodian rotation, margin top-ups) erode it
move_probability.conditioning: Amplified when whale_ratio>0.85 AND coincides with high perp leverage (ETH Jan-Feb 2026 inflows triggered liquidation cascades). Muted when ETF/treasury net buying absorbs the flow. Stablecoin-inflow leg is direction-uncertain — ignore for longs.

pm_gate.scope: BTC, ETH, large-cap alts showing the inflow spike
pm_gate.rationale: Confirmed whale-led exchange inflow (whale_ratio>0.85, netflow_z>2) front-runs distribution; lean short / fade strength on the affected asset

pm_gate.scope: ETH and high-leverage alts after the inflow-driven washout
pm_gate.rationale: Inflow spikes into levered books produce liquidation cascades (ETH Jan-Feb 2026); fade the overshoot post-cascade
Mean-reversion long dip-buys get run over while supply is actively hitting the book
Elevated cascade risk widens basis/funding volatility; trim carry exposure during the inflow window
Bearish base rate (p_down 0.6); reduce net long until reserves stabilize
Continuous signal; let the trend system act on price confirmation rather than overriding on flow alone

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active_bear = (exchange_netflow_zscore > 2) AND (exchange_whale_ratio > 0.85); active_bull = (exchange_reserve_change_pct < 0 sustained >=14d); stablecoin_netflow EXCLUDED from bull gate
backtest_gate.usage: Use active_bear as an on/off short-tilt gate on on-chain-flow and a disable gate on alt mean-reversion; feed P(down|active_bear)=0.6 as a directional prior into move-probability calcs. active_bull is a weak accumulation prior only.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Netflow/whale-ratio metrics are revised and have reporting lag (exchange address tagging updates retroactively) — use only the value timestamped at/before decision time, never the backfilled series. Distinguish true deposits from custodian/internal rotation to avoid false positives.

signals.one_liner: Whale-led exchange inflow spike (netflow z>2, whale ratio>0.85) is the most repeatable bearish on-chain tell — lean short/fade strength, but ignore the unreliable stablecoin-inflow bullish leg.

signals.name: Government / Seized-BTC Distribution (sovereign overhang)
signals.typical_lag: immediate to 24h on each transfer/headline; a transfer without a sale may produce no move
signals.typical_duration: days to several weeks (duration of the liquidation program)
signals.recurrence: episodic — a few major sovereign liquidations per cycle (Germany 2024, US Silk Road 2024-25, earlier US Marshals auctions)
leading_signals: court/forfeiture ruling clearing a government to sell (e.g. Dec 30 2024 Silk Road greenlight)
on-chain transfer from a known government-tagged wallet to an exchange or Coinbase Prime (transfer alone is not a sale)
size of remaining tagged government stash (overhang capping rallies)
Arkham/Whale Alert labels on sovereign addresses moving

active_when: court/forfeiture ruling clears a government to sell (days_since_court_forfeiture_ruling small) — headline_sentiment_flag = gov-sale
gov_wallet_transfer_to_exchange_btc > 0 (tagged sovereign address moves coins to CEX/Coinbase Prime)
tranche_size_pct_of_daily_spot_volume above ~5-10% (program large enough to move price)
remaining_gov_holdings_btc large (overhang capping rallies)
INVERSE/bullish state: official no-sell / Strategic Bitcoin Reserve HOLD policy confirmed (removes overhang)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC median ~3% down on a single headline/transfer (IQR 3.0-12.4%), up to -17% peak-to-trough over a full multi-week liquidation campaign (Germany 2024); transfer-WITHOUT-sale ~flat (~0.2-0.4%)
move_probability.lag: immediate to 24h on each transfer/headline
move_probability.duration: days (single transfer) to several weeks (active liquidation program)
move_probability.half_life: ~1-3 days per headline; the campaign-level overhang persists weeks until holdings drained
move_probability.conditioning: Bearish only when transfer is followed by actual selling AND tranche is large vs daily volume. A tracked transfer to Coinbase Prime with no sale (Dec 2024 Silk Road) = ~flat. Flips structurally BULLISH/neutral under a confirmed no-sell SBR policy (May 2026). ETF/treasury bid absorbs.

pm_gate.scope: BTC on a fresh forfeiture-ruling headline + first on-chain transfer to exchange
pm_gate.rationale: Market front-runs sovereign sale headlines with fear-selling; fade the initial pop / lean short into the program

pm_gate.scope: BTC during an active multi-week liquidation campaign with confirmed selling
pm_gate.rationale: Price-insensitive forced seller (Germany -17% peak-to-trough); hold short while tranche_size_pct of volume stays high

pm_gate.scope: BTC after the campaign-end / final tranche drained
pm_gate.rationale: Overhang removal is a relief catalyst; fade the capitulation low once remaining_gov_holdings approaches zero
Multi-week price-insensitive supply is a known drawdown driver; carry cheap downside hedge during the program
Overhang caps rallies; trim net long until the program completes — UNLESS the catalyst is a no-sell SBR confirmation (then no-change/tilt-long)

pm_gate.scope: BTC on a confirmed no-sell Strategic Bitcoin Reserve policy
pm_gate.rationale: Inverse instance (May 2026): removing the feared dump overhang is structurally supply-restrictive / bullish

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (days_since_court_forfeiture_ruling <= 30) AND ((gov_wallet_transfer_to_exchange_btc > 0) OR headline_sentiment_flag=='gov-sale') AND (tranche_size_pct_of_daily_spot_volume >= 5); sale_confirmed flips it from sentiment-only to full short
backtest_gate.usage: Gate event-driven and directional-short ON for BTC while active; apply P(down)=0.6 prior, but DOWNWEIGHT to ~flat when transfer_to_exchange occurs with no confirmed sale. Flip the gate to a bullish prior on no-sell-policy headlines.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: A transfer is NOT a sale — using campaign peak-to-trough (-17%) at the moment of the first transfer is look-ahead. Only the headline/transfer known at t is usable; whether selling follows is revealed later. Sovereign address tags can be assigned retroactively.

signals.one_liner: Government seized-BTC liquidations are price-insensitive supply overhangs — short BTC on confirmed-sale programs (up to -17%), but a transfer-without-sale is ~flat and a no-sell SBR policy is bullish.

signals.name: Mt Gox / Estate Creditor Repayment Overhang
signals.typical_lag: immediate to 24-48h on transfer/announcement headlines
signals.typical_duration: days per event; overhang persists across multiple deadline extensions (years)
signals.recurrence: episodic but recurring — clusters around each repayment announcement (Jun 2024 notice, Jul 2024 start, extensions)
leading_signals: trustee announcement of a repayment start/deadline date
on-chain movement of coins out of Mt Gox cold wallets to exchanges (Kraken/Bitstamp/BitGo)
BCH weakness leading BTC (creditors also received BCH)
size of BTC still in trustee custody (remaining overhang)
backtest_features: bch_btc_relative_drawdown (BCH sold harder than BTC by creditors)

active_when: trustee announces a repayment start/deadline date (repayment_announcement_flag = 1)
trustee_wallet_outflow_btc > 0 (Mt Gox cold wallet -> Kraken/Bitstamp/BitGo distribution exchange)
days_to_repayment_deadline small (approaching a known distribution window)
bch_btc_relative_drawdown negative (BCH leading BTC weaker = creditor selling signal)
btc_remaining_in_trustee_custody still large (overhang persists)
data_sources: Arkham / Whale Alert (Mt Gox cold-wallet + distribution-exchange tags)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC ~5.9% median down (IQR 5.0-6.8%, range 4.0-7.8%) around major transfer/repayment dates; sharper on BCH; deadline-extension events with no transfer ~flat
move_probability.lag: immediate to 24-48h on transfer/announcement headlines
move_probability.duration: days per event; the overhang itself persists across repeated deadline extensions (years)
move_probability.half_life: ~1-2 days per headline; realized selling has consistently been far smaller than feared, so moves mean-revert quickly
move_probability.conditioning: Bearish on actual cold-wallet -> exchange transfers and start-date announcements. Muted/flat on pure deadline extensions (Oct 2025 push to Oct 2026). BCH weakness is an early tell. Realized dump << feared dump (conviction holders), so fade-the-fear has worked.

pm_gate.scope: BTC and BCH on a trustee transfer-to-exchange or repayment start-date announcement
pm_gate.rationale: Market reliably front-runs repayment fear (-7.8% Jul 2024 start); lean short into the headline/transfer
