pm_gate.scope: BCH (creditors sold BCH harder than BTC)
pm_gate.rationale: bch_btc_relative_drawdown leads; BCH is the higher-beta expression of the overhang
Realized selling << feared; the dip is a fade because most creditors hold — buy the over-reaction

pm_gate.scope: BTC after a deadline-extension-only event (no transfer)
pm_gate.rationale: Pure extension = overhang deferred, modest/flat reaction; reversion long captures the unwind of unwarranted fear

pm_gate.scope: BTC ahead of a known repayment window
pm_gate.rationale: Overhang caps rallies near deadlines; trim into the event, re-add after

backtest_gate.gate_expression: active = (repayment_announcement_flag == 1) OR (trustee_wallet_outflow_btc > 0); strength scaled by (days_to_repayment_deadline small) AND (bch_btc_relative_drawdown < 0)
backtest_gate.usage: Gate event-driven short-tilt ON for BTC/BCH while active; apply P(down)=0.67 prior. But split: transfer/start-date = short prior; deadline-extension-only = ~flat / fade-the-fear long prior on BTC.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Distinguish an intra-trustee wallet RESHUFFLE from a true outflow to a distribution exchange — the May 2024 reshuffle was misread as imminent distribution. Trustee announcement dates are the clean point-in-time trigger; transfer amounts are sometimes estimated and revised.

signals.one_liner: Mt Gox creditor-repayment overhang: short BTC/BCH (~6%) on trustee transfers and start-date announcements, but fade the fear on extension-only headlines since realized creditor selling stays far below the scare.

signals.name: Dormant / Satoshi-Era Wallet Awakening
signals.typical_lag: immediate (minutes-hours) on the Whale Alert; full price resolution within 1-3 weeks as destination/intent clarifies
signals.typical_duration: intraday dip if benign; multi-week if confirmed distribution
signals.recurrence: sporadic — several notable awakenings per year; clustered in 2025 as OG holders exited near highs
leading_signals: Whale Alert / Arkham flag of a wallet last active 2010-2013 spending coins
Coin Days Destroyed (CDD) / dormant-supply-revived metric spike
destination address tagged to an exchange or OTC desk (e.g. Galaxy Digital) vs a fresh SegWit wallet
follow-on transfers within days (staged distribution) vs single move that then sits idle

active_when: Whale Alert/Arkham flags a wallet with coin_age_at_spend_years > 10 (Satoshi-era 2010-2013) spending
dormant_supply_revived_btc / Coin Days Destroyed spikes above rolling threshold
DIRECTIONAL DISCRIMINATOR: destination_is_exchange_or_otc_desk == true (bearish, genuine distribution) vs destination_is_segwit_migration == true (benign reformat, fade the dip)
follow-on staged transfers within days (distribution) vs single move that then sits idle (benign)
treasury_etf_net_buying_same_window high (absorption capacity present = muting factor)
data_sources: Arkham (destination address labelling — exchange/OTC vs fresh wallet)
Glassnode (Coin Days Destroyed, dormant supply revived, coin age bands)
ETF flow feeds + corporate treasury trackers (absorption)

move_probability.expected_abs_move: BTC ~2.1% median (range 1.3-2.9%) knee-jerk intraday dip; net ~flat over 1-3 weeks; even confirmed $9B OTC sales netted ~flat (+0.3%) with only ~6% intra-window drawdown as ETFs/treasuries absorbed
move_probability.lag: immediate (minutes-hours) on the Whale Alert; full resolution within 1-3 weeks as destination/intent clarifies
move_probability.duration: intraday dip if benign; multi-week if confirmed exchange/OTC distribution
move_probability.half_life: hours to ~1 day for the benign knee-jerk; the dip mean-reverts fast
move_probability.conditioning: Direction is set by DESTINATION, not the awakening itself. Wallet-to-wallet / SegWit migration = ~zero impact (fade the dip). Exchange/OTC-bound = real but increasingly absorbed by ETF/treasury bid (net flat in 2024-2025). High treasury_etf_net_buying mutes any downside.

pm_gate.scope: BTC on the initial Whale Alert dip when destination is NOT an exchange/OTC (wallet-to-wallet or SegWit migration)
pm_gate.rationale: Benign awakenings produce a ~1-3% knee-jerk dip that reverts within hours (Jan 2026 909 BTC was wallet-to-wallet); buy the over-reaction
Direction is destination-dependent and unknown at the alert; avoid committing flow-driven directional risk until exchange/OTC vs migration resolves

pm_gate.scope: BTC only if destination_is_exchange_or_otc_desk AND staged follow-on transfers AND low ETF/treasury absorption
pm_gate.rationale: Confirmed genuine distribution with weak bid is the only configuration that produces sustained downside
Base case is flat/absorbed; no need to add hedges on the awakening alone unless distribution confirms into a weak-bid tape
Net effect historically flat; do not de-risk the core long on a dormant-wallet headline absent exchange-bound confirmation

backtest_gate.gate_expression: alert = (coin_age_at_spend_years > 10) AND (dormant_supply_revived_btc spike); bearish = alert AND destination_is_exchange_or_otc_desk AND NOT high(treasury_etf_net_buying_same_window); benign_fade = alert AND (destination_is_segwit_migration OR NOT destination_is_exchange_or_otc_desk)
backtest_gate.usage: Use benign_fade as a mean-reversion long gate on the BTC dip (P(flat/up) high). Use bearish as a conditional short gate only — most alerts resolve flat (P_flat=1.0 base), so do NOT apply a downside prior until destination confirms exchange/OTC.
backtest_gate.point_in_time_note: Destination tagging and intent are NOT known at the moment of the Whale Alert — assuming exchange-bound at t is look-ahead. Gate on the alert first, then update direction only once Arkham confirms destination (which may lag hours). ETF/treasury absorption is the key muting variable and must be measured contemporaneously, not backfilled.

signals.one_liner: Dormant Satoshi-era wallet awakenings net flat (~2% knee-jerk dip): fade the headline dip when coins move wallet-to-wallet/SegWit, and only short if destination confirms exchange/OTC into a weak (low-ETF-bid) tape.
